I have a big update for you, friend, so I'll get right to it:
**_FIRST,_ **political experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight rated our race a TOSS-UP – meaning Democrats have a real chance of winning what POLITICO has called the "most competitive" open-seat race in the entire country.
**_THEN,_** the Republican Governors Association dumped over $10 million into Arizona to flood the airwaves – and my extremist opponent Kari Lake (R) launched TV ads**featuring _none other than Donald J. Trump._**
**_NOW,_ we're launching ads of our own to reach as many Arizona voters as possible and fight back against these extremist right-wing attacks! **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Greg=20Lopez?=
subject: Happy Father's Day!
body:
To All the Great Colorado Dads

http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=50cb47d2ca-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_20_12_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-50cb47d2ca-584862049

** Thank you to all the dads
------------------------------------------------------------

** Who Make Colorado Great!
------------------------------------------------------------

Today America needs Dads, so thank you to all the dad’s out there creating a better future for our children. The United States is now the leader for fatherlessness (https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/america-crisis-fathers?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=50cb47d2ca-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_20_12_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-50cb47d2ca-584862049) in the world and our culture is in desperate need of improvement. Crime, homelessness, poor performing schools, are all symptoms of this greater societal ill.

This will be a priority for me, to reach our youth and impress upon them the importance of the family. Stand with me and help us rebuild Colorado into the model state for strong family values.

** Donate today to help us on the way to putting People Over Politics
and restoring our great Colorado!
------------------------------------------------------------

body:
I wish all you amazing dads a wonderful Father's Day! We are 10 DAYS away from the primary!! Lets cross the finish line!!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qoxjl-ttjjilthht-r/) **Happy Birthday AND Happy Father's Day to my Dad! You are my rock and my inspiration.****Happy Father's Day to all the Dads in my life, especially my husband Jason, and my wonderful father-in-law Ted Ganahl. ****And a Happy Father's Day to all the Dads and Grandfathers who are reading this email! Please take time to enjoy your children and families. Life is too short!** [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qoxjl-ttjjilthht-y/) ** We are 10 days away from the primary! **** Your support means EVERYTHING!****We need volunteers to help our team connect with voters!** Our team is set up around the state to Get Out The Vote! body:
Friends, From the McCloskey family to yours - happy Father's Day to all the dads out there!We are so lucky to have Mark in our lives, and I know you feel the same way about the dads in your life. I have a quick favor to ask this Father's Day...**After everything Mark has done for our family - including using his AR-15 to defend our home from a woke BLM/Antifa mob - for Father 's Day, I'm hoping to surprise him with a card from all of his supporters! ****[Please, will you sign your name to show your support?](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyditha-bjututkitk-r/)** [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyditha-bjututkitk-y/) Thank you in advance for adding your name. name: Ryan D. Kelley
subject: This Really Backfired!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Michigan for Ryan D
body:
It has been a whirlwind of a week for the campaign.
| | | |
---
| Peter,
It has been a whirlwind of a week for the campaign.
As you may know, on June 9, the very day that the January 6 commission started its sham hearings, the FBI raided my house and arrested me in front of my small children, after giving a tip to NBC news about the raid.
I was charged with misdemeanors, and thankfully quickly released on bond.
Let that sink in. They raided my house for misdemeanors.
Little did they know that what they sought to use for evil, God is using for good.
Their actions have generated a groundswell of support for my campaign, from all over the country, as it became crystal clear that both the State and Federal government are using the brute force of the law to attack their political opponents.
They didn't expect this.

---
---
We have seen an unprecedented, coordinated effort this election season to eliminate Republicans, not just from the gubernatorial race, but from other local races.
A couple of days ago, Dana Nessel expressed her frustration at my momentum. She lamented,
"Frankly there is no way to keep him off the ballot, and if he were to win, it would be very difficult to remove him from office."
That's right, Dana. There is absolutely nothing you can do to stop what's coming.
My campaign is being inundated with calls asking me if I've dropped out of the race. If anyone tells you that I dropped out of the race, don't believe them.
One of my supporters received a call from a pollster:
---
---
Gretchen Whitmer and Dana Nessel are petrified, as they should be, because no scheming will stop the grassroots from electing a Governor who will put an end to shenanigans, and restore freedom to Michigan.
The Democrats will throw everything they have at me, including money from big donors.
[Would you chip in $20, $25, $50, $100 or more to keep our momentum going and to help us fight? ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001quYycWM88o9YPHsRCDLAZ16-Bdd1ar6CIU8AEAmSGiCdW49aCpDOPI5WIo2WO4uYwTJbj6zxKPjo-sIWyPW_y_Xutz7cN1cQ-L8J1ZzkZR1pxX1yCOG_9dngUH3JzFgD-FzM4Kj2O5HYDybRqvEF_mGCtoZO9GdSWKA5I00kU9wOrhcyo0QjSIvgmH-v7OjRGwVRZJQvAepBJ1eHleG78Q==&c=hP18rxI1jtH_4wiIQLabmqo2qD1cYnUjGw6eNk2rIgMk9c7ofTqyBQ==&ch=wyp5ctcL4rk-bQGsn_Qk41g6wXEZoFj4ulvG4FAobEiDxP9QHb3EVw==)
Every bit counts.
---
| [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001quYycWM88o9YPHsRCDLAZ16-Bdd1ar6CIU8AEAmSGiCdW49aCpDOPDOvIRMTEZDv0GxaS0arc9ChjcRI5gqbhsRKL8be-Uf7UpVVYrC5hLrcuAUFvTXkg_8kzqmL28LsY07uDdirjTWOZEx1NqCNexM-2wpB8ymi6OhOXX0qPSbjcG8A-ENXmUjaUxX8O7Jo6ByuuPgkr9WJe8b8CbUzHg==&c=hP18rxI1jtH_4wiIQLabmqo2qD1cYnUjGw6eNk2rIgMk9c7ofTqyBQ==&ch=wyp5ctcL4rk-bQGsn_Qk41g6wXEZoFj4ulvG4FAobEiDxP9QHb3EVw==)
---
I am so grateful for you and humbled by your support. You keep me going!
Fighting for our constitutional republic,

Ryan D. Kelley Candidate for Michigan Governor
---
|
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6161%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=fJ%2fw2RTx4gDdaEKyOo%2fIJw&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63761%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o1%2bw%2bnqK9fIM9ga%2f1w5KrQ&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63762%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qoc5KV8kROnz0H0Sa63YBg&sysid=1) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63763%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1PFhel%2fffncSFz2%2fSEMpWg&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6161%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=fJ%2fw2RTx4gDdaEKyOo%2fIJw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6161%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=fJ%2fw2RTx4gDdaEKyOo%2fIJw&sysid=1)

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: We've been ineffective
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
I didn’t know how to tell you this. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9290%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qTFRo7zbhJMXUWPZtFMauA&sysid=1)
I didn’t know how to tell you this.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c35892%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tzFVWs1yUus6vZwz5LnGHA&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

I’m losing to this crazy, leftist opponent of mine, and I honestly need some help.

**_Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen:_**

* Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate is going to represent Louisiana in the U.S. Senate

* The Socialist Left will have a Senate Majority and will take away our Second Amendment rights, destroy our borders, and create chaos in our communities

* Draconian nationwide mandates will be passed because there will be nobody in Washington Left to stand up to the Left and tell it how it is

These are just a few things that will happen if I don’t get the support I need to win re-election in 2022. The big question is: **[Can I count on your support?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c35893%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CaNfgq6AkA%2fAS4wcrA7ohQ&sysid=1)**

The big question is: ** | Thank you, Senator John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share Your Thoughts on the Future of the American Dream
body:
We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb4kbk2i1dh5he1ltpvccu12blmkm9tqms46sm9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cth64o70c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfeplkeaom4tjl6pp77db4e6q79cb4s9or4d9im3h6csdgc3hmddbme4ob1dhk6urt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor9ddl6upb4phmcspm8ptgmlin49fg)

---
Hello Fellow Conservative, We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? The woke Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory. Progressive” policies on college campuses throughout the nation are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we enjoy. The government has abandoned free market principles in favor of out-of-control spending and higher taxes. Now, good people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And the American Dream is becoming more and more out of reach—especially for future generations. I know this is hard. I know this isn’t what we wanted. But right now, the war for America’s future is upon us. From what I’ve been told, you’re someone who is concerned about the direction our country is headed, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. The Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your thoughts. **[Would you take this important survey to let us know what you think about the state of the American Dream for you children and grandchildren? ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zairekg9kcpi2u8qg0q2kmut08glp1h79vul5ms0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cth64o70c3h2bs)** It should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is critical, so please don’t wait. You can get started right now using this secure link: **[https://secured.heritage.org/american-dream-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlr5j8qot3pg5ghckhovmevqg56ib0d387khd298_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cth64o70c3h2bs)** Thank you so much. I look forward to getting your insights. Regards, Andrew P. subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3hn49udu7043c13umo2qn0et7aa0uidkf9m68lg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cth64o74c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onge4o70s5nc1gm2dj5mhor8pj0cdgr2o71e9ib2shhc9gjeo3kclom8tdgcpgrfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74db665ob6ob7mtgmcdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---

name: Team Allen for LG
subject: A Message from Leah Allen
body:
Join the Fight Today!
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
|
---
| They're at it again, in full force!
Democrat candidates for statewide office met in Worcester recently, and they made their plans for the future of our state abundantly clear:
• they want to spend even more of your hard-earned money to pay for their radical agenda... including proposals like banning fossil fuels in new cars and new building construction in coming years...
• they are unfazed by opposition to the unfair, unconstitutional mandates government imposed during COVID... and trust me, they're just waiting for a chance to do it all over again...
• they have no problem with taking away your right to decide what your kids learn in school... after all, it's all part of their plan to pass along their extreme political agenda to the next generation.... This is not the future our state needs, and it is the reason why Geoff Diehl and I were endorsed by overwhelming votes at the MassGOP Convention last month.
Geoff Diehl and I are a winning ticket for Massachusetts this fall. Voters across our state recognize the need for balance and accountability in state government, especially when it comes to matters of taxes and spending and protecting your freedom. This is what our campaigns are all about.
But, in order to win, I'm going to need your help.
Right now, there are two Democrats lining up to run for Governor, and three candidates for Lieutenant Governor. They are sure to be well-funded and have lots of resources to get their message out to voters this fall.
Geoff and I need to fight them every step of the way in order to win - and we will.
We can't allow entrenched liberal politicians like Maura Healey and Kim Driscoll to get elected this fall. Just think of how bad it would be for our state!
During the time I served as a State Representative, I was often appalled by the policies and tactics the Democrat majority rolled out all the time. But now it's worse than ever! As bad as it was back then, we didn't have five-dollar gas prices and eight percent inflation rates to contend with. Democrats weren't so brazen as to enact legislation to give driver's licenses to illegal immigrants, or to propose taking away your right to object to a forced vaccination due to sincerely-held religious beliefs. The list goes on and on.
Can there be any doubt that the majority party in the Legislature would go even further to spend your money and take away your rights if left without any checks and balances?
As a mother, I am particularly concerned about the effect all these bad policies are having on our state and its future. Is this really the legacy we want to be leaving to our kids?
I don't think it is. And, that's the major reason why I am running to be your next Lieutenant Governor.
Geoff Diehl and I have a positive vision for the future of our state. We want to put you, your rights, and your prosperity ahead of everything else. We want to create a state you can be proud to live in, not one you want to leave - or one that you have to leave because it's too expensive or onerous to live and work here. This is your state, it's your home. And, most importantly, it's your government.
We are confident in our ability to win this November. But, in order to execute on all elements of the campaign we have planned, we need to make sure we have all the resources we need.
Can you please make an investment in the future of our state by making a donation to my campaign today? Whether it's $10, $100, or a maximum donation of $1000, any amount you can contribute will help us guarantee a victory this fall.
Thank you so much for your help.
Sincerely,
Leah Cole Allen
PS: The state primary is less than three months away. Please take a moment to show your support for my campaign for Lieutenant Governor today. Thanks for your help!

---
| | | [Donate to Leah Allen](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mFB_YSu7iFV4v5wRhobYSiBMgvifgZxVu_Rb4P7aWOnwGyy2HlMZwvflU862V8VyOVyC9VieRZUIAApwvxxoFZIhR4Ygerg0436LfMunuzVN1adBm7iMGA0AVHngFHRECZm5UD4Nnk0BjU_7zuZgwOnhggCMotjg4g138cd2p_gntRthCALWSQ==&c=PLT6D9VkLqgcEjs8EtD4zeqIsroIX6PuyF1aTpGi6hQqmV5y5zmhcg==&ch=D_NnWSFlCKRg_NAwn5J6dWv_bb9_jA6s8X1AYsqY2KGwgGVKiC3K7g==)

Friends, What a year it has been. We came so close to advancing - just a couple of percentage points away. We _must_ do better for working people here \- and that's just what we'll do. Thank you everyone for your support throughout this campaign. We couldn't have done this without you - we could not have built this powerhouse here in North Orange County that will surely see victories from here on out. Below is my official statement: Yours In Solidarity, Mike Ortega

body:
The American Cop Dinner
---
| | | | | |
---
| STAND UP FOR AMERICA.
---
| Unapologetically American. Undeniably Original. The Candidate for We the People.

| | | [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gwU7gWIwlxbCXPCcW5mibBIu2KzY3x1150EYWerx7fNh2nxDcmscEH8km-soGb_MYlkuuxG2SE3Iapo3EC2571ziXEdw7ncrEhs1zAgOKNus4RI8RyrO0LxJW_OHaZZvGoUcbTG64qwWbLBGOW4DcA==&c=eTE_qfr5KIvZD-hV8izvDWHW2hZv5fIl4aGj6OT25LY6WgePS6FDWg==&ch=CDvtBEGAANo63_idN8i7_1w6AW397IroVJS7I3azHuU2FtXNFiLEcA==)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| LAST CALL!! THE AMERICAN COP DINNER featuring SHERIFF (RET.) MACK
---
|
Friends,
I wanted to send one last message to you and invite you to join me and my very good friends, Constitutional Sheriffs Richard Mack (Ret.) and Klickitat County Sheriff Bob Songer on June 23, 2022, for an evening celebrating our law enforcement officers and Constitutional Sheriffs and Peace Officers. Today is the FINAL DAY TO GET YOUR TICKETS TO THIS EVENT! The ticket portal closes tonight at 11:59 PM. This dinner event benefits our Congressional campaign.
In liberty,
---
|
---
|
---
| | | [GET YOUR TICKETS NOW!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gwU7gWIwlxbCXPCcW5mibBIu2KzY3x1150EYWerx7fNh2nxDcmscECVB8kVyRc3MGA0N5K99ZZBEKuKNfPJZmG6djb1QPNGM16wYlmKaX5_TLMVtiw5wX14yyHW6KoxvoxBEkMQTgTTohayCvTUdsLLakwj_3ZNq822E0JxDYQqxtP595uJmVPJj4HPlYGQRjTBs5w8SW-kntTXlNHr05CnQrkF7BLe8sUMh2zVqm9ZrgWGhBkKkwAOw4jb5qhtOAqyalb-LHjU=&c=eTE_qfr5KIvZD-hV8izvDWHW2hZv5fIl4aGj6OT25LY6WgePS6FDWg==&ch=CDvtBEGAANo63_idN8i7_1w6AW397IroVJS7I3azHuU2FtXNFiLEcA==)
---
| LOCATION:
CG Public House and Catering | 9221 W Clearwater Ave # A, Kennewick, WA 99336 VIP + Dinner Tickets Include:
Private reception with Sheriff Mack, Chief Culp, and Sheriff Songer | Professional Photograph | Copy of American Cop Autographed by Chief Culp, Sheriff Mack, and Sheriff Songer | One (1) Glass of Wine | Delicious Dinner, Beverage, and Desert Dinner Tickets Include:
Delicious Dinner, Beverage, and Desert | Post Event Meet & Greet Opportunity (time permitting)
ABOUT YOUR KEYNOTE SPEAKER:
Sheriff Mack is best known as the sheriff who fought the Clintons all the way to Supreme Court and lived to tell about it.
In 1994, Mack and six other sheriffs from across the country challenged the constitutionality of the Brady Bill and ultimately, fought it all the way to the United States Supreme Court, where they won a monumental decision for freedom.
Three years later, in a landmark 5-4 split decision based on the Tenth Amendment to the United States Constitution, Mack won his case.
He has also been named Elected Official of the Year by the Arizona-New Mexico Coalition of Counties in 1994, received the NRA Law Officer of the Year, inducted into the NRA Hall of Fame, 1995 Cicero Award, Samuel Adams Leadership Award from the Local Sovereignty Coalition, and Gun Owners of America Defender of the Second Amendment Award.
He was sheriff for two terms until 1997. Sheriff Mack currently teaches, consults, and empowers people around the country and around the world. He started the Constitutional Sheriffs & Peace Officers Association (CSPOA) which educates both citizens as well as sheriffs and other peace officers on the Constitution and their limitations of power, according to the Constitution.

clean_body: The American Cop Dinner | | | | | | | STAND UP FOR AMERICA. | Unapologetically American. Undeniably Original. The Candidate for We the People. | | | == | | | | | | LAST CALL!! THE AMERICAN COP DINNER featuring SHERIFF (RET.) MACK | Friends, I wanted to send one last message to you and invite you to join me and my very good friends, Constitutional Sheriffs Richard Mack (Ret.) and Klickitat County Sheriff Bob Songer on June 23, 2022, for an evening celebrating our law enforcement officers and Constitutional Sheriffs and Peace Officers. Today is the FINAL DAY TO GET YOUR TICKETS TO THIS EVENT! The ticket portal closes tonight at 11:59 PM. This dinner event benefits our Congressional campaign. In liberty, | | | | | == | LOCATION: CG Public House and Catering | 9221 W Clearwater Ave # A, Kennewick, WA 99336 VIP + Dinner Tickets Include: Private reception with Sheriff Mack, Chief Culp, and Sheriff Songer | Professional Photograph | Copy of American Cop Autographed by Chief Culp, Sheriff Mack, and Sheriff Songer | One (1) Glass of Wine | Delicious Dinner, Beverage, and Desert Dinner Tickets Include: Delicious Dinner, Beverage, and Desert | Post Event Meet & Greet Opportunity (time permitting) ABOUT YOUR KEYNOTE SPEAKER: Sheriff Mack is best known as the sheriff who fought the Clintons all the way to Supreme Court and lived to tell about it. In 1994, Mack and six other sheriffs from across the country challenged the constitutionality of the Brady Bill and ultimately, fought it all the way to the United States Supreme Court, where they won a monumental decision for freedom. Three years later, in a landmark 5-4 split decision based on the Tenth Amendment to the United States Constitution, Mack won his case. He has also been named Elected Official of the Year by the Arizona-New Mexico Coalition of Counties in 1994, received the NRA Law Officer of the Year, inducted into the NRA Hall of Fame, 1995 Cicero Award, Samuel Adams Leadership Award from the Local Sovereignty Coalition, and Gun Owners of America Defender of the Second Amendment Award. He was sheriff for two terms until 1997. Sheriff Mack currently teaches, consults, and empowers people around the country and around the world. He started the Constitutional Sheriffs & Peace Officers Association (CSPOA) which educates both citizens as well as sheriffs and other peace officers on the Constitution and their limitations of power, according to the Constitution. | | | == | CAN'T ATTEND THE EVENT BUT STILL WANT TO HELP OUT? name: =?UTF-8?B?4piGQ0kgb24gYmVoYWxmIG9mIEhpbGxzZGFsZSBDb2xsZWdl?=
subject: Your 2022 Second Amendment Survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsfuyWLhNo

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osfuyWLhNo

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend of the Constitution,

The far Left in America is attempting to
rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with
a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's
Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands
that education is essential to the defense of liberty.

We are reaching and teaching millions of
Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this
without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.

Could you take a few minutes to complete our
Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below?

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/

Your timely survey answers will help us reach
and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year
about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights
protected by the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left's
most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our
liberty is ignorance.

Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing
truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in
1844.

Today our educational outreach efforts
include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty,
such as the Second Amendment.

As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler
observed in Imprimis, our digest of liberty that reaches millions
of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first
principles."

This means the Second Amendment is essential
for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of
defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.

This kind of thinking is foreign to most
college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are
now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an
example…

Not long ago, the University of Virginia
canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.

Why?

The administration was concerned that firing
guns in honor of those who served their country and did their
part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student
body.

Unfortunately, there are many more such
examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the
ongoing decline in civics education in America.

But instead of just TALKING, it's more
important to DO something about it.

That's why we have been working to expand our
educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

And this work continues today.

That's why I would like your answers to our
brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today
at this secure link:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/

We believe that an educated citizenry is
essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan
said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from
extinction."

Do you agree? I hope so.

This is why we reach and teach millions of
Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution.
It's also why we need your help today.

As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from
much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

Our independence from the government means
that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of
citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to
liberty.

It also means your gift really matters.

Today, you have a great opportunity to help
preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future
generations.

After completing your Second Amendment
Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous
tax-deductible gift today.

And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll
send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our
thank you.

This hat commemorates our partnership with
USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best
American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and
Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited!

Thank you for your time and attention. I look
forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

P.S. Our Constitution-including the Second
Amendment-is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take
our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will
only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve
liberty for future generations. Thank you!

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isfuyWLhNo

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osfuyWLhNo

name: Rev. Mark Holland
subject: Finding common ground and delivering progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas
body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/K80IoBtScUKMviWXAMvX8A2?unsubscribedata=XCMS8yQ%2FLsz2PUNEWRf9kf8gn9U2%2FqHIFKmo2tGVfvAH0Z45QCfyVZHCMyxN83E80Qh%2FdaX8FGwOF4%2BII9abzYGtjwFvUIaITs0bl8Jdu%2F8aM2No8nDntZ9sOv7u6khOcEaLgbXm1HXYrJGByau3%2BjK4rExUETKvLhM00Bi0tG369wh3VQW6l0mUtA%2FBv%2BEz141s64zvGS1WSbliGXG2%2FmJakEFXciS%2BKVcG162u1mOCItG%2FAFLbepkkJPywdLCTE88vplObO7LJpd85H67s9ddYF0r1DNSuNYLXMIFE9sQX%2FapUD%2ByAUTMYgaRnuDdLa7KIfGK5KkBeyY0YKTeKBBxtHrap7A9zutyD0Ry%2FVyIFe%2FfTSKfPjHWrzjnfSpyAIYKvVf%2BhcYPUtlxjcjZifNV%2FZfra4hKOL%2BL%2Fdt4KE1c%3D)
---
| Team, like many of you, my heart has been heavy from the collective suffering our nation has endured as of late.

As I travel Kansas talking with voters, I hear a lot about the concerns of folks across the whole state – rising gas prices, not being able to afford health care, being scared to send their kids to school or camp or church for fear that the next mass shooting will be in their community. Kansans deserve a leader who is listening, and ready to act.

[I’m running for Senate because the concerns of Kansans cannot go neglected another day. You need a Senator who is fighting for you, not someone who shies away from a challenge. If you’re with me, chip in to my campaign for the U.S. Senate >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46726516/351535932/183233180?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220618_2_5&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWY4ZGExMy05ZGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_MM_QeIWz63gCxkREh_g8FncQFOAejUPkNsExoGLMc=) | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46726520/351535936/183233180?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220618_2_5&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWY4ZGExMy05ZGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_MM_QeIWz63gCxkREh_g8FncQFOAejUPkNsExoGLMc=)
---
As Mayor of Kansas City, my job was to act on the issues that affect the daily lives of the community. Thanks to that service, I truly understand the urgency of issues such as housing, community safety and access to health clinics.

Jerry Moran’s complicity is only harming the already vulnerable members of our communities, further barring them from accessing the resources that they need the most. As a person of faith, this goes against my core value of looking out for our neighbors.

[As the next Senator, I will improve the lives of Kansans from all walks of life. Please donate today to help me achieve this goal. The Democratic majority depends on us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46726525/351535939/183233180?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220618_2_5&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWY4ZGExMy05ZGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_MM_QeIWz63gCxkREh_g8FncQFOAejUPkNsExoGLMc=)

Thank you,

Reverend Mark Holland

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.
---

subject: I’ll be honest

Hello,
After I won the Democratic nomination for Senate against Chuck Grassley here in Iowa, my campaign saw an incredible surge of donations. But since then, our online fundraising has _really_ slowed down...
I’ll be honest: This is really not good. Fox “News” and Chuck Grassley have started shamelessly attacking me and my military service, and I cannot fight back if we don’t have the resources to counter their lies.
The early polls show this will be an incredibly close race – just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Chuck Grassley – and if we win and turn Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our Senate majority for another two years.
But I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to send Grassley packing and turn Iowa blue this November, I need grassroots donors like you to give right now:

body:
|

_**Dr. Ben Carson just released his new book Created Equal and I 've got a signed copy with your name on it!**_ _**[CLAIM YOUR COPY HERE>>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60625102:6t1cWqoNl:m:1:3299561967:EDECFE719E16AC42BFD5284F0E7EC016:r "CLAIM YOUR COPY HERE >>>>")**_

---

---

In his book, Ben Carson tackles the issue of race in America and uses his experiences growing up in the toughest parts of Detroit to help us chart a better course.

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

This debate is so critical to America's future, and that is why every Conservative should read his new book.

_**[Claim your signed copy of Ben Carson's new book Created Equal HERE >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60625102:6t1cWqoNl:m:1:3299561967:EDECFE719E16AC42BFD5284F0E7EC016:r "Claim your signed copy of Ben Carson’s new book Created Equal HERE >>>")**_

Thank you,

Elisa

---

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: What my opponent is watching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220620&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220620&amount=28]
Team,
We’re officially two weeks away from our second end-of-quarter deadline of 2022 on June 30th.
After June 30th, all campaigns are required by federal law to report how much money they have raised, and how much money they have in the bank – which means you’re about to hear from me (and many, many other candidates) much more than you normally do.
So, in anticipation of that, let me reiterate my pledge: I will not send those “the world is going to end unless you chip in NOW” emails you always get. I will not create completely made up deadlines. And I will not send you pointless pablum just to fill your inbox.
So, here’s my pitch: the numbers we release two weeks from now will be closely tracked by my opponent, members of the GOP, outside groups, and just about anyone looking to flip my seat. They indicate just how strong of an operation I’m running, and just how formidable of an opponent I’ll be in the fall.
That last piece is particularly important. This is the last end-of-quarter deadline before the August 2nd primary election, which is when campaign season will really kick into high gear. Meaning that this is our last chance to really show our strength before things get crazy.
My opponent will be basing part of his election strategy on the numbers we release in two weeks, so if you’ve been considering contributing, now is the time. Anything you feel comfortable chipping in will help as I run in one of the most competitive House races in the entire country.
If you’re game, click below to help me keep my seat (and keep the House!) blue in November. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220620&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220620&amount=28]
Elissa

# [#]

Friend,

I’m losing to this crazy, leftist opponent of mine, and I honestly need some help.

**_Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen:_**

* Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate is going to represent Louisiana in the U.S. Senate

* The Socialist Left will have a Senate Majority and will take away our Second Amendment rights, destroy our borders, and create chaos in our communities

* Draconian nationwide mandates will be passed because there will be nobody in Washington Left to stand up to the Left and tell it how it is

These are just a few things that will happen if I don’t get the support I need to win re-election in 2022. Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen: Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate is going to represent Louisiana in the U.S. Senate The Socialist Left will have a Senate Majority and will take away our Second Amendment rights, destroy our borders, and create chaos in our communities Draconian nationwide mandates will be passed because there will be nobody in Washington Left to stand up to the Left and tell it how it is These are just a few things that will happen if I don’t get the support I need to win re-election in 2022. The big question is: ** | Thank you, Senator John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 This message was originally sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Sent to Republican Task Force subscribers. PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
This week will be a make or break point in our campaign, friend. We can’t afford to let our feet off the gas now.

---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46734527/351565865/333259033?amount=20.22&refcode=em_220620_votingplan&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220620_votingplan&refcode2=3cd4bfa5-a9f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2Q0YmZhNS1hOWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xzOfChXNIsBXkiBfZUroWBfBQOX6OlnMY8G7HreV-DM=) Hey there! The special election for Nebraska’s First Congressional District is **next week** — can you believe it? Our team wants to make sure everyone has the information they need to get out the vote for Patty on June 28th — or sooner! — so we made a personalized Election Day plan just for you: | Your Special Election Voting Plan
1. **Vote before Election Day if you can.** You can cast your vote for Patty in person from now until the end of day next Monday, June 27, at your county election office.

2. **If you can’t vote early, verify your polling place ahead of time.** Take some stress out of Election Day and [find your polling place now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46734530/351565872/1061351938?refcode=em_220620_votingplan&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220620_votingplan&refcode2=3cd4bfa5-a9f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2Q0YmZhNS1hOWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xzOfChXNIsBXkiBfZUroWBfBQOX6OlnMY8G7HreV-DM=&emci=a8359282-92ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3cd4bfa5-a9f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=17998091)

3. Get your early ballots in before the close of polls on Election Day. Whether you’re delivering your ballot in person or by mail, make sure it’s at your county election office drop box before 8:00 p.m. on June 28. [Find your county election office →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46734533/351565875/405159070?refcode=em_220620_votingplan&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220620_votingplan&refcode2=3cd4bfa5-a9f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2Q0YmZhNS1hOWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xzOfChXNIsBXkiBfZUroWBfBQOX6OlnMY8G7HreV-DM=&emci=a8359282-92ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3cd4bfa5-a9f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=17998091)

4. **Make a grassroots contribution to support our voter outreach efforts.** We need to keep our latest ad running through Election Day and get Patty Pansing Brooks on every screen in the district!

clean_body: This week will be a make or break point in our campaign, friend. We can’t afford to let our feet off the gas now. | | = Hey there! The special election for Nebraska’s First Congressional District is next week — can you believe it? Our team wants to make sure everyone has the information they need to get out the vote for Patty on June 28th — or sooner! — so we made a personalized Election Day plan just for you: | Your Special Election Voting Plan 1. Vote before Election Day if you can. You can cast your vote for Patty in person from now until the end of day next Monday, June 27, at your county election office. 2. If you can’t vote early, verify your polling place ahead of time. Take some stress out of Election Day and 3. Get your early ballots in before the close of polls on Election Day. Whether you’re delivering your ballot in person or by mail, make sure it’s at your county election office drop box before 8:00 p.m. on June 28. 4. Make a grassroots contribution to support our voter outreach efforts. We need to keep our latest ad running through Election Day and get Patty Pansing Brooks on every screen in the district! | = This week will be a make or break point in our campaign, friend. We can’t afford to let our feet off the gas now. = = We’re in the home stretch of the special election sprint, team! body:
It’s really important

Hi Team,

I wanted to make sure you saw our campaign manager, Andrew Whitley’s, message from yesterday about how important digital is to win elections. Digital is the key to winning elections because it allows us to reach critical masses of voters on the platforms they use most. The hard truth is that Brad can’t win this election without running a robust digital campaign- and we can’t do that unless supporters step up and chip in at this critical moment.

Derrick Van Orden’s campaign is being funded by Trump-backed billionaires, and we are counting on the hardworking people of Wisconsin’s 3rd District to be the backbone of our grassroots campaign. **[Give $10 to help us compete with DVO’s dark money→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46734459/351565749/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.06.20_b1_digitalFW_X_F1_S1_C1__all\]&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_digitalfw_x_f1_s1_c1__all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Q0YmZhNS1hOWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=piOwe42Dh_L3IrA_pDJGFEYd93QRIe3nN4TCHUpf0wU=)**

SUBJECT: Let’s talk about digital
SENT: June 19, 2022

---
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46734461/351565757/-774467154?refcode=abd_em_fr_2022_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_digitalfw_x_f1_s1_c1__all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Q0YmZhNS1hOWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=piOwe42Dh_L3IrA_pDJGFEYd93QRIe3nN4TCHUpf0wU=)
---
Team,

Running a winning campaign takes a LOT of work and requires us to rethink our strategy as the world around us changes. **Today, the key to winning elections is a robust digital strategy.** Even the very best candidates don’t have a chance in hell without running an effective digital campaign- and I’ll tell you why below:
1. **It allows you to reach people on the platforms they use most** : think about it- what do you spend more time doing: watching cable tv, reading print news, or on your phone? If you are anything like most Americans, you spend the majority of your time- and get the majority of your news- from your phone.
2. **Helps you reach the largest mass of people** : baby boomers, Gen X and millennials, and Gen Z ALL have social media accounts on multiple platforms and spend a great deal of time scrolling through news feeds. Posting ads on digital platforms allows us to reach so many more voters than canvassing or sending mail ever could.
3. **You get the most bang for your buck** : having campaign staffers go door to door, and producing and distributing physical campaign materials is extremely expensive and time-consuming, which vastly reduces the number of people we can reach. Correctly utilizing digital allows us to reach exponentially more people for the same cost- and is environmentally friendly.

**[We can’t beat Derrick Van Orden without the resources to run a comprehensive digital campaign. Chipping in $5 today goes a long way in helping us reach more voters so we can tell them why Capital Insurrectionist Derrick Van Orden is the WRONG person to represent Wisconsin’s 3rd District in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46734465/351565765/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.06.20_b1_digitalFW_X_F1_S1_C1__all&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_digitalfw_x_f1_s1_c1__all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Q0YmZhNS1hOWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=piOwe42Dh_L3IrA_pDJGFEYd93QRIe3nN4TCHUpf0wU=)**

| Dear Friend,
Peter Lucas has a great column in today's Boston Herald about Geoff Diehl and the quick work he's doing to repeal legislation giving driver's licenses to illegal immigrants.
---
|

| | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pf4X3mpHuts2HpGB6YAZpSUVkl6vRoLy71-9T7473rY1pEDb0n56_Mc328HItMNy-6Ya2hP-pgK8y6_5l6CnYNtFedD7tmFTV-n7zBdOwnl31GbDWbPTry6O3g85Sx8c30Io-gmUtZ38roUra3kCP5PP3Io2ziuo89sZkEvwCoAfBVNee61gzEGOCazz_hfG1Fr44oDym-yoGG6e8q0fk-5mNsHPoutx1unbT6zDeSbOPDj4-yxn0I0nIyCfDulTzGm_TXUqaJR_DjO10109_yOBcljb36Ie&c=N8i8VG08jzdYKTCUZnHwap0AS2Ut1pRmB_tdUrDJiwRD8p76Rb_Zzg==&ch=3dcwNMPTZS3D_k8lqsP8G68jCaPyAvDN7mOLCfHMST7Q8f-_sTDLqw==)

|
### Peter Lucas /
### The Boston Herald 6/20/2022:

"No sooner did the veto take place than Geoff Diehl, the Republican convention endorsed candidate for governor, got Maureen Maloney, a GOP committee member, to lead the effort to repeal it....
'This is a bad bill,' Diehl said. 'It's not what the people of Massachusetts want.'"

| Thanks to Geoff and his quick work, the people of our state now have an opportunity to block this bill from becoming law. Of course, Geoff is no stranger to the process -- it's exactly what he did in 2014 when he led the effort to block automatic increases in the state gas tax tied to the rate of inflation.
---
|

| | | POLL: Should MA provide driver's licenses to illegal immigrants?

| [Yes](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pf4X3mpHuts2HpGB6YAZpSUVkl6vRoLy71-9T7473rY1pEDb0n56_Mc328HItMNyz8pLCrkcSUYNRNZAhoArLCbT5rBBtedhk7qEDWzbYdyJPQ5NQESdiLvOHBIqiI7MxTVJ4bOXKGHtMPokyflGKZI3n8I1y8-rUPmxNH2fjmtgFshuGsTgcCw7dlJc8KDwh1dMUFy6_Zp_XPODbo1mvxzWex45BrhcicF5mjaP-v74bHTKVBbyJvo6nUUDt6A-_PqjTdzW8Qb78F_dLV700M8yVjf_6_UfRzEA0eb98eYP3twIh3CdZ4cGPrKQ9YP8eKU6ScRGjSHVDiQjPgxnd5y_TZmfBhVVgVqTwIMB87YCBnUWWx4JZzcLV7Vj72X1BvWu1cyGVZXBhSNN6VukSCXZnhJySrqDLLwNBov7cW93lS-tBCH2UlrbwYKf9j-zJfWAzyyGErLotGKiPWfrY2Ss_DuqHYcPEx5RsaW_JRnElAHyiE8tjnjxTpcbc8czJH9puLrkY1sHMSk1kPbvzfOUgJy2UqsyvSzOyFeoMF3NjTuUQ-SfG4TQTgzeDhw4HL15GJpT7b24xnzIKoKmnSF_u8h2TA_cVSu5IdxM3OU=&c=N8i8VG08jzdYKTCUZnHwap0AS2Ut1pRmB_tdUrDJiwRD8p76Rb_Zzg==&ch=3dcwNMPTZS3D_k8lqsP8G68jCaPyAvDN7mOLCfHMST7Q8f-_sTDLqw==)

| [No](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pf4X3mpHuts2HpGB6YAZpSUVkl6vRoLy71-9T7473rY1pEDb0n56_Mc328HItMNy67NHZpQJ4OhXSlpmTUGbBsqrDNociSNa73B3x_w1ZtEwFjp5P8PdXdWxZENRdH_lyw68FxeKLQjaFh4slsoubsB1Q0eQJv2AR7Y_k_8wZ3eLipvkr6aCqOYThwHjrlFEGb_GO5AyK2VBjC8xnaxoQIL3gleRwoOK5TytgwXdtd5eJTz2vpX740rDGHRbUqSlXzez3xyya2RFzEVuXFbWrFLqaowdBkcfeZq6DKkr1tVyp-hraCdNCeJELFZTMmwacJ00-jnylftkWf79hR7HTPdov0G5dhfttBRvIbUJwlr5KDz_jHxjGk6wkSK5KYL_SBe5EkgwkpOO8dx-_Dgov3v86dD6VJCMJjSzl1LfVP3lr7lQdqXC9aYrCPMgBeLMQCiwHxloQfjyI1nEkHKAkU2kvrbGoVYoqpXCJGmWxxL5GlLsAEl7LpA1f3VSGvwaUQCSuJByiuf8iRbqci6TuNkC5fpJM6BUkNjmQvNmBaZF4pKEfaOqnyQkQzOG_-JS15lCM_xlSOLnbIe2Ap0LAYYfX2MvZngopPNAeIV0qE4=&c=N8i8VG08jzdYKTCUZnHwap0AS2Ut1pRmB_tdUrDJiwRD8p76Rb_Zzg==&ch=3dcwNMPTZS3D_k8lqsP8G68jCaPyAvDN7mOLCfHMST7Q8f-_sTDLqw==)

subject: Juneteenth

body:
I am writing to you on this joyful Juneteenth holiday weekend to remind you that we still have work to do. Our history is not perfect, but together we can work towards a more perfect union. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46737075/351574323/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWYyYWFkYS1hY2YwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yx9lWwjVeztHYjnZEnAn4b2u3xZlEnTYrhFSsTp3nuc=&emci=47b1375a-a0f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=25f2aada-acf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15529135) | Today, we celebrate Juneteenth as a national holiday to mark the anniversary of independence for the millions of Black Americans who were held in the bondage of slavery. Juneteenth has been celebrated for generations in Black communities across the country. _But in 2021, it was finally recognized as a national holiday._ I proudly cast my vote last year to make Juneteenth a federal holiday and joined President Biden as he signed the bill into law. This day is important because on June 19th, 1865, enslaved people in Galveston, Texas received the news that they had been freed – OVER TWO YEARS after the Emancipation Proclamation was signed. As we celebrate this day, we must reflect and reaffirm our commitment to the promise of equality. Communities across the country still experience delays in implementing policy or feel the impact of access to opportunities. From income inequality to opportunity gaps, this history persists in our present moment. But we can work collectively to improve outcomes for all Americans and create a better future for our country. That is why I am proud of my work in Congress to break down barriers and close long-standing gaps – in voting rights, health care access, education, civil rights and more. Legislation like the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, the Financial Services Racial Equity, Inclusion, and Economic Justice Act and the Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act push our nation toward true equality and freedom for all. So I am writing to you on this joyful Juneteenth holiday weekend to remind you that we still have work to do. Our history is not perfect, but together we can work towards a more perfect union. Let’s celebrate how far we have come today and commit to working together and moving forward. With gratitude, – Jahana | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46737077/351574324/-451687450?refcode=E16301-20220620-Juneteenth-SB-Holiday-RegTemplate-RacialJustice-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWYyYWFkYS1hY2YwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yx9lWwjVeztHYjnZEnAn4b2u3xZlEnTYrhFSsTp3nuc=)

We have a **MAJOR** problem in America that I have labeled the _"Great Chinese Land Grab."_
In the United States of America over 30 million acres of _prime_ American Farm & Ranch land is owned not by Asian Americans but by **Red Communist Chinese Nationalists**.
In the state of Oklahoma over 300,000 acres of Oklahoma Farm & Ranch land is owned by the Red Chinese.
American Farm & Ranch land belongs to Americans. PERIOD.
Addressing this national security threat is one of the three objectives that I promise to take on during my first day of entering the US Senate.
When I arrive in DC, I will do these three things on the first day:
**1.** Sponsor legislation in the Senate that BANS Chinese Nationalists or any other foreign entity from purchasing **American farmland**. As well as requiring that the land which has already been purchased by the Red Chinese be sold back to American within sixty days and if not then the county will seize the property and sell it at auction to an America.
**2.** Sponsor legislation in the Senate to cutoff ALL federal funding to any school district in America that teaches **Critical Race Theory** or **Woke Sexuality**. I have labeled the legation the Millstone Act (see Luke 17:2).
**3.** Join forces with Rand Paul in the Senate to bring justice to **Anthony Fauci**
The Best Is Yet To Come.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share Your Thoughts on the Future of the American Dream
body:
We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zprf9hv87mnm8b7g0jpqbct9b4r2dnokmaghst40_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uirj0slnc5geeolge9g74tdgcdrjcolnmaq3co77m1qm2slmemr38cpmeth36c77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmiqrac3im5j78p5jcgrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cljmcp70chim49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhgfjjggb01qst58rqjs8fp9pg8cat8l068riqv0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctj69o34clh2bs)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? The woke Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory. Progressive” policies on college campuses throughout the nation are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we enjoy. The government has abandoned free market principles in favor of out-of-control spending and higher taxes. Now, good people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And the American Dream is becoming more and more out of reach—especially for future generations. I know this is hard. I know this isn’t what we wanted. But right now, the war for America’s future is upon us. From what I’ve been told, you’re someone who is concerned about the direction our country is headed, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. The Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your thoughts. **[Would you take this important survey to let us know what you think about the state of the American Dream for you children and grandchildren? ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6otv4c27dv643215uqqcunmd86p2fh8k32mtv6g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctj69o34clh2bs)** It should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is critical, so please don’t wait. You can get started right now using this secure link: **[https://secured.heritage.org/american-dream-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvvgr2efplhcoomsdfiino9nrp6v9op1vfb83j28_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctj69o34clh2bs)** Thank you so much. I look forward to getting your insights. Regards, Andrew P. McIndoe [**QUESTION 1: Do you believe the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory are destroying the American education system?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdqcj9gj3f8ia0ljq53d2ajdvtlje3rkq72s8560_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctj69o34clh2bs)
---
| | [Yes](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsnm1fki6vegopbaccg1i9u9o9obbb9pa96tk1p8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctj69o34clh2bs)
---
| [No](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvelv5g7at7rkotb5cofgb9jjtdaahjag84fvp78_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctj69o34clh2bs)

Friend,

I woke up the morning after my election, still feeling
surreal about this HISTORIC win.

Being the first Mexican-born American elected to Congress
and only the second Republican to represent the Rio Grande Valley
area in over 100 years is such an honor.

Please contribute $45 to help build momentum off of my
historic win. >>

We're off to a great start heading into the midterms, but
our work isn't finished yet. I need you, Friend, to join me in
the fight to restore our Republican majority and save America.

Please contribute $45 to help us WIN BACK the House and
Senate. >>

Democrats are destroying the American Dream. They deliver
a dependency on the government, inflation, high gas prices, a
Border crisis, and an America Last Agenda.

It's time we put America First. Will you join me in this
fight?

Please contribute $45 and help Conservatives WIN in
November. >>

Thank you,

Mayra Flores
U.S. Representative Elect

| | Folks, tomorrow is a big day for the GOP. Virginians will be casting their votes to determine who Elaine will be facing off against in the general election, but it changes nothing for our race. **Regardless of who the Republican nominee for VA-02 is, you can be sure that they’ve already:**
* Fallen for Trump’s election lies hook, line, and sinker
* Attacked reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, voting rights, and more
* Pledged total loyalty to Donald Trump, gun manufacturers, and the fossil fuel industry
* Congratulated the domestic terrorists who attacked the Capitol on January 6th

Folks, Virginians don’t share these radical views, and the Republican Party bosses know it. That’s why they’re relentlessly attacking Elaine in the media and spending millions to bankroll her opponents. body:
People always ask "what can I do?" **THIS is the answer**

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/a0a4f0083bc4/here-is-your-chance-to-actually-stop-election-fraud-in-its-tracks-8901121?e=77bc5297c6)

** DEAR PATRIOTS,
------------------------------------------------------------

The campaign is allowed to send representatives to inspect the mail in ballots for this election. YOUR COUNTRY NEEDS YOU!! Times slots (ranging 15 - 30 minutes) are listed below. If you would like to sign up PLEASE reply to this email with:::

1. the time slot you want
2. your full legal name
3. your telephone #
4. You email Address
5. You mailing address

This list is JUST for PALM BEACH County. We are working on MARTIN and ST. LUCIE.

Further, DEFEND FLORIDA will be providing us with free training so that we know what to look for. The training is relatively short and can be done from home. A representative from Defend Florida has agreed to help walk us through this process. We are foolish if we do not step up now, take the help and hold our Government accountable. WHO will stand will me??

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: I know the power of TV because I’ve lived it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Hi Peter, Meteorologist and Democratic candidate for Congress in IL-17, Eric Sorensen here. I was on air for 20 years on the highest rated program (in both Rockford and the Quad Cities). When I say ‘highest rated,’ I mean that we had the most viewers. Our weather segments were often one of the most watched hours of the day. Some would say it’s because of my charm and positive attitude. Others would say I got the weather right EVERY day. But it’s probably because people appreciated the scientific perspective I brought to talking about weather and climate change! Oh, and I was fun, _very_ fun. Because our viewership was high, the TV stations were able to sell a LOT of ads in the time I worked there. Here’s how it works: TV is sold by the ‘point’ and shows can charge more points each time an ad plays depending on their number of viewers (you may have heard of ‘Nieson ratings’ - this is where they come in). While candidates get the cheapest rates on TV, rates are being driven up by the governor’s race, meaning we’re paying more than ever every time our ad plays. I know this is a lot of detail, but as your Congressman, it’s my duty to over communicate! It’s funny how I’ve gone from the one “selling TV ads” to the one who’s buying them. And let me tell you, I know the power of TV. TV has the ability to tell a story, to both convey a message and a feeling. It has the power to connect people. clean_body: | Hi Peter, Meteorologist and Democratic candidate for Congress in IL-17, Eric Sorensen here. I was on air for 20 years on the highest rated program (in both Rockford and the Quad Cities). When I say ‘highest rated,’ I mean that we had the most viewers. Our weather segments were often one of the most watched hours of the day. Some would say it’s because of my charm and positive attitude. Others would say I got the weather right EVERY day. But it’s probably because people appreciated the scientific perspective I brought to talking about weather and climate change! Oh, and I was fun, very fun. Because our viewership was high, the TV stations were able to sell a LOT of ads in the time I worked there. Here’s how it works: TV is sold by the ‘point’ and shows can charge more points each time an ad plays depending on their number of viewers (you may have heard of ‘Nieson ratings’ - this is where they come in). While candidates get the cheapest rates on TV, rates are being driven up by the governor’s race, meaning we’re paying more than ever every time our ad plays. I know this is a lot of detail, but as your Congressman, it’s my duty to over communicate! It’s funny how I’ve gone from the one “selling TV ads” to the one who’s buying them. And let me tell you, I know the power of TV. TV has the ability to tell a story, to both convey a message and a feeling. It has the power to connect people. I mean here’s our ad, what do you think: = Peter, for the first time in this campaign we’re being outspent on TV. To reclaim the advantage, we’re rushing a final buy early this week. name: Shontel Brown (personal)
subject: We must persist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We have fought for our rights and freedoms for decades, and despite the adversaries we face now, we will persist.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46740525/351585981/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_220620Reintro_DemMajority_SB_90DO_8_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDBhZWIyMS1iNGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDBP0TRJWzaDWx50q4e280Lw-od8heKCakuGbI88rII=) _This is a longer, personal note from Shontel. We hope you’ll take a moment to read it from beginning to end and hear why this fight means so much. If you don’t have time (that’s okay!),[**_please consider clicking here to contribute and help expand our Democratic majority in Congress._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46740526/351585982/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_220620Reintro_DemMajority_SB_90DO_8_NG_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDBhZWIyMS1iNGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDBP0TRJWzaDWx50q4e280Lw-od8heKCakuGbI88rII=)_ Hello Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to reflect on my mother, the light and inspiration that has led me down this path today.

Growing up, my mother emphasized the importance of my education and the value of fighting. From a young age, I excelled academically, even being invited to a gifted program on the westside of Cleveland. But with my father working and our lack of transportation, my zip code excluded me from this opportunity.

**Despite my disappointment, my mother taught me not to complain but to be the change we want to see.** We doubled down, ensuring I would excel the best I could with the tools I had, never giving up, all while my mother continued to fight for my place in the gifted program. With time, our fight paid off, allowing me to bus across the city to attend classes. My mother’s persistence instilled in me a drive to fight that I still carry today.

I tell this story to show _the willpower and drive we must bring with us today as we navigate tumultuous times._ **Governing is a fight, and like my mother, we must persist.** This gridlock and divisiveness are engineered by a Republican Party that’d rather do nothing than work alongside Democrats to deliver for the people.

To overcome this adversity, we must be the change we want to see. That’s why my team and I are dedicated to flipping Ohio blue. With a neck and neck Senate race and several vulnerable House races, Ohio is our best chance at increasing our Democratic power in Congress to deliver for the people.

From our reproductive rights and voting rights to gun violence prevention and police brutality, we must not forget the long battle. **We have fought for our rights and freedoms for decades, and despite our current adversaries, we will persist.**

[**_The 2022 Midterm elections are our opportunity to not only persist but to create the change we need. Ohio is key to expanding our Democratic majority and pushing the people’s agenda forward. To do it, I need your help. Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford right now to ensure Democrats win big this November?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46740527/351585983/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_220620Reintro_DemMajority_SB_90DO_8_NG_TESTB_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDBhZWIyMS1iNGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDBP0TRJWzaDWx50q4e280Lw-od8heKCakuGbI88rII=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46740528/351585984/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_220620Reintro_DemMajority_SB_90DO_8_NG_TESTB_EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDBhZWIyMS1iNGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDBP0TRJWzaDWx50q4e280Lw-od8heKCakuGbI88rII=)**

clean_body: We have fought for our rights and freedoms for decades, and despite the adversaries we face now, we will persist. = This is a longer, personal note from Shontel. We hope you’ll take a moment to read it from beginning to end and hear why this fight means so much. If you don’t have time (that’s okay!),= Hello Peter, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on my mother, the light and inspiration that has led me down this path today. Growing up, my mother emphasized the importance of my education and the value of fighting. From a young age, I excelled academically, even being invited to a gifted program on the westside of Cleveland. But with my father working and our lack of transportation, my zip code excluded me from this opportunity. Despite my disappointment, my mother taught me not to complain but to be the change we want to see. We doubled down, ensuring I would excel the best I could with the tools I had, never giving up, all while my mother continued to fight for my place in the gifted program. With time, our fight paid off, allowing me to bus across the city to attend classes. My mother’s persistence instilled in me a drive to fight that I still carry today. I tell this story to show the willpower and drive we must bring with us today as we navigate tumultuous times. Governing is a fight, and like my mother, we must persist. This gridlock and divisiveness are engineered by a Republican Party that’d rather do nothing than work alongside Democrats to deliver for the people. To overcome this adversity, we must be the change we want to see. That’s why my team and I are dedicated to flipping Ohio blue. With a neck and neck Senate race and several vulnerable House races, Ohio is our best chance at increasing our Democratic power in Congress to deliver for the people. From our reproductive rights and voting rights to gun violence prevention and police brutality, we must not forget the long battle. We have fought for our rights and freedoms for decades, and despite our current adversaries, we will persist. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = In this together, = Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9293%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=DMtv5JrzZL0A4QzSQrY2Nw&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c35842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=njejsMLbfGX9dFfTqITphA&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c35843%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SAUZcwHjsNuB%2fLR7DyvlJQ&sysid=1) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c35844%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YSme%2fa9UnyPFqV0o2lVosQ&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9293%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=DMtv5JrzZL0A4QzSQrY2Nw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9293%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=DMtv5JrzZL0A4QzSQrY2Nw&sysid=1)

name: Team Stanton
subject: You can help build a stable foundation for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
You can help us to invest in the outreach we need, without worrying about costs.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all) Hey team,

In about six weeks, the people of Arizona will cast votes in the Arizona primary elections. This marks a major turning point for our race, when we will know for sure who our opponent in November will be, and we need to be ready for National Republicans to back them up by bringing in their dark money backers against us.

There's one way you can be sure you've made a difference in all the fights to come. [**By setting up a recurring monthly donation to our campaign, you can help to give us a basis of financial stability, which allows us to invest in the outreach we need as early as possible.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=5&recurring=true&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all)
| [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=5&recurring=true&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all)
---

Greg Stanton is dedicated to working on behalf of Arizonans in Congress, but to get there, he needs his grassroots network of people like you to have his back. [**By making a monthly donation, whatever the amount, you can give his campaign money we can count on.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=5&recurring=true&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all) This lets us budget for the things we need, like hiring staff, supporting our volunteers, and reaching out to voters with TV and digital ads.

We need to be ready for the fights to come. [**So, if you can, will you set up a monthly gift of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford to support Greg Stanton today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=5&recurring=true&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all)

[Give $5 Monthly](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=5&recurring=true&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all)
---
[Give $10 Monthly](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=10&recurring=true&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all)
[Give $25 Monthly](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=25&recurring=true&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all)
[Give $50 Monthly](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=50&recurring=true&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all)
[Choose Your Monthly Gift](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?recurring=true&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all)

Thank you for your support,

Team Stanton

P.S. If you can't make the commitment to a monthly donation right now, we completely understand. Every bit counts, and [**a one-time donation**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all) will also go a long way. Thank you!

**_A tireless advocate for Arizona, Greg was elected to Congress in 2018. Since then, he has built a reputation for working across the aisle and getting things done in Congress. As the former Mayor of Phoenix, he knows the issues of his state and district inside and out._

In 2022, Greg is running in one of the toughest races in the country. [Will you help him keep up the fight for Arizona by chipping in?](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all)** | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/SKPYzFywiOpq0_9NrakECskHGmsKQWl65d4Si5zQNyQ=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.20_b1_ts_all)

---

To learn more about Greg Stanton's work, visit [**StantonForArizona.com**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/PY9F4xWo9oX7FPcZRj1Q8cikTQARYNNskCpAKu4unek=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/Afvt21v5wV7zuA6fqkvhvln0_AZN7iuwU4SmYtDsO88=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/d6cSoyLe7MerQwd4TbT1N7YqKwVtnIWqbeCCwXHMyfY=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uR6yg7WDA2GEEniVw6Q1Qnn9l3uIbU9lYRpDzChqGKw=/N9tUVmekR9aguW6n_ANDoHa6Xt5ZsfHE9Fn6IPqGfTE=)
