name: Mary Trump
subject: Please don't ignore this
body:
Derek,
On Jan. 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it – but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and CommonGood, Derek? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220620_CGVA_DDF]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220620_CGVA_DDF&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220620_CGVA_DDF&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220620_CGVA_DDF&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220620_CGVA_DDF&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220620_CGVA_DDF&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220620_CGVA_DDF]
You know my uncle, Derek. He started the “Big Lie,” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund – and it’s why CommonGood and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like CommonGood.
This includes an all-out effort to hold the House and save the Senate but also TO SUPPORT campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, Derek. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part – starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and CommonGood today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220620_CGVA_DDF]
Thank you,
Dr. Mary L. Trump
Founder & Chair
Democracy Defense Fund
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://go.terrymcauliffe.com/p/kLtAki73Jk-9WaBIIAMDXQ2?unsubscribedata=G9BSGWSfB80dzzYZhDh6tHkKEUmX%2BMyTh%2FKnTBDh001XOcanfCX5HjQqqPWodbXgFYD4Fr9z1cNqWOCyXS3jcFWYwQu9UzohQPhf%2BSQ3qTDTGFuwi%2BWSlo%2F271wzGgWjW6o26mSzrcEZ8qQx73U8ZzHD75EN7m3ayiiUTeyD2sTz%2F2cu5D3sYvdBJx%2FSZqn5h0rEpVUMaypA2ihQaLZFmvICue25yyOu1aU%2FX8Dkb4lu8pzWENIYrhC%2FaiqQzJeqUBgXK5LEj6CQtupLR7nnMXXqrgQXvDdfaz%2FBJKHsTeHLCZLCQ1MVbkgIGYlgVApKnHKx59qe8Pq5kWsYSRIBs1RY%2FoztHTfxR4v387xdpuruNgEVWOmFd1FQgjswa4raTXTjemSJRf1IGWlllJ3vDTMIr3%2F4G2zGSFJmRo4qPkk%3D .

name: Team Vanuch
subject: Election Day is TOMORROW!
body:
Polls are open from 6:00 AM to 7:00PM.
| | | **🚨[Vote TOMORROW!](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/6c751af28549fcbd/d7c781e21bb426c0c3d6b838967d376c/40203)** **[Find your polling location.](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/6c751af28549fcbd/8c970953c593e0acc3d6b838967d376c/40203) 🚨 ** Peter, The Republican Primary for Virginia's 7th Congressional District is tomorrow, and we want to make sure you've made your plan to vote, if you haven't done so already. **Polls are open from 6:00 AM to 7:00PM, and you can[find your voting location HERE](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/6c751af28549fcbd/09f3b140c893ab7dc3d6b838967d376c/40203).** Also, please forward this email to at least five friends, family members, or neighbors and encourage them to support Crystal Vanuch at the polls tomorrow. _Virginia needs as many America First Conservatives as possible to get out and vote to show the extreme left that we're ready to**take our country back**!_
---
---
_**As our Congresswoman, Crystal will always put America First and never compromise our shared REPUBLICAN values.**_ _Thank you for your support at this critical moment,_ Team Vanuch

subject: Mayor Giuliani is asking you to help Scott Kaspar!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KASPAR FOR CONGRESS**
body:
America's Mayor Rudy Giuliani is asking you to help Scott Kaspar win the 6th Cong. Dist. nomination on June 28th | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kasparforcongress/kaspar-john-anthony-task-force-9257130?e=9931950ab1)
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
# From the desk of former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani

Dear Friend,

I'm concerned about the terrible situation we are in right now. America is at a point here in 2022 where we are going to decide if the great American experiment will succeed or fail.

You see, we are surrounded by politicians who don’t believe in the American ideal. Democrats in Illinois and Washington, D.C.—with Joe Biden as their incoherent, confused leader—are doing everything they can to destroy the constitutional fabric that has made this the greatest Republic in the history of the earth.

This is no exaggeration. We are really at the precipice of failure if we cannot turn things around: quickly! This is why I am urging you to support Scott Kaspar in the upcoming Illinois 6th Congressional District primary on June 28th.

(You can contribute to Scott's campaign [here](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=0a9f201f85&e=9931950ab1).)

I was recently in Illinois to support my friend Scott Kaspar. I have to tell you. Scott is one of the most able, capable men I’ve known. And I don’t say that lightly. Scott understands how desperate things have become. And he knows how to do what it takes in Washington to change things quickly.

Consider how bad things are here in Illinois and in Chicago and Cook County in particular. Crime is destroying families and businesses in your area. And it’s literally killing hundreds of people as well. It’s a desperate situation.

I faced a far worse problem when I was elected as Mayor of New York City in 1994. We were averaging 2200 murders per year when I took office. Violent crime and theft were out of control. But me and my administration rallied together, and we took action immediately after I took office.

We gave them the resources they needed. We didn’t hold back on that. We designed methods they could lawfully use to stop nuisance crimes which helped stem the tide of worse criminal behavior. We added cops on the street to help cover problem areas, and it worked. Violent crimes reduced by 65% and murder rates went down by 70%.

My friend and NYC Police Commissioner Bernard Kerik played a significant role in helping this change happen. We immediately took the shackles off our police officers. We gave them the freedom to do their jobs within the law and under the rules of the police department. We didn’t second guess them.
We told them to go do good and work hard to protect the people in New York City.

This was no accident. We worked hard and implemented smart ideas that stemmed the tide of crime. People began to come back to our city as tourists and for business. We thrived. It was an amazing turnaround. I didn’t do this alone. I had people like Bernie Kerik and so many others helping me.

I’ve seen the political cesspool from New York City to Washington, D.C. I spent the last few years helping my good friend President Donald Trump navigate one of the worst efforts to take down our political system I have ever witnessed. My experiences and the situations I’ve witnessed in that effort and in elected office myself will help explain why we need to send people to Washington who love America, love the values of America.

Washington isn’t restraining themselves in any way these days. They are attacking our freedoms and liberties and reshaping our very lives without our consent. We need people like Scott Kaspar to be elected to Congress because he dedicated to stopping this illegitimate process which is putting our very lives at risk.

We have a chance to save America. The chance begins on the 28th of June. The choices you make then and the choices you make in November can allow us to halt the damage being done to our great country because of Biden administration policies. Right now we are on an express train towards communism, Marxism, socialism. Our economy is a socialist economy. More people don’t pay taxes than pay taxes. The tax system is being rigged no longer to support the government but to redistribute wealth in the country.

But we take our cues from proven principles of freedom that made this the most free and prosperous nation in the history of the earth. We take our cues from the Constitution of the United State of America where “We the People” are in charge. We the People decide what’s best. And We the People are the foundation that secures the liberty of all by upholding the principles, ideals, and written promises in that sacred document of liberty.

This is why I am urging you to stand with Scott on June 28th. I hope you and our fellow Republican primary voters will send this good man to Congress. As I said, we need many Scott Kaspars in Washington who believe in America: believe in the promise of freedom that is the American ideal.

Please take some time to contribute to Scott's campaign by going to his [donation page](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=a4006b64f7&e=9931950ab1).

[I hope you’ll support Scott with as large a financial contribution as you can](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=bbd29fad46&e=9931950ab1). But even if you cannot, please take some time to [fill out this form](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=20caa63584&e=9931950ab1) to join his email list and let him know you want to help out.

I can promise you when Scott gets to Washington, he will stand for the Constitution. He will protect your liberty. And he will help restore our country to its promise of freedom and prosperity which we have enjoyed throughout our history.

Thank you,

[Read the original letter here](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=bcf1fb357c&e=9931950ab1)
### You can contribute to Kaspar for Congress by clicking [here](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=834ba61a78&e=9931950ab1).

One of our opponents, Betsy Johnson, is going to spend the bulk of the general election trying to convince voters she’s a “moderate” independent.
**But we can’t let her pull the wool over voters’ eyes.**
Betsy Johnson spent 20+ years as an elected official blocking legislation that would help Oregonians. She even earned a 100% rating from the NRA for all of her votes against gun safety.
She’s backed by corporate special interests and billionaires, and surrounds herself with right-wing activists. Recently, she was even touting support from an extreme Republican who routinely dodged questions about the results of the 2020 election, only perpetuating Trump’s "Big Lie."
Anyone who aligns themselves with conspiracy theorists and the gun lobby has no business serving as Governor of Oregon.
**That’s why we need to build a strong, inclusive grassroots movement to win.**
[**Will you rush a contribution to the campaign today? Every contribution will help build the kind of strong grassroots movement we need to elect Tina, and ensure a future of opportunity and justice for every Oregonian.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46741595/351591058/1320253387?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWQxMWM2OC1iYWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DRBRDKvIc076XHenIcH-bjUAsEjCgen7IITsBdUvVGo=)

clean_body: | Peter, we’ll get right to it: the stakes are high in this election. We can’t afford to let our opponents drag Oregon backward. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = = | = = | = = One of our opponents, Betsy Johnson, is going to spend the bulk of the general election trying to convince voters she’s a “moderate” independent. But we can’t let her pull the wool over voters’ eyes. Betsy Johnson spent 20+ years as an elected official blocking legislation that would help Oregonians. She even earned a 100% rating from the NRA for all of her votes against gun safety. She’s backed by corporate special interests and billionaires, and surrounds herself with right-wing activists. Recently, she was even touting support from an extreme Republican who routinely dodged questions about the results of the 2020 election, only perpetuating Trump’s "Big Lie." Anyone who aligns themselves with conspiracy theorists and the gun lobby has no business serving as Governor of Oregon. That’s why we need to build a strong, inclusive grassroots movement to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all that you do, — Team Tina Tina for Oregon 3321 SE 20th Portland, OR 97202 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | | Paid for by Tina for Oregon

| | **Elect a leader with a plan, elect Merritt Hale for the 6th Congressional District. **
**A Plan for Infrastructure. . .** Interstate 66 and 81 are the lifeline of the Shenandoah, Merritt plans to dedicate his platform to securing the funding needed to expand Interstate 81 and ensuring that this interstate will provide a safe corridor for residents and travelers alike. Merritt believes in growth and continued success for his constituents, which will be his main focus while in office
**A plan for Healthcare. . . ** Republican candidate Merritt Hale experienced these flaws in the American healthcare system firsthand as his father was diagnosed with degenerative brain disease in 2014 and passed away in 2021.
At that point, Merritt felt a calling to serve, not in uniform this time, but as a representative of our nation. Merritt is dedicated to making lifesaving the priority in healthcare and not profit.
**A plan for Foreign Policy. . . ** As a Navy veteran, Merritt is passionate about foreign affairs. He feels that our military power should only be forward deployed in the cases of a humanitarian crisis, genocide, or defense of an ally.

| | **Catherine Cortez Masto** has been one of my steadiest progressive allies in the U.S. Senate. She's also just been named the most vulnerable Senator in America. She just won the Nevada Democratic primary, and now the real challenge begins. Hundreds of millions of dollars from dark money groups and Republican SuperPACs have already flooded into Nevada– and more is sure to come for her opponent Adam Laxalt. **Laxalt is the worst kind of MAGA Republican. A whos-who of the radical right – including Donald Trump, Ted Cruz, and Ron DeSantis – have already endorsed him.** **[Can you chip in $3 now to keep a progressive fighter in office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46742375/351594061/-872017222?refcode=2022-06-17-masto&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=62aa1c07-bcf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmFhMWMwNy1iY2YwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H5BBfrKyBq9awDggY-vpNopF1rG9POGc8KdHxjYJxqY=)** Catherine won her first term in 2016 by a narrow margin. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Great news. Better news. BEST NEWS!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
**GREAT NEWS:** We are 10 days away from one of the last official FEC fundraising deadlines of the campaign and we’re getting closer and closer to hitting our goals.
**BETTER NEWS:** We’re doing it on the strength of lots and lots of individual donations, which is exactly how we fund this campaign because Mark is rejecting corporate PAC money.
**THE BEST NEWS:** When you fund a campaign this way, we elect people who aren’t beholden to corporate special interest groups or billionaire-funded super PACs.
But a little cause for concern: Right now our average donation is down considerably from previous months. So, if we’re going to hit this FEC goal and win, we need your help:
Normally we ask people who we’re hoping will make their first donation to chip in just $3. But today, we need to ask you to dig a little deeper — just one time. For Mark.
[**Can you please make a contribution — $10 or whatever you can afford? We file our FEC report in just 10 days and we need lots and lots of donations to reach our goals before that deadline.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june22.PHGn67&refcode=em220620-1-7&t=1&akid=3093%2E6688874%2EyL3p4j)

Here’s the deal: Tim is 10 days away from his first FEC End-of-Quarter
deadline as the official Democratic nominee for Ohio’s open Senate seat.

Yet, we’re WELL BEHIND where we need to be in order to compete with
millionaire JD Vance and his dark-money fundraising machine.

The truth is, if we don’t break out of this early “summer slump” and turn
around our fundraising numbers ASAP, we run the severe risk of getting
drowned out by the GOP’s $80 million effort to take down our campaign.

I’m not sure what else to say—other than we REALLY need your help to win
the race that will decide Senate control and defeat anti-choice,
anti-democracy extremist JD Vance.

Friends,
I know you're busy so I wanted to keep this short. Tomorrow is the Virginia primary, and if you did not get a chance to vote early, here is how to prepare to cast your ballot:
*
In-person
voting:
The
early
voting
period
began
last
month
and
ended
on
Saturday,
so
your
only
day
to
vote
is
Tuesday,
June
21st
—
tomorrow
.
Click
here
to
find
your
polling
location.
[https://www.elections.virginia.gov/casting-a-ballot/polling-place-lookup/]

*
Absentee
voting:
If
you
requested
an
absentee
ballot,
you
can:
1.
Return
your
ballot
to
your
local
registrar
by
7:00
p.m.
tomorrow.
Or,
2.
Mail
it
as
long
as
it
is
POSTMARKED
on
Election
Day,
Tuesday,
June
21st
https://www.victoriaforcongress.com/vote [https://www.victoriaforcongress.com/vote]

Victoria

EXPRESS DONATE to Victoria Virasingh for Congress
If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=june20a_10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=donea_25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=june20a_50] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=donea_100]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=june20b]

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46743107/351595912/-707005773?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGVjZDU1Yi1iZmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFQAiQaTxWfat8xo3VeaM0Hn9awgOPL2qYadNqBIu00=)
Peter,

In a moment, we’re going to ask for a **[$3 contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46743108/351595913/976319900?refcode=em-6.20.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGVjZDU1Yi1iZmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFQAiQaTxWfat8xo3VeaM0Hn9awgOPL2qYadNqBIu00=)** to our General Election effort to unseat Ken Calvert. Recent developments have put our campaign in its _strongest position yet_ , so we hope you’ll let us explain why your support is so important -- especially now:
* **According to _The Los Angeles Times_ : California is poised to “play a significant role in the battle to control the U.S. House.”** That’s in large part due to new competitive districts like ours that have emerged in 2022.

* **National Democrats have taken note of Will’s strong performance in the Primary.** If we keep up our momentum, this could mean more support in the coming months.

* **For the first time in our district’s history, registered Democrats now outnumber registered Republicans.** Calvert has never been this vulnerable in his 30-year career.

* **CA-41 will be a TOSS-UP come November.** A recent survey conducted by a third-party pollster shows our campaign neck and neck with Ken Calvert in our General Election matchup.

**[After redistricting, Calvert is one of California’s most vulnerable Republican members of Congress. We can beat him, but we need your help to do it. ---
Dear Patriot,

We send a good amount of fundraising emails, **so today we thought it was important to show you why your support is so crucial to John and this campaign.**

If you look at the chart below, you’ll see how this campaign is funded. For every large donation we receive, there are hundreds of small ones. And when it’s all said and done, most of the money we raise to re-elect John comes from folks like yourself, donating what they can, when they can.

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkkbhge4h7of9uetgrjqcvptfi9sbcamhqjvc2p0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctgm6oj2c1h2bs)
We’re extremely grateful for that, and we’d like to thank you.

What you might not know is that most of these donations come in response to emails like this.

>From the start, John hoped that people like you would come forward and support him because **John has always made sure to give a voice to the voiceless and try to bring a bit of common sense to Washington.** It's the only way he can win and Take Back The Senate.

**[Can you please make your first contribution to John Kennedy’s campaign? The only way we can reach our next big June FEC fundraising goal and Take Back The Senate is if everyone does a little bit as often as they can.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0a3r99f21tlrfsksqmt9vngi8pnhsf12usi6oh0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctgm6oj2c1h2bs)**

---
[**RUSH $100**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdthkf1ncsqimaf48hfdvfkhug1pkuum4h6s20kg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctgm6oj2c1h2bs)

[**RUSH $250**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zamjsuslkiskrvpfsdg911etbkd57sergo48l8sg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctgm6oj2c1h2bs)

Thank you so much.

This is how we fund this campaign and none of it would be possible without your support. **You are the difference between six more years of Senator Kennedy or six years of a wokarista representing Louisiana in the Senate.**

God Bless,

Team Kennedy

name: Pro Life Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmlnje6ejlmeqjnpaou9m96ju13218ik2o9fskso_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uprb9ctlc5j62s33m3gmeobimaprasb3eaoe4t73eli6acrksormecbhc9r68o77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmiqradti6pj39o5jc1jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cljm2or2c9g649fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zls3kl0cjm129rrs92b11kqcq6gjjqa73lfbdml0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctgm6oj2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs5a9aqc3oo44nen9rdae06asrv5l8af1o3a3ge0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctgm6oj2c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5e3g8f2fo08pmovmgvj89h3hsnpn6q1nc7kgv0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctgm6oj2c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zvuo8odc1cf8j902ee3eeqk3vai9ak50hp9ooplo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb4isu9m2icdi9qeq3m9o33q24jbql9ukrbv5u3o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5ctgm6oj2c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=events_update&n=1)
---
## Join Us for a Strawberry Social
Friend, Tonight at 7 pm Ralph and various other candidates will be in Berrien County for a Strawberry Social meet and greet. The address for this event is 635 Hillandale Road Benton Harbor, and you can purchase tickets for the event at the link below. 21 and under are free. | [](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWROQdXVdmAFnk6tr_gnJnpBCkUsZzdA2UIdNrUJA-0A3365WlXrCLi3awPXOWI96sxwbURX_nDkMYxuAzbnMsZLJyv3aKV2MmVPHemw3e5fVwb2lj0w2RNvvjaXOxpCA7tifiFzsyETrBtykzoXvkTLBM6xmhgF6NVDcrFj4ps4v&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=events_update&n=2 "BUY TICKETS") [BUY TICKETS](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWROQdXVdmAFnk6tr_gnJnpBCkUsZzdA2UIdNrUJA-0A3365WlXrCLi3awPXOWI96sxwbURX_nDkMYxuAzbnMsZLJyv3aKV2MmVPHemw3e5fVwb2lj0w2RNvvjaXOxpCA7tifiFzsyETrBtykzoXvkTLBM6xmhgF6NVDcrFj4ps4v&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=events_update&n=2)
---
Please join us and get your friends/family to attend also. it is important that we bring Ralph's message to as many people as possible.
**THERE ARE 43 DAYS UNTIL AUGUST 2ND**

name: Heidi St. John
subject: 10 days from now is the big day
body:
Dear Peter,

Earlier this month my campaign team set a
goal of raising $93,400 by June 30, the most important
end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the campaign.

Thanks to the generosity of my supporters in
32 states, we made a major dent in that number, raising $17,640
toward our goal.

What that means is, we still need to raise
$75,760 by the end of this month!

Our goal is within reach, but I need 4,265 of
my supporters from across the country to chip in at least $17.76
to get there.

Can you chip in at least
$17.76 right now to help us get to $93,400?

For freedom,

Heidi St. John
Republican for Congress
www.HeidiStJohnForCongress.com

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: Celebrating Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

Today, many of you have the day off in observance of Juneteenth, the anniversary of when the last of the enslaved people in Galveston, Texas learned of the Emancipation Proclamation on June 19, 1865.
On that day, and since then, our nation took giant steps forward in the fight against injustice, hate, and discrimination. Juneteenth is a reminder of our progress—and a call to action for us to continue the fight for racial equality.

Today, let us take time to celebrate all that Black Americans have achieved in the face of adversity. I hope we also recognize the ongoing legacy of racial injustice in America. With housing segregation, attacks on voting rights, a racial wealth gap, and more, we have so much more work to do.

In honor of Juneteenth, I hope you’ll join me in listening to Black Americans, learning more about the history of slavery, and committing to the fight for justice.
https://jaredforflorida.com/ [https://jaredforflorida.com/]

We’re at a pivotal moment in our nation’s history, with a rising tide of hate and division. I’m running for Congress because I believe we can do better, and I will work to help level the playing field and move us toward being a country that values liberty and justice for all Americans.

In honor of Juneteenth and every day, I hope that’s something we can all agree on. On the Broward County Commission, I’ve been working to recognize Juneteenth as an official holiday so that our
community can continue to recognize this important date for years to come.

Thank you for commemorating our progress and fighting for justice.

Jared

Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065
United States

| Friend,
I wanted to make sure you know about the 2nd DEBATE between Former Westchester County Executive ROB ASTORINO and all of the Republican candidates for governor in New York.
Tune in to your local Spectrum station TONIGHT, Monday, June 20, at 7 PM to watch the debate. If you are not a Spectrum customer you can watch the debate by live stream on [NY1.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JpGvw7RnisG_be5CJXgEeo_Su4B2o3UypGvhKEw54OQ1hgCVNvGz4uNmuYEvl16zEywEydB2u9Vdifued3CKXdvd2-ffvYfT8lZuT3e9eI3_8yWkNFR5CzJWi5aRJRCZ7l8IxGaWymY=&c=EQ1Ioo1k0Rf26uB1_5AduTHUNXv2mkfNtgSDy8JD5XWwncIDtEpKrw==&ch=OyPIAerHR5rcOw0iKOYMyyMIEn9nwIWl-2LxNkGH8CzoIkSb792SRA==) \- click on "watch live" in the upper right corner and there will be an "open access" option for you to stream it live.
[CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE DEBATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JpGvw7RnisG_be5CJXgEeo_Su4B2o3UypGvhKEw54OQ1hgCVNvGz4uNmuYEvl16zEywEydB2u9Vdifued3CKXdvd2-ffvYfT8lZuT3e9eI3_8yWkNFR5CzJWi5aRJRCZ7l8IxGaWymY=&c=EQ1Ioo1k0Rf26uB1_5AduTHUNXv2mkfNtgSDy8JD5XWwncIDtEpKrw==&ch=OyPIAerHR5rcOw0iKOYMyyMIEn9nwIWl-2LxNkGH8CzoIkSb792SRA==)
We hope you'll join us in supporting Rob Astorino for governor of New York in the REPUBLICAN PRIMARY on JUNE 28.
PLEASE MARK YOUR CALENDAR: Early voting started on JUNE 18 for the JUNE 28 REPUBLICAN PRIMARY.
Thank you,
Christina Sofia-Comer Finance Director Friends of Rob Astorino

name: =?utf-8?Q?Liz?=
subject: I want to meet you!
body:
Via Zoom | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cd1f8ed1a0fd/i-want-to-meet-you?e=e8eaba4639)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Hey Peter Willis, Over the past week, I have been taking you through this personal story of mine.

We talked about how I went through a divorce that catapulted me into politics.

We learned that you are the voice of this campaign, and my goal is always to be the voice of the people. I know that without your support, I would not get into office.

Now that you know me a little better, I want to get to know you and hear how I can help make your life better.

**I am hosting a virtual meet and greet session on Thursday, June 23rd, at 7 pm EST, and I want you to be there. **
During this call, we will discuss:
* Your concerns and needs
* What services your Representative in congress should be providing you
* What we can do together as a community to see a change
* How you can support the campaign

Are you ready to see a change for District 12 in Georgia and America? If so, what are you waiting for? Click the button below to donate and register for our virtual meet and greet. I appreciate your support and can not wait for District 12 to turn blue again! It’s been eight years since we had a Democrat in the U.S. House of Representatives from Georgia 12. That’s eight years too long! So It's Time WE change that! Click the button below to donate. Donating will give you access to a special invite-only registration link.
---
| [Let's Meet!](https://lizjohnsonforus.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4a0fd0913238344008dfe952&id=4c1c53a019&e=e8eaba4639 "Let's Meet!")
---
| Your donation will go through immediately if you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express! If you have any questions or concerns, don't hesitate to contact me. You can reach me via email at [Info@LizJohnsonForUs.com](mailto:Info@LizJohnsonForUs.com) or on my personal cell phone at 678-631-9214. Thanks for fighting alongside me at moments like these — I appreciate you. With much gratitude, Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson
**Lizjohnsonforus.com**
---
|
---
|
---

So please, make a contribution to help a Pro-Trump Navy SEAL FIGHT BACK against Soros' favorite RINO - Mitch McConnell - and their latest wave of vile attacks. Fellow Conservative,

My name is Alek Skarlatos and I'm asking for just a couple moments of your time today as I work to re-introduce myself to conservatives around the nation.

This is my story.

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day.

In 2020 I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality a long ago.**My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism** , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need.

Last May I launched my second campaign for Congress and today I’m asking if you’ll consider supporting me with a financial contribution to my U.S. House campaign.

But it won’t be easy. While my 2020 opponent opted to retire instead of facing a rematch against me, my new Bernie Sanders-style-opponent has already begun to lie about me and what I stand for.

I received an email last week that frankly was just chalked full of claims that my opponent (who has never met me) couldn’t possibly know to be true. She calls me a “**union-buster** ,” a “**climate-change-denier** ,” and a “**Big-Lie-believer**.”

My opponent knows that I’m a threat and she’s looking to paint me as an extreme out-of-touch puppet being controlled by party heads in D.C. That couldn’t be further from the truth. I’ve been telling you that this day would come for some time now - and now that day has finally arrived.

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: this Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
Peter,

This weekend, we celebrated Juneteenth — a commemoration of the end of slavery and a celebration of Black Americans' relentless commitment to liberation and joy. Throughout the history of our country, fearless, bold Black leaders have fought for freedom and justice, working to make our nation a place that lives up to the values Americans hold as our North Star.

But even today, 157 years after the abolition of slavery, our society and our country continue to grapple with its enduring legacy. We see it in the income disparities between Black and white families, widened by generations of racist policies and segregation. We see it in hospitals when mothers arrive to deliver their babies. We see it in the differences in how we treat those struggling with the opioid epidemic.

As senator, I promise to work to make sure that we do better; that we raise our children to build an inclusive, equitable future; that we never turn our back on this critical work; and that we ensure every family has a fair shot at their American Dream.

I hope that you find time to celebrate the immeasurable contributions from the Black community, honor the work of Black leaders and liberators, and acknowledge the work left to be done. I need you in this with me, Peter, to build a better future for all Missourians.

With gratitude and hope,

Trudy

clean_body: Peter, This weekend, we celebrated Juneteenth — a commemoration of the end of slavery and a celebration of Black Americans' relentless commitment to liberation and joy. Throughout the history of our country, fearless, bold Black leaders have fought for freedom and justice, working to make our nation a place that lives up to the values Americans hold as our North Star. But even today, 157 years after the abolition of slavery, our society and our country continue to grapple with its enduring legacy. We see it in the income disparities between Black and white families, widened by generations of racist policies and segregation. We see it in hospitals when mothers arrive to deliver their babies. We see it in the differences in how we treat those struggling with the opioid epidemic. As senator, I promise to work to make sure that we do better; that we raise our children to build an inclusive, equitable future; that we never turn our back on this critical work; and that we ensure every family has a fair shot at their American Dream. I hope that you find time to celebrate the immeasurable contributions from the Black community, honor the work of Black leaders and liberators, and acknowledge the work left to be done. I need you in this with me, Peter, to build a better future for all Missourians. With gratitude and hope, Trudy

name: Dan Kildee for Congress
subject: Dan is bringing home funding for mid-Michigan’s infrastructure projects
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| | **Take our Infrastructure Survey!**
**[Tell us your thoughts!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46748961/351602167/-701254986?refcode=DK_EM_SV_3MO_20220620_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkYjRkNC1jM2YwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uj1XXMv34QScEUyvkrIXbjFpzNV6xM9VdcSB1r_ykuM=&emci=86399337-16e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a8ddb4d4-c3f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=31479900)**
---

Earlier in the month, Dan invited Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg to Saginaw, where they toured Lake State Railway Company and highlighted new federal investments as a part of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. Our railroads are a crucial link in our supply chains, helping to transport raw materials, agricultural products and goods to businesses and Michiganders.

**Thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, mid-Michigan has already seen the creation of good-paying jobs rebuilding roads, repairing bridges, replacing lead pipes, and improving railroads. And with these key investments, Dan and Democrats are working to strengthen supply chain issues to lower costs for mid-Michigan families and get products to consumers faster.**

The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law delivered over $10 billion in new infrastructure funding to Michigan. Across Michigan, roads are being repaired, pipes are being replaced, and transit systems are being strengthened.

**[Dan wants to know: What infrastructure investments in Michigan are most critical to you and your family? Take our short, two-minute survey now to tell Dan.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46748962/351602168/-701254986?refcode=DK_EM_SV_3MO_20220620_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkYjRkNC1jM2YwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uj1XXMv34QScEUyvkrIXbjFpzNV6xM9VdcSB1r_ykuM=&emci=86399337-16e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a8ddb4d4-c3f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=31479900)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46748963/351602169/-701254986?refcode=DK_EM_SV_3MO_20220620_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkYjRkNC1jM2YwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uj1XXMv34QScEUyvkrIXbjFpzNV6xM9VdcSB1r_ykuM=&emci=86399337-16e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a8ddb4d4-c3f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=31479900)**
Thanks to Dan and a bipartisan group of Democratic and Republican lawmakers, communities all across the country are benefiting from the investments made in the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. For shipping groups like Lake State Railway Company, these investments are making work safer, more efficient, and more reliable for the communities they serve.

**And this is just the beginning. The investments in our nation’s infrastructure will be felt for years to come thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. And we want to know what you and your family are most looking forward to seeing right here in Michigan.**

Please, take our short, two-minute survey now to let us know.

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/spring-infrastructure](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46748964/351602170/-701254986?refcode=DK_EM_SV_3MO_20220620_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkYjRkNC1jM2YwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uj1XXMv34QScEUyvkrIXbjFpzNV6xM9VdcSB1r_ykuM=&emci=86399337-16e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a8ddb4d4-c3f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=31479900)**

Thanks,
Dan Kildee for Congress

Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. clean_body: | | Take our Infrastructure Survey! Earlier in the month, Dan invited Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg to Saginaw, where they toured Lake State Railway Company and highlighted new federal investments as a part of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. Our railroads are a crucial link in our supply chains, helping to transport raw materials, agricultural products and goods to businesses and Michiganders. Thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, mid-Michigan has already seen the creation of good-paying jobs rebuilding roads, repairing bridges, replacing lead pipes, and improving railroads. And with these key investments, Dan and Democrats are working to strengthen supply chain issues to lower costs for mid-Michigan families and get products to consumers faster. The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law delivered over $10 billion in new infrastructure funding to Michigan. Across Michigan, roads are being repaired, pipes are being replaced, and transit systems are being strengthened. Thanks to Dan and a bipartisan group of Democratic and Republican lawmakers, communities all across the country are benefiting from the investments made in the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. For shipping groups like Lake State Railway Company, these investments are making work safer, more efficient, and more reliable for the communities they serve. And this is just the beginning. The investments in our nation’s infrastructure will be felt for years to come thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. And we want to know what you and your family are most looking forward to seeing right here in Michigan. Please, take our short, two-minute survey now to let us know. Thanks, Dan Kildee for Congress Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: Republicans are terrified of Cheri Beasley because they know she can win.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
It's because they’ve seen all of the data that makes one thing very clear: Cheri Beasley can win.
#

Let’s be clear about something: National Republicans are terrified of Cheri Beasley.
They know Cheri’s won statewide twice -- including 2014 which was one of the toughest midterms for Democrats.
They know she has a proven ability to earn support from rural and urban communities across the state -- and that in 2020 she earned more votes than even Thom Tillis.
That’s right -- Cheri earned more votes than our current Senator.
And there’s a reason that Senate Republicans’ top two super PACs plan to spend more on ads here than all but one other race. That’s right – they are spending the second-highest amount right here in North Carolina to try to stop us and hold this seat.
That tells you that Republicans know this race is incredibly competitive – and that all the data shows that Cheri Beasley can win.
[**So please, if you’re ready to expand the majority, donate $3 right now to invest in a proven winner who can flip North Carolina for Democrats in November.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220620-1-ma&refcode2=1069.357359.J_2Jl-&t=1&akid=1069%2E357359%2EJ_2Jl-)

body:
if we fail... |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46750628/351602957/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220620_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmVkN2U5Mi1jNWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWD9HYFJwZQkOkr43ixgdKeDsfNr0KiKtznQE5aoxZY=)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Millionaires and billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Please make sure we have the money necessary to compete and win.
On June 30th, we’ll publicly report everything we’ve raised.
It’ll be the first time in many months that the people of Texas will see the kind of resources we have, and they’ll make a determination of whether this campaign is possible — whether we have the money necessary to reach voters who are going to decide the outcome of this election.
We want to make sure we have a very, very strong showing — especially because we know that Greg Abbott will be able to reach out to millionaires and billionaires who have largely funded his campaign thus far.
Against that, we have folks who are willing to pitch in $15, $25, or $50 at a time, and we want you to be among them.

That’s why I went through specialized, high-intensity training to become a Green Beret – so I could be fully prepared to take on America’s enemies and defend our freedom.

Now, I'm facing enemies at home, but I need a different kind of team to defeat them.

**Socialism is a cancer that’s eating away at the fibers of democracy, and I’m determined to stop it. **

name: John King
subject: Education saves lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Of all the things my dad taught me, throughout my life and career not only have I held dear his long standing belief, but I’ve proven it myself to be true: education saves lives.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46752411/351603870/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220620-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220620-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220620&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=45b710fc-c6f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWI3MTBmYy1jNmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hXfTZ1HerQzciS-U_CoP2xKpfgcoz2ROJfvd1tL2iIY=)
---
| Peter, **Of all the things my dad taught me before he passed away, to this day the most important lesson has always been: education saves lives.** If you have a moment, I’d like to tell you a story about my father, John King Sr., who served as New York City's first Black deputy superintendent. Or if you aren’t able to read this right now, I hope you’ll consider pitching in a contribution to support our campaign: _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_siri_em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46752413/351603871/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220620-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220620-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220620&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=45b710fc-c6f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWI3MTBmYy1jNmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hXfTZ1HerQzciS-U_CoP2xKpfgcoz2ROJfvd1tL2iIY=)**_ When I was very young, my dad would always tell me about a time early in his teaching career when he broke his wrist playing in a basketball game on a weekend. On the following Monday, when he came in to teach his class, the school principal told him to go home because there was some sort of rule that you couldn’t teach with a cast on. My father calmly went over to the counter in the main office, smashed the cast on the counter, brushed the pieces in the trash, put his hand in his pocket, and continued to teach his class. Broken wrist or not, my dad wasn’t going to let his students miss a single day of learning on his account. **Whenever someone in our family said something was too hard or too difficult, my dad would tell that story.** For him, the most important thing he could do that day and any day thereafter was to be in his classroom with his students. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46752414/351603872/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220620-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220620-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220620&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=45b710fc-c6f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWI3MTBmYy1jNmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hXfTZ1HerQzciS-U_CoP2xKpfgcoz2ROJfvd1tL2iIY=) **“Dr. John King to be Named Associate Superintendent — First of Race in Job”**
_ The New York Times, July 21, 1959_ It’s the passion and belief in students of educators like my dad that inspired me to become a teacher myself. Education saves lives because of those who provide it, and when I had the privilege to serve as U.S. Secretary of Education under President Obama, I worked hard to ensure teachers, education support professionals, and everyone who makes education possible got the recognition they deserve. Now, I continue to look up to my dad and all the amazing educators in my life as inspiration for this campaign for governor. But I can’t win this race without your support, Peter. _**[Please, can I count on you to donate $5 to our grassroots movement to bring real progress to Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46752415/351603873/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220620-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220620-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220620&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=5&refcode2=45b710fc-c6f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWI3MTBmYy1jNmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hXfTZ1HerQzciS-U_CoP2xKpfgcoz2ROJfvd1tL2iIY=)**_ | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46752416/351603874/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220620-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220620-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220620&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=5&refcode2=45b710fc-c6f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWI3MTBmYy1jNmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hXfTZ1HerQzciS-U_CoP2xKpfgcoz2ROJfvd1tL2iIY=)

clean_body: Of all the things my dad taught me, throughout my life and career not only have I held dear his long standing belief, but I’ve proven it myself to be true: education saves lives. | = | Peter, Of all the things my dad taught me before he passed away, to this day the most important lesson has always been: education saves lives. If you have a moment, I’d like to tell you a story about my father, John King Sr., who served as New York City's first Black deputy superintendent. Or if you aren’t able to read this right now, I hope you’ll consider pitching in a contribution to support our campaign: = When I was very young, my dad would always tell me about a time early in his teaching career when he broke his wrist playing in a basketball game on a weekend. On the following Monday, when he came in to teach his class, the school principal told him to go home because there was some sort of rule that you couldn’t teach with a cast on. My father calmly went over to the counter in the main office, smashed the cast on the counter, brushed the pieces in the trash, put his hand in his pocket, and continued to teach his class. Broken wrist or not, my dad wasn’t going to let his students miss a single day of learning on his account. Whenever someone in our family said something was too hard or too difficult, my dad would tell that story. For him, the most important thing he could do that day and any day thereafter was to be in his classroom with his students. = “Dr. John King to be Named Associate Superintendent — First of Race in Job” The New York Times, July 21, 1959 It’s the passion and belief in students of educators like my dad that inspired me to become a teacher myself. Education saves lives because of those who provide it, and when I had the privilege to serve as U.S. Secretary of Education under President Obama, I worked hard to ensure teachers, education support professionals, and everyone who makes education possible got the recognition they deserve. Now, I continue to look up to my dad and all the amazing educators in my life as inspiration for this campaign for governor. But I can’t win this race without your support, Peter. = | | = I’m respectfully asking you to join scores of teachers, public school parents, and education leaders who agree it’s time for a teacher in the governor’s mansion. I know that together, we can create lasting and positive change. With gratitude, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Laurie Teper
subject: First Amendment Rights Threatened in Orange County
body:
Team Geels,
If you haven't already heard about this, please read below. I am asking everyone and anyone to attend the Orange County Board of Commissioners meeting TOMORROW NIGHT, TUESDAY, JUNE 21. If you can, meet at 6:30pm to PEACEFULLY protest outside the Whitted Building, 300 W. Tryon St in Hillsborough. Then at 7:00, sign up to speak (limited to 3 minutes) or be present to support those who are speaking out. Each person is allowed 3 minutes to speak, so practice and time yourself and they are limiting public comment to one hour total.
The discussion about regulating gatherings on 6/2/22 begins at 39:00 and lasts for 1 hour at this link:
_[https://orange-nc.granicus.com/player/clip/1568?view_id=2&redirect=true](https://orange-nc.granicus.com/player/clip/1568?view_id=2&redirect=true)_
The complete agenda for 6/21 is at this link:
_<http://server3.co.orange.nc.us:8088/WebLink/0/doc/67774/Page1.aspx>_
This is from David Ogden, [ocstruth.org](http://ocstruth.org):
The Orange County Board of Commissioners will vote on a regulation that is an unequivocal and sweeping violation of the First Amendment rights of every Orange County Citizen.

The First Amendment states: _**Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof; or abridging the freedom of speech, or of the press; or the right of the people peaceably to assemble, and to petition the Government for a redress of grievances.**_
The new regulation the board is voting on (see attachment) will make it illegal for: _**one or more persons to gather for any common purpose including but not limited to vigil, protest, observation, demonstration, or other action which promotes or objects to a person, policy, political candidate, issue, or action.**_
This regulation, which may be adopted TOMORROW night, will apply to anyone gathering for any purpose on or within 1,000 feet of any school property or any playground in Orange County.
This means that in Orange County:
* It will be illegal for parents to gather at a school property for the common purpose of discussing school policies, asking questions about events that have occurred, speaking about ideas for improvement, or raising questions about policies or actions they disagree with. According to the law, these types of actions would constitute a violation: **gathering to promote, or object to, an issue or action.**
* Likewise, it will be illegal for an individual parent to come on or near school grounds, to either support or object to the actions of any teacher or administrator or to support or object to any issue at their child's school. According to the law, this type of action would constitute a violation: **one or more persons acting to promote or object to a person, policy, issue, or action.**
* It will be illegal for a family, or group of neighbors, to gather at Gold Park for a Fourth of July Celebration. According to the law, this type of action would constitute a violation: **gathering to promote the issue of Liberty.**
* In the event of the sudden loss of a beloved individual, it will be illegal for the community to hold a vigil or observation to support each other and grieve on or near school property or at/near parks with playgrounds. According to the law, this type of action would constitute a violation: **gathering to vigil and gathering to promote a person.**

This law violates our fundamental rights:
* By abridging the **freedom of speech**
* By abridging the **right of the people peaceably to assemble**
* By abridging the **right of the people to petition the Government for a redress of grievances**

While this law would be egregious if passed... if we allow it to pass, we’re opening the door to our county government enhancing the law to prevent freedom of speech and assembly on any government or public property.
Unlike recent school board policies that were quietly passed without the knowledge of most of the community, we have a chance to make our voices heard before this law passes.
We must do everything we can to prevent this. **Can you please do ALL THREE of these actions?**
1. **Write a short email** , as soon as you can, to the Board of Commissioners. Time is limited to reach them before the meeting, so please email them now letting them know how you feel about the law they are proposing. Send the email to: [ocbocc@orangecountync.gov](mailto:ocbocc@orangecountync.gov). Please copy [ocstruthorg@gmail.com](mailto:ocstruthorg@gmail.com) and _[momsforlibertyocs@yahoo.com](mailto:momsforlibertyocs@yahoo.com)_ as well, as this can help create accountability.
2. **Create a “Written Comment”** that will be made part of the record during the upcoming meeting on Tuesday. Your comment can have the same statement as your email to the Board of Commissioners. Send your written comment to: [ocpubliccomment@orangecountync.gov](mailto:ocpubliccomment@orangecountync.gov). Again, please copy [ocstruthorg@gmail.com](mailto:ocstruthorg@gmail.com) and _[momsforlibertyocs@yahoo.com](mailto:momsforlibertyocs@yahoo.com)_ so that we can ensure all written comments are properly added to the record.
3. For now, we’re still free to gather in Orange County. **Come to the board meeting** tomorrow night at 6:30 to protest and at 7 p.m. to speak or support those who are speaking at the Whitted Building at 300 W. Tryon St. and to support your constitutional rights. Consider sharing the message you have sent as a public comment during the meeting.

_**This** _** _is a time where our community needs to act!_** Please take the time today to help prevent our rights from being stripped away.
Please email David at ___[ocstruthorg@gmail.com](mailto:ocstruthorg@gmail.com)_ if you have questions about this process, the proposed regulation, or how to do any of the actions.

I would add one more thing:
* **If voting locations are on school property, does that mean poll workers cannot be there?**

**Please consider any or all of the above 3 action steps. The sooner you email, the better! In other words, do it now!**
**
**
__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__

Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

Please copy mailto:ocstruthorg@gmail.com and mailto:momsforlibertyocs@yahoo.com as well, as this can help create accountability. 2. Create a “Written Comment” that will be made part of the record during the upcoming meeting on Tuesday. Your comment can have the same statement as your email to the Board of Commissioners. Send your written comment to: mailto:ocpubliccomment@orangecountync.gov. Again, please copy mailto:ocstruthorg@gmail.com and mailto:momsforlibertyocs@yahoo.com so that we can ensure all written comments are properly added to the record. 3. For now, we’re still free to gather in Orange County. Come to the board meeting tomorrow night at 6:30 to protest and at 7 p.m. to speak or support those who are speaking at the Whitted Building at 300 W. Tryon St. and to support your constitutional rights. Consider sharing the message you have sent as a public comment during the meeting. This is a time where our community needs to act! Please take the time today to help prevent our rights from being stripped away. Please email David at mailto:ocstruthorg@gmail.com if you have questions about this process, the proposed regulation, or how to do any of the actions. I would add one more thing: If voting locations are on school property, does that mean poll workers cannot be there? Please consider any or all of the above 3 action steps. The sooner you email, the better! In other words, do it now! Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together! Laurie Teper Volunteer Coordinator Courtney Geels for Congress NC04 Email: mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com Cell: (847)212-5651

She's probably right, _except_ with it comes to HER Time tote bags. Because carrying these with you could _never_ be a mistake.

body:
I could not be more grateful for the life I have in the greatest country on Earth, and I’m proud to share that life with many of you.| | | Fellow American, I’m a Green beret veteran, a business owner, and a proud husband and father. I could not be more grateful for the life I have in the greatest country on Earth, and I’m proud to share that life with many of you by running for office. _But right now, the far-left wants to take that American Dream away from us. _ I’ve seen the darkest corners of the world, where people can only imagine the freedoms we have in America. That’s why it infuriates me to see **extreme leftists dismantle our American way of life**. Socialism isn’t flashy or fun - it’s a one-way path to violence, depression, and censorship. I’m building my A-team to stop them in their tracks and TAKE BACK THE HOUSE before the Democrats can destroy _everything we love._ [**Pitch in ANY amount today and join my A-team to DEFEAT THE RADICAL LEFT once and for all this November.**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=45c64b003d954c4a83b3d2390587cc5d&_e=WOSC-LrZh02vUhSQ61PMcICqDDmlaa6lekQ0m55gFytXM7I8gkmT1XfzkNbb2SW5qvTsjiaJ0CosSCQeT0kZPqJztVJEkUdp7-zaW4CCtYIhDtYxbIZLQyxXkUU4pOHWSswY3_nBJ3ACV9aCCzEm78PLGGS2jEJPMDTMNjvUCCMuGy7TK0AbDTRjbsiso8p_MXeXTcvpB51F1C9Ype8O1L6DDqAIDLIHJHEhl5UZRbXQYZuW61IDXnDT7e958d7bm4mOdNv08arNFcSU9FfiXBZTycL85PySlU7_H7rgeTrH6lPVKkrgEyH9lrNl8KMbqreO28quZrqq8AHGRNYnbxY6JXd8QvTo_wLA-ytKVoF6fTqNCiIVt5074RtNTlfpNFH65yNgZlQLrkPozM8hnWXI1nVQI4Vtf2DAfKiTkhc%3D)

I could not be more grateful for the life I have in the greatest country on Earth, and I’m proud to share that life with many of you by running for office. But right now, the far-left wants to take that American Dream away from us. I’ve seen the darkest corners of the world, where people can only imagine the freedoms we have in America. That’s why it infuriates me to see extreme leftists dismantle our American way of life. Socialism isn’t flashy or fun - it’s a one-way path to violence, depression, and censorship. I’m building my A-team to stop them in their tracks and TAKE BACK THE HOUSE before the Democrats can destroy everything we love. In service, | | | | | Pat Harrigan Special Forces Green Beret | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: The Biden Burden
subject: America can’t take anymore

And Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats are continuing to hand him and endless pile of blank checks to make our out of control inflation, crime, and illegal immigration even _worse._

Americans need solutions, and we won’t get them unless we take back the House.

name: Kirsten HQ
subject: Republican PACs are POURING money into this race...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Between the Congressional Leadership PAC and the NRCC, MILLIONS of dollars worth of airtime have already been reserved in Kirsten's district.
Kirsten supports comprehensive immigration reform, including a pathway to citizenship and protection for our DREAMers. So they'll call her an open-border liberal.
Kirsten supports background checks and red flag laws to help address our nation's gun violence epidemic. So they'll say she's coming after your guns.
Kirsten supports abortion rights and reproductive freedom for everyone . So — well, you can fill in the blank.
We know that's not who Kirsten is or what she stands for. She's a mom, a U of A law school professor, and a former state senator with an impressive record of fighting for Arizona families. And friends, the GOP is scared to death of her. They know this district has a long history of supporting strong women like Kirsten, and they're going to try to buy this seat.
Will you help us fight back against attacks by Republican Super PACs by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_062022_NRCC]

Thank you!
— Kirsten HQ
Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a State Legislator who has spent the past 5 years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.

Peter,

My name is Alek Skarlatos and I'm asking for just a couple moments of your time today as I work to re-introduce myself to conservatives around the nation.

This is my story.

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day.

In 2020 I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality a long ago.**My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism** , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need.

Last May I launched my second campaign for Congress and today I’m asking if you’ll consider supporting me with a financial contribution to my U.S. House campaign.

[** CHIP IN $3 ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=953e9ba5514645e4946dd71c27233c21&_e=aNWAAj6cgLIDOiPfERkXTrnzUShBes93Re9i6k2J1XryLXmx9CZL-iTsWQ7fXfDOZcs-JjgGTeIuST_BR0CtmPx6534Drkkar9E5-Afh7ln9qxdBlAeE3Tk-85uiLN5jzVvHc6B7nlZcu8oehppLJyj9qpItRCH4WXiy5ndLyyNmzOKy8lzXpFDatJ7t16OyRQMZPfK1Xo2oCtColCei3ijp5iNzYJ5D-Ztd7DLmVk2EMNDIVvKvez_5yqYcnfKU66cN9peRSrHJglASrY77og7tfWIbJR1FqxSLoePBvutVnZxmN0cgOO4KacLILhcg3dxJT1QtSOvCUYq4Vd2UjPIDuufxHQhW-A0Lu6R0XLUTAPimMEs3uctkLWNnyCfXjH77fTOcgDljG8Rx_1x58kNzuKlPamGA_Gh5lClSc-FSplnU4rgtbi9DgGm_-iC8s2Wkoda_yIas_reiXiFmGIzd_003jJf_Z3ij2eme_7vcn0MAoFJ5WhwG1owDP-YL)

**[Will you please consider a gift of $5, $10, $25, or even $250 today to help me ensure my campaign is adequately funded? Right now, we simply do not have the cash to compete against Pelosi’s handpicked candidate](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=953e9ba5514645e4946dd71c27233c21&_e=aNWAAj6cgLIDOiPfERkXTrnzUShBes93Re9i6k2J1XryLXmx9CZL-iTsWQ7fXfDOZcs-JjgGTeIuST_BR0CtmPx6534Drkkar9E5-Afh7ln9qxdBlAeE3Tk-85uiLN5jzVvHc6B7nlZcu8oehppLJyj9qpItRCH4WXiy5ndLyyNmzOKy8lzXpFDatJ7t16OyRQMZPfK1Xo2oCtColCei3ijp5iNzYJ5D-Ztd7DLmVk2EMNDIVvKvez_5yqYcnfKU66cN9peRSrHJglASrY77ohakNR83YUFlUI4UMU-k41WuyDf8dKD8qG5GTIEmwRXBgj3dO3HmhQjEMpCH0PCsVQUYbp98b3XFqOeor7HT4rNTer3xEyoPlzLEfly4cGEi4i-ydbU1zmKGzJj1XSiS_vEqIcgNWoJxE74HiGy5tnQ-WEEsdJ3aTRu8pbn7nmIjiT3w5Qr8G_oUsvdlP_8TShem14Vi8bX4OmEprQDnk5E0JNo9q4v915jbACTJ0RwF)**.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=953e9ba5514645e4946dd71c27233c21&_e=aNWAAj6cgLIDOiPfERkXTrnzUShBes93Re9i6k2J1XryLXmx9CZL-iTsWQ7fXfDOZcs-JjgGTeIuST_BR0CtmPx6534Drkkar9E5-Afh7ln9qxdBlAeE3Tk-85uiLN5jzVvHc6B7nlZcu8oehppLJyj9qpItRCH4WXiy5ndLyyNmzOKy8lzXpFDatJ7t16OyRQMZPfK1Xo2oCtColCei3ijp5iNzYJ5D-Ztd7DLmVk2EMNDIVvKvez_5yqYcnfKUlAO7HhTyWM6-kO_HJBfA1zWuILs6YM2gHRFPjXQi82fdxTO4XL0_G-WgvDK8wok9zbBcrGzWj4p_IToVXnS4aVKWuoLcixc_gBnk2EkcSZrPdcq_0X0yttR-4vB7gmZB0G19sBz5d7Y90c3eV5Ot155LFVnsEqaabSJl4IqYdutz5FBf-7LqB8I_GiltGFuUPtG5y83BMmtHJKxYU6Hzbym5WPQhhRV7-Ni1qJzmlVA%3D)
In 2020, Nancy Pelosi and her super PAC spent nearly $6 million to save the DEM incumbent and smear my good name. Pelosi won that battle as I narrowly lost my race. But I’m here to tell you today: I’m going to win the war.

But it won’t be easy. While my 2020 opponent opted to retire instead of facing a rematch against me, my new Bernie Sanders-style-opponent has already begun to lie about me and what I stand for.

I received an email last week that frankly was just chalked full of claims that my opponent (who has never met me) couldn’t possibly know to be true. She calls me a “**union-buster** ,” a “**climate-change-denier** ,” and a “**Big-Lie-believer**.”

My opponent knows that I’m a threat and she’s looking to paint me as an extreme out-of-touch puppet being controlled by party heads in D.C. That couldn’t be further from the truth. I’ve been telling you that this day would come for some time now - and now that day has finally arrived.

I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington.

**[Will you lend your support to my fight by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or another amount today?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=953e9ba5514645e4946dd71c27233c21&_e=aNWAAj6cgLIDOiPfERkXTrnzUShBes93Re9i6k2J1XryLXmx9CZL-iTsWQ7fXfDOZcs-JjgGTeIuST_BR0CtmPx6534Drkkar9E5-Afh7ln9qxdBlAeE3Tk-85uiLN5jzVvHc6B7nlZcu8oehppLJyj9qpItRCH4WXiy5ndLyyNmzOKy8lzXpFDatJ7t16OyRQMZPfK1Xo2oCtColCei3ijp5iNzYJ5D-Ztd7DLmVk2EMNDIVvKvez_5yqYcnfKUlAO7HhTyWM6-kO_HJBfA12gk-c5GAlcqUjF1GKE5tT2zRzlokpdp8IV8MuEfMTYP9t-nRKB0TWiC1NgsdsyA6U4yKrwFPKnO-GkvkGQ-Se2OfYpIvlyo9bCrY4AI8gIxi9cxq3FP6n08W3is-g4GYSrqh_xXfsL9hOyt_u3NYFObZxgLfKAJX2GZuZSEBNk6b2sFhMej6onZz-mfP45q_hky40jIPdZO1ZSOAMYjjk4%3D)**

[** CHIP IN $3 ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=953e9ba5514645e4946dd71c27233c21&_e=aNWAAj6cgLIDOiPfERkXTrnzUShBes93Re9i6k2J1XryLXmx9CZL-iTsWQ7fXfDOZcs-JjgGTeIuST_BR0CtmPx6534Drkkar9E5-Afh7ln9qxdBlAeE3Tk-85uiLN5jzVvHc6B7nlZcu8oehppLJyj9qpItRCH4WXiy5ndLyyNmzOKy8lzXpFDatJ7t16OyRQMZPfK1Xo2oCtColCei3ijp5iNzYJ5D-Ztd7DLmVk2EMNDIVvKvez_5yqYcnfKU66cN9peRSrHJglASrY77og7tfWIbJR1FqxSLoePBvutvmxzIiXCWmtqBNI2KVNLzNjpY7M6bD2Q6xZq_KCYLw0KANcVmUssgoJQoTdzt_FU9tMtPKBGENBrcqFtld-hgFYfnTisG_376x9wmhfvRrkFU1p1BSt_uLJIAn86WkQCPVbXk5MAtB9-GSFEhYLf1lWicx2LjgAINKeDVhGvZgiCK42q3Zf425zaPm6oE5_b-dJxepSwSDBIzee-Mjul9)

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. **[I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=953e9ba5514645e4946dd71c27233c21&_e=aNWAAj6cgLIDOiPfERkXTrnzUShBes93Re9i6k2J1XryLXmx9CZL-iTsWQ7fXfDOZcs-JjgGTeIuST_BR0CtmPx6534Drkkar9E5-Afh7ln9qxdBlAeE3Tk-85uiLN5jzVvHc6B7nlZcu8oehppLJyj9qpItRCH4WXiy5ndLyyNmzOKy8lzXpFDatJ7t16OyRQMZPfK1Xo2oCtColCei3ijp5iNzYJ5D-Ztd7DLmVk2EMNDIVvKvez_5yqYcnfKUlAO7HhTyWM6-kO_HJBfA122nuazrE334N3Kll9ZHkXMrFMTOd7PYQHEYjPNzv_9hJgq-CF3B5K-g5gqL2rOTQ4AuEdCi0ftcehPkQrkXRoRQp88vKjEmN4s4ntaE9gye279H-Gnp7IUECkrh0zCrPuVYlvtU_kXAlXB8UGCH_toA5x8FWrNPXqOlU2VECXB9iv-PTMNviSaL5D4JtuvP6GnO9LW0dEoqsgDJvR0lHIE%3D)**

Thank you,
