name: Patriot Marketplace
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.-RlgNchw)
---
| | Dear Friend, Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and against capitalism.
---
| [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace._L2_wLRphU25pWx_g)
---
| | **But do they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and capitalism?** This is _precisely_ why we put together this brand new eBook, **[_The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_](http://trk.patriotmarketplace._Agvs9SxAh2MA)**[](http://trk.patriotmarketplace._mB-CNCdDPVn-dmpPdaOnQ), from Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson. This eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in conjunction with _The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism_. This project provides objective and scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and well-being. I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political leaders. **[Simply click here to request your free copy of _The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_.](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.)** Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNzEtYzkzZTQzZDc1ZGM0NGY1OWFjYzk2ZGVjNWRhYTRjNWQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/QuRqXVlz1h2-T52PwFLZcg) to unsubscribe.
---

Friend, taking back the House from the woke mob has never been more important. [**Will you step up? We only need FIVE seats and my race is ONE of the only seats that can win the House back for the GOP.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63796%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xsx03ekiG%2bMPJD7byhFw3w&sysid=1)

This is a crucial time, Friend.

The failed Leftists in D.C. will spend **RECORD AMOUNTS** this cycle to keep their power. They are going to spend _**MILLIONS**_ to silence me, all because they know that this is a battle that I won’t back down from. [**This is why I’m humbly asking for your support.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63798%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XDaVFrlztkSRopb%2fDL5VkQ&sysid=1)

[**If just 75 more America First Patriots step up in the next hour by chipping in just $3, we will have the support we need. However, without grassroots support from Patriots like YOU, Friend, we are going to lose the House for good.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63799%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5D3D671L8mViM0h9laP8zA&sysid=1)
****

**[RUSH $3 HERE](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63790%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pagd2OowJjHdR5yMz8aVxQ&sysid=1)**

I’m counting on you, Friend, I truly hope you will come through.

body:
| Dear Peter, WE ARE SO CLOSE TO WINNING THIS THING! ...the feedback we are getting from our canvassing is amazing. We need your help though! There is only one more week of the campaign. Three things: The best way you can help us is by texting or calling registered Republican voters in the 1st District and encouraging them to vote for us. If you would like to help, please email Austin at austin@badger2022.com. Austin will then send you 50x names & numbers that you can text or call to help encourage them to vote for us. We will also send a one pager with key points for the campaign around me & my platform that you can use. Also, please be sure to keep up telling your own friends, family & neighbors in the district, even if it's just to encourage them to visit my website (Badger2022.com). **Second we have regular honk & waves across the counties that you can join!** You will see these posted not the county volunteer chat lists & later today on my Facebook page. **Finally if you can please continue to donate**(and encourage others to do so as well) this really helps us keep up the digital advertising to get our message out. Even just another $50 dollars really helps. | [](https://www.badger2022.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_1gm78VGb5E5Uw83FMAL0I8d-3A1Yo1__XTl--y7k6h7CBTYdDjy8F7BkcuwwX2pcppcoqEkcc1nHdxDA1Jx7xI&e=51766ec46a0196629bb5b9bba5bfa850&utm_source=andrewbadger&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_last_week_2&n=1 "Donate now") [Donate now](https://www.badger2022.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_1gm78VGb5E5Uw83FMAL0I8d-3A1Yo1__XTl--y7k6h7CBTYdDjy8F7BkcuwwX2pcppcoqEkcc1nHdxDA1Jx7xI&e=51766ec46a0196629bb5b9bba5bfa850&utm_source=andrewbadger&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_last_week_2&n=1)

name: Mike Naig, Secretary of Agriculture
subject: Come on out to the Feenstra Family Picnic!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Feenstra for Congress
body:
June 30th!

|

Hey friend,

As you know, agriculture is the backbone of our economy in Iowa. **Iowa’s 4th district is lucky to be represented by a true champion for farmers, Congressman Randy Feenstra.**

At the end of the month, I’m honored to be attending his annual Feenstra Family Picnic with many of our fellow family farmers, and I hope to see you there!!
[](http://links.feenstraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=70b938be44d84e1197556ad813170f3c&_m=6bde05b4de1147a197ad5c734cf8c2ca&_e=pwq4z3MPhgutMfRNoPnQsnbcSmfAHKhwWGSsNCgkIf5DEczQaEzZiui4CzMATTX7tN6DBWYoXrBSJnMRVthgtaHQYAwex_4PA8ur_EFJSh-tqIMlzIuZjWFY9LbbQoGT7W9WF8l39B8RVf1dr7rgrwg0Z0-1C9IqA45ewxwxX5I6RmKAANQLl0Kyt_-fDlrI0moNcZDkW9yeOttlUuvJn87X-mYZSe3a0rk8Bsi5rfd7u3ecFY_3gJ1XyhwOmA3JB7cVWZ4gzLu9yEBVeDtoygpR-7TbXW0t14W9eMFIdhbkVmbySjUd9NFsanv0qC3Q_POz4za9Nyvt5nJ2sQ-vSgedptfw-FtObYCZ9NoPnyp6eHMiPJZFY_V-yTzNYL1kVsfijRkaEMtXX_-6R0EmdlTM2wjwpPU31GWwjpVv_xDAm48OdBYxFqd3j4fMShcRUw030mIHi_QrnB41xRYAXYNHXA9q3TKrs_kmHJoIQn0OMzrwjCz6mcL0jWnO8wRQ-OVnPVdUBjSa3n1TOos0Tw%3D%3D)

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Celebrating Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
Recognizing Freedom for All | | | Hi team, Nearly two and half years after Abraham Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation, the enslaved people of Texas learned they were free because United States troops arrived in Galveston, on June 19, 1865, to announce and enforce their freedom. This date, Juneteenth as it came to be called, was quickly recognized by Black Americans and their allies as the date on which our country could truly be called the land of the free. Shortly thereafter, those that had been freed began to celebrate this date annually and eventually purchased Emancipation Park in Houston to celebrate annually this date of their freedom. In Texas, the late Honorable Al Edwards, a former Texas State Representative worked to ensure that Juneteenth was recognized by making it a state holiday in 1980. It took another 42 years before Juneteenth was fully recognized and established as a federal holiday observance. I had the pleasure of interviewing Alana Edwards Holloway, the daughter of the late Honorable Al Edwards, to learn her perspective about Juneteenth. [**Check out this short interview here by clicking this link or the image below:**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8FwnRnsvvwass10iHtDNoYK2RJizMi7gp7GywIBVGWqG8ynQYqCzRz4xvAnpmFxe0JfVyWdJF54dCDTecLiD1kDlSIkFifbGayyc4tZ_rG1XpEr7xFe_p2jpwA5s9XFaikUXDUCLB5ue8Ezg_Fk2cS_LkifDIXhYTkusnKpFw552JTM16ValjORR-tk1j5oj8sQoBnWYPY3m2MCns39Hd82vIDLEOBkZfG4DEsQB96YysfgmAldNUdzz9atD7iVVuA/3n2/hEA0TaV9Qi6F0hxxs6gkHw/h0/JkRQwAwKwb6YzkeCX1Vf5HI8K-e1wMSNKEDLIEVKFPQ) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8FwnRnsvvwass10iHtDNoYKtmleqdSysYJQoQL2SC5QKaheuBzjsvzigfCTi2K94AYfRz0trt9xYY6DQF9P2bAwPPHiYm9rOM7CwxYIFXO_55tPrjoCclF1fsHspGnP9d_UiZypnIbOHiRH0k9GPV66t2Iwo0iehHn9Rlt-laODlfelPMST0Rp0walUC4aVrP43rxNUBrHlExTPGwCP4JR6A0nmhSdt2X8FVfTVVKgeUaxhOcVDqPb2XqfCXvA4Kq8/3n2/hEA0TaV9Qi6F0hxxs6gkHw/h1/8WbojRlpkx8Dmn2nkRjV1bzqj5_2JxprKq94vjJBzN4) As we celebrate the new federal holiday of Juneteenth, I reflect on what Juneteenth means, and stands for, to me, as well as to my family, to so many of my friends, colleagues, and neighbors and to all of our ancestors. It should serve as a reminder of our difficult journey and as motivation to be part of the movement to ensure that more equitable outcomes are secured for the community.
****[**I am running for Mayor of Houston because I am committed to the full equality and justice that Juneteenth signifies for all Houstonians. Please donate $25 today to join me in this commitment!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wLx0bZSuyTdTYS4amt8f-HTYfxPRNklx_hKkWO1VGWW8u5c00MtUNLsm_iOPUbee2IW8hKuLVI9FXkrnlnMSO0bMteNpotXnKcLtkwIX5kn9_KQz-_bE3ZHdJlwWFUIjcCp9MbtjoQcCIod72x0zKHymgCnETwuyRXMcpBFZyo7prqfGqz3eNuNTKfYlvqmg4KuMBOjPJnSkHx4pPcpmpMGKbU0xDtz-QYmh3GnY8aQith5obTwX31jBiFKDE0xEFVuysarTH_5CjcqA7Bbcz8e0njVbEgMWIg61nwl16ozrMHTLVOBIhTRCrf4CaePHo/3n2/hEA0TaV9Qi6F0hxxs6gkHw/h2/gG7lV4nWk2r1EB2cbvyLbYoULaQa_sEqsPhLMhgmd8w) **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-web?refcode=header](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wLx0bZSuyTdTYS4amt8f-HTYfxPRNklx_hKkWO1VGWWz0QvKGx-oecZLXzETKPhwhMXDBdYLgLIg2k71mT1m5-2gyFBgTDTcdHVPuIXR1Q1Zr7RbGhLhSkKP9mnqif-ituR5qrZvAk-0xQhOBSwjl42MHOpUMXp3zm-ayf9OPMljSq4R3HtRxtCUCgCqmyIaHDT9HazegbFOOeLZrkWOWkWBr7BjKQeJVV-5bnZS_Ky3wIEJHkVICzlMixC6KXeUe87ljIJf0x6dCWxhGoA1wQmb8eNH8DHDktwEo8hOJiVTzqAoKkjrCHPMqC9AaEBA4/3n2/hEA0TaV9Qi6F0hxxs6gkHw/h3/35tWzEXas0pPykgNU-FtXVqSc_hDyqjkR-IcS_3OUHs)** **** Thank you,

clean_body: Recognizing Freedom for All | | | Hi team, Nearly two and half years after Abraham Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation, the enslaved people of Texas learned they were free because United States troops arrived in Galveston, on June 19, 1865, to announce and enforce their freedom. This date, Juneteenth as it came to be called, was quickly recognized by Black Americans and their allies as the date on which our country could truly be called the land of the free. Shortly thereafter, those that had been freed began to celebrate this date annually and eventually purchased Emancipation Park in Houston to celebrate annually this date of their freedom. In Texas, the late Honorable Al Edwards, a former Texas State Representative worked to ensure that Juneteenth was recognized by making it a state holiday in 1980. It took another 42 years before Juneteenth was fully recognized and established as a federal holiday observance. I had the pleasure of interviewing Alana Edwards Holloway, the daughter of the late Honorable Al Edwards, to learn her perspective about Juneteenth. As we celebrate the new federal holiday of Juneteenth, I reflect on what Juneteenth means, and stands for, to me, as well as to my family, to so many of my friends, colleagues, and neighbors and to all of our ancestors. It should serve as a reminder of our difficult journey and as motivation to be part of the movement to ensure that more equitable outcomes are secured for the community. ** Thank you, Amanda K. Edwards Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, ** Paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer Amanda Edwards Campaign PO Box 88228 Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent via . World Refugee Day, Monday June 20th, is an international day designated to honor refugees around the globe. As a former refugee and the founding organizer of the Refugee Dream Center, World Refugee Day is personal to Omar. [Please donate today!](https://www.bahforcongress.com/so/6dO6255rH/c?w=cHA5gSnQeHUQFbblO-ACx5gi7rkUVdl5dgqPi_-Rrk8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JhaC1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMiIsInIiOiI2NjljZWI3YS05Y2VlLTQ5MGUtMTI0Ni1kNWIwNGU1Y2ZkOTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiZTY3ZDc2Yi05M2JkLTRlOWItOTJhOC04OTI0NDdiYzc2MzkifQ)
Omar came to the United States as a refugee after fleeing persecution and torture for his work as a human rights journalist during a period of dictatorship in The Gambia. Settling in Rhode Island, he pursued his Masters and then PhD before founding the Refugee Dream Center to help others fleeing trauma and violence. Now, Omar is running for Congress to ensure that every Rhode Islander has a voice in Congress.

We know he can win this primary and fight for the needs of every Rhode Islander, but only if we have the resources to compete. We set a goal to raise $5,000 for Omar on this World Refugee Day and we know we can do it if everyone chips in!

Could you contribute to our vision by donating $25 or $50 today?

clean_body: Greetings! We’re celebrating World Refugee Day with a goal to raise $5,000 this week! World Refugee Day, Monday June 20th, is an inter | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | | | Greetings! World Refugee Day, Monday June 20th, is an international day designated to honor refugees around the globe. As a former refugee and the founding organizer of the Refugee Dream Center, World Refugee Day is personal to Omar. Omar came to the United States as a refugee after fleeing persecution and torture for his work as a human rights journalist during a period of dictatorship in The Gambia. Settling in Rhode Island, he pursued his Masters and then PhD before founding the Refugee Dream Center to help others fleeing trauma and violence. Now, Omar is running for Congress to ensure that every Rhode Islander has a voice in Congress. We know he can win this primary and fight for the needs of every Rhode Islander, but only if we have the resources to compete. We set a goal to raise $5,000 for Omar on this World Refugee Day and we know we can do it if everyone chips in! Could you contribute to our vision by donating $25 or $50 today? \- Omar’s Campaign Team | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . body:

We can expect millions more illegal immigrants to surge over the border. The Democrats will keep putting Americans last and their radical policies first. Friend,
---
We only have 1 day left to make history. ** ** It has been 150 years since a Republican won in Georgia’s 2nd Congressional District. ** ** Now is the time to flip the seat from BLUE to RED. ** ** If I am elected, I will work to secure our southern border, fight for parents in the classroom, and make life more affordable for families. [**Can I count on you to make history with me? Pitch in before my election tomorrow.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=7434f23ed76a40d1b347c725d1a7dd28&_e=OALKr7NW7HPlYW3RavkT8nRe5jPjSFYqj6Hu3j_4Gw4uGKgG84iwGIFTtBRAAjV3omGIZ0QxuN6qpGzJofQeiotnySporWCuD1cS-U3XEypiKxqbzGa-P5IKAMBoXpFl8jFTsfY8deqtux-J4YARgFX84W8j1x5gAwTeBt5HEemUSnJIl0GcR4qtfslf8zOuwb-G0OFBAYlIArx3elZfXRAie0hINd53NBSAOwK5csl7qtODQzrfcS3FfANd41Sfzzp0ChedSuQytzBa8ti5zSM3XaYeYzcZRkmMJlZrnmFNElm66HNLVfsy9z5fYps3duKE6ga26F-5MMa0ukSKgQaV_se-1pvo5wK0_r_sYPC2CjoPJ_F8HyTuq3uay6gx15-al4GYwZMUjB7vHslBKSC-H-qCLzvbHGBGEdJ61t8%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, We only have 1 day left to make history. It has been 150 years since a Republican won in Georgia’s 2nd Congressional District. Now is the time to flip the seat from BLUE to RED. If I am elected, I will work to secure our southern border, fight for parents in the classroom, and make life more affordable for families. After 150 years, Georgians believe it is time for a change. This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts. Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. I need your help to make history, let’s make it happen — together. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Jeremy Hunt | | Copyright © 2021 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. Peter, if we focus on the issues that matter to Georgians right now, we will win. Our opponent has raised more money than any Senate candidate this year - Democrat or Republican, and there's no doubt he'll soon report another massive sum of money funneled to his campaign by Hollywood millionaires and Far-Left donors when the next financial reports come out in July. We can win this race...but only if we are able to educate Georgia voters that Senator Warnock is failing them in Washington. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: American Action News
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z03bor4dj8sgl0itmhprocv1tdlol216oat7ant0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cthm0or4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hffclim9pn8spgm4q31o36mkom4t73epgr4sb4mgrjeotn61rbcd35cuo6bd9lcsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8qmccbgmmo6fcjhcoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl9de99opnl2klpmoe4sk6gc57llllf3a359f5go_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cthm0or4c5h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr789juk7c9vmsbglgksj85alabk1ih321vm0it8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cthm0or4c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo92rhess8e9pt6c35ff1dihkv4cr9aconlku7b8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cthm0or4c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: What does Nancy Pelosi and a Silicon Valley billionaire have in common?
body:
It’s infuriating that Nancy Pelosi would rather protect an incumbent who obstructs major parts of the Democratic agenda.
#
Peter — Nancy Pelosi, Silicon Valley billionaires, right-wing Super PACs...they’re all trying to stop Justice Democrats from electing progressive fighters for the people.
Why do we need your support today? **Justice Democrat Kina Collins’ primary is in 8 days and we cannot let the political establishment spend their way to victory in this race.** [Chip in for Kina and JD right now »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110781?refcode=em20220620-23935&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=23935%2E1203867%2EzTgFCh)
Summer Lee won her primary against a corporate Democrat in May by a very slim margin. After we helped launch her campaign, Summer was way ahead. THEN, billionaire-backed Super PACs spent over $3 million to very nearly defeat us. Summer won because of grassroots support and she needed every single dollar she had to win.
Jessica Cisneros had the same billionaire Super PACs spending against her. And Nancy Pelosi endorsed her opponent, Henry Cuellar, even though Cuellar is anti-abortion, anti-labor, and pro-NRA. Jessica is heading to a recount down 280 votes.
Pelosi and those millions made the difference in Jessica’s race. And we cannot let the same thing happen to Justice Democrat Kina Collins on 6/28 in her primary against corporate Democrat Danny Davis.
[We need support right now to fight back and lift Kina Collins to victory in IL-7 against the corporate-backed establishment. Can you split a donation to Kina and Justice Democrats today?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110781?refcode=em20220620-23935&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=23935%2E1203867%2EzTgFCh)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110781?refcode=em20220620-23935&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=23935%2E1203867%2EzTgFCh)**
AOC said it best as votes were being counted in Jessica’s primary: “Congress should not be an incumbent protection racket.”
It’s infuriating that Nancy Pelosi would rather protect an incumbent who obstructs major parts of the Democratic agenda — like the PRO Act, the Women’s Health Protection Act, Build Back Better, and climate legislation — instead of supporting progressive women of color.
Now, Pelosi is campaigning for Danny Davis in IL-7, because he’s an incumbent AND Pelosi doesn’t want to see us expand the Squad. But Kina has the momentum — she got the Chicago Tribune endorsement last week and is grinding it out, talking to as many voters in Chicago as possible.
**Now, we need the money to close the spending gap and help Kina win.** [Can you split an urgent donation to Kina and Justice Democrats so we can win a huge primary on 6/28?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110781?refcode=em20220620-23935&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=23935%2E1203867%2EzTgFCh)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110781?refcode=em20220620-23935&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=23935%2E1203867%2EzTgFCh)**
We can’t let corporate Democrats out-spend us so heavily to edge out a victory — we know they’ll go all-out to stop us. We must send as much grassroots support to Kina as we can.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=24&akid=23935%2E1203867%2EzTgFCh) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=25&akid=23935%2E1203867%2EzTgFCh) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220620-23935-footer&t=26&refcode2=23935_1203867_zTgFCh&akid=23935%2E1203867%2EzTgFCh)**
---

His leadership is pathetic. Every Ohioan and American should be appalled by him. Your time is up, Two-Faced Tim. Appreciatively, Sarah Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46756841/351622894/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMThlMzk1YS1lMmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nu005JbAAea2ymufmBsXIIhzU4X14KHwISSYc_eHUn4=&emci=bc50ea87-dcf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a18e395a-e2f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, Let's follow the problem, step-by-step. **Gun violence is ripping communities across our country apart. From the mass shooting at Thurston High School here in Springfield 24 years ago, to Columbine, to Sandy Hook, to Parkland, to Uvalde. Unspeakable tragedies have devastated communities and stolen away the lives of children and educators.** And all of this while Congress could have acted to pass legislation to reduce gun violence. But Republicans have obstructed, stalled, and outright refused to take any action to save lives. [**Sign this urgent petition: demand the Senate take immediate action to end the filibuster, so it can begin to address gun violence (as well as a**** _bunch_****of other important issues).**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46756842/351622895/1953744105?source=2022GunReform_VH&referrer=group-val-hoyle-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-val-hoyle-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-06-guns-email2%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMThlMzk1YS1lMmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nu005JbAAea2ymufmBsXIIhzU4X14KHwISSYc_eHUn4=&emci=bc50ea87-dcf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a18e395a-e2f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579) **Why do I know we can do this? Because we've taken important steps on gun violence prevention right here in Oregon. **I was proud to lead the passage of our universal background checks law. We've passed legislation to keep guns out of the hands of domestic abusers, and to prevent people who are experiencing a mental health crisis from accessing a firearm. So what's stopping Congress from stepping up to protect our kids? The **filibuster** in the U.S. Senate means that a majority can't take action if an extremist minority refuses to move forward on any commonsense legislation to lives – even the small steps in the Senate's current bipartisan plan – even if it's is broadly supported by voters across the country and across the political spectrum [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46756843/351622896/1953744105?source=2022GunReform_VH&referrer=group-val-hoyle-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-val-hoyle-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-06-guns-email2%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMThlMzk1YS1lMmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nu005JbAAea2ymufmBsXIIhzU4X14KHwISSYc_eHUn4=&emci=bc50ea87-dcf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a18e395a-e2f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579) Let's be clear: the filibuster has long outlived its original stated purpose of forcing consensus. It has become a tool of obstruction, wielded by the Republican minority to deny progress on critical issues supported by a majority of Americans. And right now, it's costing lives. It's because Senators, bought by the N.R.A. and the gun lobby, hid behind the filibuster and watered down the gun safety reform bill being considered in the Senate this week. We can make progress on gun violence prevention, but not if our efforts are thwarted at every turn by extremists who abuse the filibuster. **[That's why we need you to sign the petition, and stand with our movement right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46756844/351622897/-356898130?source=2022GunReform_VH&referrer=group-val-hoyle-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-val-hoyle-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-06-guns-email2%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMThlMzk1YS1lMmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nu005JbAAea2ymufmBsXIIhzU4X14KHwISSYc_eHUn4=&emci=bc50ea87-dcf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a18e395a-e2f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579)** clean_body: | | | | Peter, Let's follow the problem, step-by-step. Gun violence is ripping communities across our country apart. From the mass shooting at Thurston High School here in Springfield 24 years ago, to Columbine, to Sandy Hook, to Parkland, to Uvalde. Unspeakable tragedies have devastated communities and stolen away the lives of children and educators. And all of this while Congress could have acted to pass legislation to reduce gun violence. But Republicans have obstructed, stalled, and outright refused to take any action to save lives. Why do I know we can do this? Because we've taken important steps on gun violence prevention right here in Oregon. I was proud to lead the passage of our universal background checks law. We've passed legislation to keep guns out of the hands of domestic abusers, and to prevent people who are experiencing a mental health crisis from accessing a firearm. So what's stopping Congress from stepping up to protect our kids? The filibuster in the U.S. Senate means that a majority can't take action if an extremist minority refuses to move forward on any commonsense legislation to lives – even the small steps in the Senate's current bipartisan plan – even if it's is broadly supported by voters across the country and across the political spectrum Let's be clear: the filibuster has long outlived its original stated purpose of forcing consensus. It has become a tool of obstruction, wielded by the Republican minority to deny progress on critical issues supported by a majority of Americans. And right now, it's costing lives. It's because Senators, bought by the N.R.A. and the gun lobby, hid behind the filibuster and watered down the gun safety reform bill being considered in the Senate this week. We can make progress on gun violence prevention, but not if our efforts are thwarted at every turn by extremists who abuse the filibuster. name: Team Welch
subject: Working to lower the cost of prescription drugs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
It’s critical we act to lower the cost of prescription drugs.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=553%2E61531%2EekG8p9)
Hello,
No family should be forced to choose between life-saving medication and putting groceries on the table. But Big Pharma is constantly raising the price of medicine at a rate many families can’t keep up with.
Health care is a right, not a privilege. But to make that a reality, we must come together and demand action.
****[Please add your name to our petition telling Congress to finish the job and lower the cost of prescription drugs. Peter’s fighting back against Big Pharma, but he can’t do it alone.](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-lower-prescription-drugs?source=em_20220620_p_t_rxdrugs&t=4&akid=553%2E61531%2EekG8p9)**
Peter’s been a steadfast leader in the fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs. He helped pass legislation to let Medicare negotiate lower drug prices, but it stalled in the Senate. There are simply too many Senators in the pocket of Big Pharma, rooting for these plans to fail.
But Peter continues to fight. Some of the measures he’s working hard to pass include capping the out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35 a month, limiting Big Pharma from raising prices beyond the rate of inflation, and directly lowering out-of-pocket costs for seniors.
These steps will make a direct difference, but we need to keep fighting together to finish what we started.
**[Add your name right away: Congress must lower prescription drug prices.](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-lower-prescription-drugs?source=em_20220620_p_t_rxdrugs&t=6&akid=553%2E61531%2EekG8p9)**
Thanks for being a part of the team,
Team Welch

body:
First, THANK YOU!

Hundreds of you took the time to share your thoughts with our team. And here’s what you said:

I think that we will muddle through somehow and save our democratic form of government, although we must be ever more vigilant. - Valerie

Very anxious about what is coming at the polls in terms of violence and attacks. - Margaret

Republican Party, as currently exists, has devolved to a fascist totalitarian state. - Ronald

What challenges do you see in your city or area?

Very far right people running to be put in offices to take away our rights with much money behind them and attacking everything I believe in. - Carol

Challenge in Michigan is defending the right to vote. - James

Keeping domestic terrorists...from sabotaging elections and threatening duly elected officials. - Mary

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=062022

I think SOS Benson is doing a great job. Very honest and forthright. I pray she wins the election against her crazy opponent. - Carol

We will only stay on the right path if Democrats can continue to stay in power. - Lucille

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=062022
You can see, we’ve got great support on our team but we’ve still got a lot of work to do.

Thank you for providing your thoughtful feedback about the current state of your community. Be sure to support Jocelyn’s campaign today.

-Team Benson

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Shame on these Communist Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
I've made a special video for you to watch why I'm leading the fight to STOP Joe Biden's gun control.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z95glkhjove1jc4fd59u4mlf04hv4bdmpfa6lo30_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cthm4ob2cjh2bs)

Fellow Patriot,

Frankly, **I 'm disgusted.**

Oh, I expected I would be attacked like this. But using the deaths of children to score political points?

That's just beyond the pale even for Joe Biden.

I've made a special video for you to watch why I'm leading the fight to STOP Joe Biden's gun control.

**Shame on the Communist Democrats and Joe Biden for attacking the Constitution and putting our children in danger.**

But that is exactly what Joe Biden, and the radical left are doing to try and gut the 2nd amendment.

And it's what my radical leftist Democrat opponent is claiming will "put him over the top this November."

We're offering FREE Shipping for the next 48 hours!
[Get yours right here before they're all gone.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/7093/6374453/10fdbdd7009ef3e5165e6265a862d52faf5bf107/ee88da5391476cd412a9ca51a1d14841ad913020)

body:
LAST CHANCE!

| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=d8a806eacabc4375854878f9dedb9b62&_e=tmDkDtQB5ZiZNe-pOufasbbf8Qt7lDRu1eHg4M9vQAAyI_Gdk1FgQfNJEbpshqF1fpUMPY0nf6bgcBo3p0Fx21eb-9kem65PRbu-C0KIsn8fsPFQGLO13Gw7be_-qSr4F2xBztB83uZBdFprVSO6oKv6IfdwtaG_G10-4aKWxmpWdORJqgqtxOB3RAafULebyawev8-rDTMc7ZGxa2idz8h3sD6DORjxx8dbPvAUEPolvZlf-IkDaA2WWULXroK2IVvj1QAbgr-xtdf_j32PzwNklgxkL_6cliLcMdonk4KunXx-mGw1_YMuSUpT-EJhDHhT7I3QxBOBNgfhCOBGkLK_HN7dGCWa8yeqOjcmnAURSX4bt5M7-yf2FKVbt5UnJfZ5KyzCcZ2_KFki_5JpUlCLUm0_RqgxVgY2NtNUjfItV6b2Pa7REnmWsvIdGEjMVP8-vdF2IyEn8xtGaz2h9YHCDVVdajMrc_59gEH6cJbVjXnE1Lm4u5x_9MdvXd06)
---
Fellow Conservative,

**This is a**FINAL REMINDER** about Senator Cruz and Yesli Vega’s rally tonight in Woodbridge at the Harbour Grille!**

This is our final event before the votes are counted tomorrow and we need to see **YOU** there!

Senator Cruz and Yesli’s fathers both came to the land of opportunity with nothing.

name: Alex Walker
subject: This is why I send you annoying emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker for Colorado
body:
|
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46757472/351626367/-1423874408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDU0MTg5ZC1lOGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQd6v4ZIciaztcRpOJeuGsBL9kY_KbwCWejn10mr-ro=)
---

| | Peter,

I started my campaign to save our democracy from Lauren Boebert's far-right conspiracy theories. But since launching my campaign, I’ve realized Boebert's bullshit isn't even my biggest obstacle.

Instead, the biggest obstacle to my campaign, and one of the biggest threats to our democracy is...

**MONEY!**

Anyone who wants to win an election in this country needs money.

Which means regular people (me), have to beg you for grassroots support and send you annoying emails like this. _Sorry!_

[If you believe in my campaign, you can click here to donate. I appreciate it more than you know.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46757473/351626368/288796339?refcode=220619_FR_90DO_1_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDU0MTg5ZC1lOGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQd6v4ZIciaztcRpOJeuGsBL9kY_KbwCWejn10mr-ro=)

As the primary nears, money's influence on our elections becomes clearer and clearer.

One of my primary opponents is a self-funded career politician, who's poured millions of their own money into boosting their campaign — and my advisors say that could be enough for them to win the primaries. And yet — it may not be enough to give Democrats a win in the midterms.

And you know why? _Take a guess._

**That's right — because Republicans have even more MILLIONS than they do.**

Do you see the problem Peter?

I won’t shame anyone for playing the game _— hello, I’m doing the same thing —_ but I won’t keep quiet about systemic issues with our democracy. Our elections aren't about who has the best policies or who's popular with voters. At the end of the day, most of the time all that matters is who has the most money.

[If we care about having free and fair elections, we need MAJOR reform to the entire voting system.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46757474/351626369/288796339?refcode=220619_FR_90DO_1_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDU0MTg5ZC1lOGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQd6v4ZIciaztcRpOJeuGsBL9kY_KbwCWejn10mr-ro=)

If I win this race, I will do everything I can to ensure that future elections are accessible to anyone who has the vision to lead.

But I won't be able to do it if I don't win.

[Please, can you chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can to help me raise enough money to beat career politicians and conspiracy theorists and bring the change we need to protect our Democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46757475/351626370/288796339?refcode=220619_FR_90DO_1_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDU0MTg5ZC1lOGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQd6v4ZIciaztcRpOJeuGsBL9kY_KbwCWejn10mr-ro=)

clean_body: | | | = | | Peter, I started my campaign to save our democracy from Lauren Boebert's far-right conspiracy theories. But since launching my campaign, I’ve realized Boebert's bullshit isn't even my biggest obstacle. Instead, the biggest obstacle to my campaign, and one of the biggest threats to our democracy is... MONEY! Anyone who wants to win an election in this country needs money. Which means regular people (me), have to beg you for grassroots support and send you annoying emails like this. Sorry! = As the primary nears, money's influence on our elections becomes clearer and clearer. One of my primary opponents is a self-funded career politician, who's poured millions of their own money into boosting their campaign — and my advisors say that could be enough for them to win the primaries. And yet — it may not be enough to give Democrats a win in the midterms. And you know why? Take a guess. That's right — because Republicans have even more MILLIONS than they do. Do you see the problem Peter? I won’t shame anyone for playing the game — hello, I’m doing the same thing — but I won’t keep quiet about systemic issues with our democracy. Our elections aren't about who has the best policies or who's popular with voters. At the end of the day, most of the time all that matters is who has the most money. = If I win this race, I will do everything I can to ensure that future elections are accessible to anyone who has the vision to lead. But I won't be able to do it if I don't win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = = Thank you so much for your support. Together, we're going to change things for the better. -Alex ****Walker for Colorado**** = | | ---|---|--- | | We think email is the best way to keep in touch with our team. Our team is powered by people like you. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so by clicking here: Walker for Colorado PO Box 449 Denver, CO 80202 Paid for by Walker for Colorado

| | | Hey folks,

I wanted to be sure you saw your invitation from my team to [join Carl and Susan Lock tomorrow, Tuesday, June 21st at Casablanca in Brookfield](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=af15652f9b&e=356c0699dd) for a reception to support my campaign for Congress.

I'm looking forward to getting the chance to meet with you and talk more about our shared vision for the future of our state and country.

Thanks for your support!

See you then,
Mike

Hey there,

I wanted to be sure you saw your invitation to [join Team Van Someren and our hosts Carl and Susan Lock on Tuesday, June 21st at Casablanca in Brookfield](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=d9f2618663&e=356c0699dd) for a reception to support Mike’s campaign.

| November is just around the corner, and we are going to be faced with a choice: re-hire the extremist Congressman who has brought us nothing but division and inaction, or invest in fresh, new leadership dedicated to serving all his constituents, ensuring all of us have a fair shot at the American Dream.

**It’s time we say enough is enough, and elect a Congressman who is ready to listen, learn, and lead.** Mike Van Someren will work to address the issues we care about by restoring our democracy, strengthening our economy, and keeping our families safe.

**Join us this Tuesday to support Mike!** If you can’t make it, a little goes a long way to help us spread our shared vision of a reinvigorated middle class. [Anything you can contribute makes all the difference](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=4e146e6252&e=356c0699dd) as we go up against the millionaire donors lining our opponent’s pockets.

Mike Van Someren will bring common-sense to our nation’s capital — because YOU deserve better.

See you Tuesday,
Holly
Mike Van Someren HQ

subject: quick history lesson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46757696/351627311/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWY4OGY5OS1lYWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f0JoVe5sZvcCAl45drSN2HMx-CKmA4manGvNwxMa_NE=&emci=143111b2-dff0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=6af88f99-eaf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46757697/351627314/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWY4OGY5OS1lYWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f0JoVe5sZvcCAl45drSN2HMx-CKmA4manGvNwxMa_NE=&emci=143111b2-dff0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=6af88f99-eaf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Fox News and my opponent Chuck Grassley are hot to paint me as “liberal.” They’re already calling me a radical socialist who is the most liberal person to ever run for office. (*eye roll*)
Bit of history: Iowa was one of the first states to open college for women, to elect women to public office, and admit female lawyers to the bar. We were the second state in the nation to allow interracial marriage and the first state to desegrate public schools. Iowa is home to America’s oldest mosque, and we were the third state to recognize same-sex marriage.
You would think the good Senator would recall these events... Perhaps Grassley has forgotten Iowa and who we are – or maybe he’s just once again playing partisan politics and courting the support of far-right fringe groups to try to win reelection.
**Iowa has always been a place of progressive values, and I am running against Chuck Grassley because it’s time to return our state to its roots of advocating equality and caring for one another.**
Chuck Grassley, his Super PAC buddies, and Fox News are already attacking me and even my military service. The polls show a close race, and if I defeat Grassley this November, Democrats are guaranteed to keep our Senate majority this November.
**I’m ready to fight back, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give me the tools to do it. We need to raise another $75,000 before our deadline at midnight tomorrow, and right now, we are falling dangerously short.**

body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNkE9rxCAQxT9NcjPoaExyyGGh5LY9lEKPYnTcyJo_qGHZb1-3pffCHIYZeO_9nh2tsZqZ2o9AAagEynoxADS95C2Tpu1Ryxa6thJUB4y5iXicc_BGb1mnu9ujwcbsa72MIPqOCkaFBaR6Rt450TkqBia4MSjrr6u6ah_8dnvXK44xOxWTQh_2Td0xBHwSHSOmrCQBSgAUq8O45Hykil8qmMokNGfE5uG3iPZlXG6rN4u_6Y2UNCQ-y2LJr155Mmu41cicc1ZQNxOCCK0bpGBMCsq5JIeO6aXOpzOvKpuKv318TuSvkTqO9nj4EHySXenhthaIH-b8L4Zv-V9xpQ)

| | Friend, The FBI just showed up. You read that right. _**The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me. **_ This is face of tyranny and government overreach. Anyone who has followed our campaign knows I am prepared to give my life fighting against this exact oppression. But let me back up. My name is Ryan Kelley. You've probably never heard of me, or at least hadn't heard of me before today when my name and picture was splashed across every news outlet in the country. Thats ok. The media and the establishment swamp have tried to pretend I don't exist, but I am now leading in the polls to be the Republican nominee for Governor in Michigan. **That's right. Governor. In Michigan. A state where election fraud happened and Trump's victory was stolen...and Biden's DOJ just had me arrested. ** I started this campaign for a simple reason. The government's grip on the throat of its citizenry has grown so tight as to make our republic unrecognizable. When the COVID lockdowns came to Michigan and the "vaccine passport", and "rules for thee but not for me" crowd unconstitutionally locked us in our homes and closed businesses and took away our rights--I stood up. I stood up. And this is what happens when you stand up to tyranny in Biden's America. _I will never bend the knee to tyrants. I don't think you will either. _ There is a simple answer. We beat them. We beat them at the ballot box so badly that they can't cheat. They can't steal it. We beat them so badly that no government, no political party, no deep state operative _**will ever, ever forget the consequence of oppressing the will of the people**_ and attempting to steal our God-given rights. _I need_ _your_ _help_. [I need you to make a donation right now and help me fight back. I have no intention of letting up now. ](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNkE9rxCAQxT9NcjPoaExyyGGh5LY9lEKPYnTcyJo_qGHZb1-3pffCHIYZeO_9nh2tsZqZ2o9AAagEynoxADS95C2Tpu1Ryxa6thJUB4y5iXicc_BGb1mnu9ujwcbsa72MIPqOCkaFBaR6Rt450TkqBia4MSjrr6u6ah_8dnvXK44xOxWTQh_2Td0xBHwSHSOmrCQBSgAUq8O45Hykil8qmMokNGfE5uG3iPZlXG6rN4u_6Y2UNCQ-y2LJr155Mmu41cicc1ZQNxOCCK0bpGBMCsq5JIeO6aXOpzOvKpuKv318TuSvkTqO9nj4EHySXenhthaIH-b8L4Zv-V9xpQ) That they're trying to throw me in prison shows they're scared. You know what will scare them more? A war chest unrivaled in history. A war chest that says every man and woman across this country who believes in liberty and the rights of the people are standing arm-in-arm ready to defend those rights. You've probably never gotten a letter from a political prisoner, but you're getting one now. The question is: _What will you do next?_ Will you delete this email and go back to your day waiting around for them to take away your next freedom? Maybe your second and first amendment rights next? Or will you [click the link, make a donation, and be part of the true grassroots movement that is building here](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNkE9rxCAQxT9NcjPoaExyyGGh5LY9lEKPYnTcyJo_qGHZb1-3pffCHIYZeO_9nh2tsZqZ2o9AAagEynoxADS95C2Tpu1Ryxa6thJUB4y5iXicc_BGb1mnu9ujwcbsa72MIPqOCkaFBaR6Rt450TkqBia4MSjrr6u6ah_8dnvXK44xOxWTQh_2Td0xBHwSHSOmrCQBSgAUq8O45Hykil8qmMokNGfE5uG3iPZlXG6rN4u_6Y2UNCQ-y2LJr155Mmu41cicc1ZQNxOCCK0bpGBMCsq5JIeO6aXOpzOvKpuKv318TuSvkTqO9nj4EHySXenhthaIH-b8L4Zv-V9xpQ)? I've made it clear where I stand. I will not back down. I will not stop defending OUR rights. Yours and mine. I need you to commit, right now. Click the link, make as generous a donation as you can. **They want us silent. They want us on our knees.** Stand up. Stand with me. Get involved right now, while there is still time.
---

name: Tim Ryan
subject: This is the longest email I’ll ever send you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ][IMG]

This is the longest email I’ll ever send you, so I hope you’ll read the
whole thing.

I want to share our game plan for flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat
blue—when you’re running in a swing state that Trump won, you can’t leave
anything to chance.

That’s why I have to ask: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15432?t=1009&amount=25&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ]Will you make a $25 donation to help us on
the road to victory to flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic Senate
majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15432?t=1010&amount=25&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ]Chip in

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step One: Talk to Folks in Every Corner of Ohio

Working class Ohioans, in our big cities and our small towns, know what
it’s like to be left out and left behind. I won’t be that kind of Senator.

We kicked off this campaign by launching a Workers First Tour. Since then,
we’ve been traveling all over Ohio—visiting union halls, factories,
restaurants, and even a few bars—to hear from folks about the challenges
they’re facing.

The truth is, a lot of people don’t trust politicians, and they have every
reason to be skeptical. The only way to break through that is to look
someone in the eye, shake their hand, and let them see that you don’t have
eight heads.

The opposition might be spending millions of dollars to attack me, but
your donations allow me to do what matters—show up and meet folks
face-to-face.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step Two: Stand Up to Special Interests and Put Workers First

I’ve made more than a few headlines for getting loud (okay, outright
yelling) on the House floor, because when it comes to speaking up for the
hardworking people out there busting their rear ends every day, I’ll never
hold my tongue.

Whether it’s the Chinese government, Big Pharma, a corporate giant trying
to ship jobs overseas, or a member of my own party—I’m not afraid to take
on anyone who tries to leave our workers high and dry.

If that puts a target on my back, so be it.

My Republican opponent JD Vance can rely on the steady support of
dark-money groups, but I’m proud to run a campaign that’s powered by
grassroots supporters like you—not right-wing special interests and tech
billionaires.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step Three: Focus On The Issues That Matter

The vast majority of Americans are working harder and longer, making less,
and falling further behind. CEOs are getting golden parachutes, while our
seniors are cutting pills in half because they can’t afford their
medications.

You wouldn’t know it from listening to JD Vance though—all he does is yell
about the culture war du jour. We’re not going to flip Ohio blue and
expand our Democratic majority by starting fights over Big Bird and Dr.
Seuss—we need to stay focused on the issues that matter.

It doesn’t matter if I’m talking to a Democrat, Independent, or
Republican—I’m talking about jobs and wages. I’m talking about making Ohio
a manufacturing powerhouse. Lowering the cost of prescription drugs.
Expanding broadband access. Making sure our kids get a good education.

Vance is trying to make this race about anger, division, and fear because
he knows that when it comes down to the issues that actually make a
difference for working families, he’ll lose every time.

That’s why my team has to send you emails like this one—so we’ll have the
resources to get our message out over all his GOP nonsense.

I’m giving this race everything I’ve got, but I can’t win this thing
alone. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15432?t=1011&amount=25&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ]I’m personally asking you to rush a donation of $25 so we can
carry out our campaign strategy, flip Ohio blue, and finally cut workers
in on the deal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15432?t=1012&amount=25&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15432?t=1013&amount=50&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15432?t=1014&amount=100&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15432?t=1015&amount=200&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15432?t=1016&amount=250&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15432?t=1008&amount=30&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ]Other Amount

Thanks for your support,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=4233%2E3611125%2EJQb7CF ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

clean_body: [ ][IMG] This is the longest email I’ll ever send you, so I hope you’ll read the whole thing. I want to share our game plan for flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat blue—when you’re running in a swing state that Trump won, you can’t leave anything to chance. That’s why I have to ask: [ ]Will you make a $25 donation to help us on the road to victory to flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? [ ]Chip in Step One: Talk to Folks in Every Corner of Ohio Working class Ohioans, in our big cities and our small towns, know what it’s like to be left out and left behind. I won’t be that kind of Senator. We kicked off this campaign by launching a Workers First Tour. Since then, we’ve been traveling all over Ohio—visiting union halls, factories, restaurants, and even a few bars—to hear from folks about the challenges they’re facing. The truth is, a lot of people don’t trust politicians, and they have every reason to be skeptical. The only way to break through that is to look someone in the eye, shake their hand, and let them see that you don’t have eight heads. The opposition might be spending millions of dollars to attack me, but your donations allow me to do what matters—show up and meet folks face-to-face. Step Two: Stand Up to Special Interests and Put Workers First I’ve made more than a few headlines for getting loud (okay, outright yelling) on the House floor, because when it comes to speaking up for the hardworking people out there busting their rear ends every day, I’ll never hold my tongue. Whether it’s the Chinese government, Big Pharma, a corporate giant trying to ship jobs overseas, or a member of my own party—I’m not afraid to take on anyone who tries to leave our workers high and dry. If that puts a target on my back, so be it. My Republican opponent JD Vance can rely on the steady support of dark-money groups, but I’m proud to run a campaign that’s powered by grassroots supporters like you—not right-wing special interests and tech billionaires. Step Three: Focus On The Issues That Matter The vast majority of Americans are working harder and longer, making less, and falling further behind. CEOs are getting golden parachutes, while our seniors are cutting pills in half because they can’t afford their medications. You wouldn’t know it from listening to JD Vance though—all he does is yell about the culture war du jour. We’re not going to flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic majority by starting fights over Big Bird and Dr. Seuss—we need to stay focused on the issues that matter. It doesn’t matter if I’m talking to a Democrat, Independent, or Republican—I’m talking about jobs and wages. I’m talking about making Ohio a manufacturing powerhouse. Lowering the cost of prescription drugs. Expanding broadband access. Making sure our kids get a good education. Vance is trying to make this race about anger, division, and fear because he knows that when it comes down to the issues that actually make a difference for working families, he’ll lose every time. That’s why my team has to send you emails like this one—so we’ll have the resources to get our message out over all his GOP nonsense. I’m giving this race everything I’ve got, but I can’t win this thing alone. [ ]I’m personally asking you to rush a donation of $25 so we can carry out our campaign strategy, flip Ohio blue, and finally cut workers in on the deal. [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount Thanks for your support, Tim [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below! name: John Fetterman
subject: seriously?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This makes me 🙄🙄🙄
#
Derek, this makes me roll my eyes. 🙄🙄
POLITICO just reported that the Mitch McConnell aligned super PAC “Senate Leadership Fund” has already reserved **$24 MILLION** in ads in Pennsylvania.
That’s like, way more than we’ve raised during this entire race. And they're not raising that $25 at a time, day by day. They're just getting giant checks from unnamed, ultra-rich donors.
That really sucks, Derek!
Like, seriously? If you’re Mitch McConnell and you see our campaign’s hard-won grassroots strength, you just ring up your super PAC and pour $24 million into PA, and you can change the stakes of the race???
Derek, I know I’ve asked each + every one of you for a lot lately. It’s expensive to run a campaign like ours. But I’ve never needed support more than right now. We don’t take a cent from corporate super PACs, so it’s up to US to stand up to the GOP’s unlimited dark money.
**Will you make your best donation — maybe even $10 or more — today to help us fight back against the GOP’s super PACs? Here’s the best link to give:**
[**_https://johnfetterman.com/super-pac-fight-back_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47610?refcode=em20220620-6239&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6239%2E434096%2EqvhGMi)
I hate how much money is in our politics these days. But in order to win on the issues we care about, I need to be able to respond to the record-shattering hauls of money coming our way.
If you trust me with a donation today, I promise I will fight like hell for you in the U.S. Senate. 🙏
Thank you for sticking by me. It means a lot to be surrounded by so many good people through the good and bad times. I really couldn’t do this without you.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220620-6239-footer&t=2&refcode2=6239_434096_qvhGMi&akid=6239%2E434096%2EqvhGMi)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=6239%2E434096%2EqvhGMi)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=6239%2E434096%2EqvhGMi)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

We weren't expecting Josh to get attacked so quickly after winning his top-2 election, but now everytime our voters log onto their computers they'll be seeing this:

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: What Juneteenthcelebrates…and what it doesn’t
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
Today’s holiday is an important celebration that—like slavery in the United States—remains widely misconstrued. | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0OwksPOi1rpPqhpC0vg4ids9Jh7bN4OYyg0u3xGA-21Q8E9f_XzB0TmrA9UahvJvdE9vSgfepHyNV4BFa6d6a0aLS8_dcn5UDT38TBpTNlDw1UFya67l_eMfLRn5qMpVsW7yVMjMp18YAD67Kdervlq2Dke_F8a3PuBsvKc0-g6l6nlgTWqlNJL2YfQVBeF-xq57beN7pGaYI2HwHym-bFfELsJdMgBXS3_3Qhk3f89ewLsqGhzqhfBDynaR3eOydIQ/3n2/0MxXJLb-RUGBANjiYKXiWw/h0/nhx1GJyALU-FQ_PaVr8IO6LXlHy00p4i62IlyJ73G6o)
| | Dear Peter, Today, the United States celebrates our latest holiday to gain federal recognition: Juneteenth. We share today’s celebration of Black liberation and resilience, while regrettably noting how many people confuse the meaning of today’s holiday. Juneteenth is the approximate anniversary of the date when formerly enslaved Black people in Texas learned about their emancipation. But it doesn’t mark the end of industrialized slavery in the United States, which legally continues in our prison system under the terms of the 13th Amendment. [**Can you join us today to finally end industrialized slavery in the United States?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5ML6A7zyvnNgAqV37OZp1tomIIlujOPlWbLYScNagWwOj4Z0NfVVp9oO6ukZQpmQokfpuX3c7n0K8F4jqBb4w7XVPhYrOqV9D-WjeLDWL17NUwc6zw5Dv59DkB8dqrJxzp1YA33j_zftfY3X6v5gksb3ywwL4aNZuTnfh_jKla-VQ0wPt-fH1PGLn-omuPSBpPcsluhFnrsI1948-VIo9pQC8VRHoOr4DurY_OuuTG2vppJaKtHvwchGKdZOfDD6GopVK6MCgY2Fv0ebOaRrRViwf9oRku3ujJrBya2cYWnStg/3n2/0MxXJLb-RUGBANjiYKXiWw/h1/hRWoXsuroZNv3hFc74uZka6mgxADPj8j8laF4VmFXrg) When the Civil War ended, negotiations over the text of what became the 13th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution imposed a vital caveat forgotten and overlooked by most observers. It reads:
> "Neither slavery nor involuntary servitude, _except as a punishment for crime_ whereof the party shall have been duly convicted, shall exist within the United States, or any place subject to their jurisdiction."
Few words in any American legal text have done as much to justify human suffering as “except as a punishment for crime.” **Today, industrialized slavery has expanded beyond its scale before the Civil War.** Read that again. If that fact surprises you, we invite you to [learn more](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDL7BDA7D34Z59lCZwCV2ipYRJR8c9lRMumRi1b4PdfWsy-Fex2nJ2ZWNbAY-JcII6OZ5s7NDhDVIMXp3xWJLp0JV9WpPwN-SLXGsw1NrYfit3-V3_lhLUG-tjIB3wfYG7tmCfpYxVtmvKc5h4gqkqi_WeWnM4hl-xnukXhcRuEqWSfDBb3Ubk3-vo--lRCPDS7ufKJfn2LPI2tr-OQ4zoioOtTAydr0iZPFtmvEClmKJL8vKpvxvTDDsdat4qRR6ciCE8V91Ztpy9o77RqfCONMiazl0CWsqk0dR-FMPjG352-Sova8Z4e9031SbenFx6l0850Laxr6vrsAUXdya6liB_Y5XEY67mmQWXt08tqZt/3n2/0MxXJLb-RUGBANjiYKXiWw/h2/Ka989cFMWOLHmNP2qpxTT9Idre6IH_YDb9HxLz0j7E4) from professor Tryon P. Woods. Industrialized slavery has expanded in more than one way. First, the U.S. prison population today exceeds the population of enslaved people at the height of the antebellum South. It has also grown multiracial, while playing a key role in driving the expansion & metastasis of paramilitarized policing. The militarization of police departments across the entire country stretches well beyond previous slave states. In that context, the expansion of our criminal injustice system threatens not only the millions of legally enslaved Americans in our nation’s prisons, but also everyone else in our country vulnerable to arbitrary (and often lethal) state violence. [**Few voices pierce through the self-serving lies of our bipartisan establishment like mine. With our race still continuing as we await the final results of the June primary, can you join us again today to help us keep speaking truth to power?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5ML6A7zyvnNgAqV37OZp1tomE00UmI35JMFGaVN38bqj8a1FDXDSDb8C-khyY_O6_wwFmGY5hrri5xoORNPqJ1rMpWvmoMahcubCtFFZr3YeN_l6XbXyW3LCkJDGFTBfoiiF07c5tjItdI1C-t6h6Lm5yDnN3UBMRlFkDVT-tnNSZLnT_MaYb9VkV-7mkTBfgCIIKObj4g6Ms8bLlwBysA_OB6Get0qkDJuQiWto5d-e41FsNfZlPeCHtfIfy_YTBmADbXXOQp1_mKypkeKis9kdV8wcAP57WvBxgLVatGOo6A/3n2/0MxXJLb-RUGBANjiYKXiWw/h3/vEdKe1sRMbqHh4Pn-u0Ve9msvWJdtAQOnayhS_-xAAo) It’s important not to let corporate politicians off the hook by accepting cultural concessions—like the overdue recognition of a federal holiday—as substitutes for the policy changes needed to finally end our nation’s continuing horrors, including multiracial industrialized slavery via mass incarceration. That recognition helped animate our campaign for Congress, which today hangs by a thread. The latest announcements from the San Francisco Board of Elections promise another public update tomorrow. As of the most recent count, we remain 580 votes behind the crucial second place finish that would advance our campaign to the general election in November. Shahid |

clean_body: Today’s holiday is an important celebration that—like slavery in the United States—remains widely misconstrued. | | | | | Dear Peter, Today, the United States celebrates our latest holiday to gain federal recognition: Juneteenth. We share today’s celebration of Black liberation and resilience, while regrettably noting how many people confuse the meaning of today’s holiday. Juneteenth is the approximate anniversary of the date when formerly enslaved Black people in Texas learned about their emancipation. But it doesn’t mark the end of industrialized slavery in the United States, which legally continues in our prison system under the terms of the 13th Amendment. When the Civil War ended, negotiations over the text of what became the 13th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution imposed a vital caveat forgotten and overlooked by most observers. It reads: "Neither slavery nor involuntary servitude, except as a punishment for crime whereof the party shall have been duly convicted, shall exist within the United States, or any place subject to their jurisdiction." Few words in any American legal text have done as much to justify human suffering as “except as a punishment for crime.” Today, industrialized slavery has expanded beyond its scale before the Civil War. Read that again. If that fact surprises you, we invite you to from professor Tryon P. Woods. Industrialized slavery has expanded in more than one way. First, the U.S. prison population today exceeds the population of enslaved people at the height of the antebellum South. It has also grown multiracial, while playing a key role in driving the expansion & metastasis of paramilitarized policing. The militarization of police departments across the entire country stretches well beyond previous slave states. In that context, the expansion of our criminal injustice system threatens not only the millions of legally enslaved Americans in our nation’s prisons, but also everyone else in our country vulnerable to arbitrary (and often lethal) state violence. It’s important not to let corporate politicians off the hook by accepting cultural concessions—like the overdue recognition of a federal holiday—as substitutes for the policy changes needed to finally end our nation’s continuing horrors, including multiracial industrialized slavery via mass incarceration. That recognition helped animate our campaign for Congress, which today hangs by a thread. The latest announcements from the San Francisco Board of Elections promise another public update tomorrow. As of the most recent count, we remain 580 votes behind the crucial second place finish that would advance our campaign to the general election in November. Stay tuned, thanks for your support, and enjoy today’s holiday! Your voice, Shahid | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . name: Crystal Vanuch
subject: [WATCH] Asking for your vote tomorrow
body:
In less than 12 hours, polls will open in the Republican Primary for Virginia's 7th Congressional District.
| | | [](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/f40c01b88f3c9ff9/1f76f84695ce66f5c3d6b838967d376c/40203)
---
Peter, **In less than 12 hours, polls will open in the Republican Primary for Virginia's 7th Congressional District.** _I just recorded this message._ I hope you will watch it and consider casting your vote for me tomorrow.
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/f40c01b88f3c9ff9/7fc4a9cc02f253b9c3d6b838967d376c/40203)
This is my hometown. I'm from here, I grew up here, I built my business here, and I still live here, which is something none of the other candidates in this race can say. **I will always fight for my hometown and protect it from the dangerous policies of the extreme left.** **While most politicians just talk, I will get the job done.** As Board Chair, I secured the largest pay raise for our law enforcement officers in county history, voted to strip funding from schools teaching Critical Race Theory, and made Stafford a sanctuary county for law abiding gun owners. __The 7th Congressional District needs a fighter who has a proven record, and I am the only candidate with a solid, uncompromising conservative record.__ **Throughout this race, I've been clear about what my priorities are:** ✅ Secure Our Southern Border ✅ American Energy Independence ✅ Defend The Second Amendment ✅ 100% Pro-Law Enforcement ✅ Protect The Unborn ✅ Stop Voter Fraud Your vote is so much more than a vote for me: **it's a vote for the America First movement, a vote to restore our way of life, and an investment in a better future for our children.** Together, we will take back our country from Biden and the radical left. _**As your Congresswoman, I will always put America First and never compromise our shared REPUBLICAN values.**_ **Join me!** Together, we can bring America First values back to Washington and __**TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY**__. God bless,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress
---
[**POLLS OPEN AT 6AM! FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION >>**](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/f40c01b88f3c9ff9/8acf63efa9eba504c3d6b838967d376c/40203)

We need to be LOUDER than them and make sure Alabamians know: I am the only proven conservative in this race, and I willbe Alabama’s next senator! In the final days of this campaign, we are buying television time, locking down our digital ad budget, printing mail like crazy, and calling in every volunteer we have to make sure we win this thing. But every one of those things costs money, and we don’t have the deep pockets of the Swamp creatures we’re fighting. All we have are grassroots conservatives like you, friend. name: Ally For Utah
subject: Mary Crafts endorses Ally Isom for U.S. Senate
body:
"I have rarely met someone as powerful and strong, as well-spoken, as empathetic as Ally. She’s the kind of person, the kind of woman, I want to represent me in the U.S. Senate.”
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KhhKUj-hTvGqn8MMmnP4FerOUP4oEYLc8KBjG8uW6aoh7PbgaMt7c6eql8QHdd2kekRAY2E3zSr80KsLL_-4cezrMXsAP_15yEs-Fl5eT84fqA6OFpgEUuNlklDHVUv8x5w2KLJWgffrITAFCM9y1Q==&c=NKYGPlfjEa256vPJiUeaQ18fh4TUslyymaEvZXAdvsiYVNJ1ieRDYw==&ch=YkTxwKhDFwG8E2Rsjiy9SZk6fKPiRXXLkQB6vvzzO3WAyzq8APpb4w==)
---
---
| | Businesswoman Mary Crafts publicly endorses Ally Isom for U.S. Senate. [Watch her video on YouTube here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KhhKUj-hTvGqn8MMmnP4FerOUP4oEYLc8KBjG8uW6aoh7PbgaMt7c9RHFc0dVMGEGrr1n7Q6Cu-EniAVH7gh-wJrytcv-PxBJnojza50c4SOcypjdq-fEjyOt2biPbSMQABtLe0nzIP3xOBcBB1esw==&c=NKYGPlfjEa256vPJiUeaQ18fh4TUslyymaEvZXAdvsiYVNJ1ieRDYw==&ch=YkTxwKhDFwG8E2Rsjiy9SZk6fKPiRXXLkQB6vvzzO3WAyzq8APpb4w==)
---
| "I'm not a Republican, nor am I a Democrat. I'm an Independent. But what is important to me, is the people we send to that big place in Washington D.C. learn to work together and not apart.
Ally is a woman who can reach across the aisle and she will hear everyone, all sides, and make the best possible decision.
I'm not supporting Ally just because she's a woman, but it is one of the reasons I'm supporting Ally. She will be the first woman Senator from Utah, and that's pretty significant. We need more variety, more uniqueness, not to make us separate, but to bring us together and celebrate our differences.
As a woman, I have rarely met someone as powerful and strong, as well-spoken, as empathetic as Ally. She's the kind of person, the kind of woman, I want to represent me in the U.S. Senate."

---
|

Ken Verdoia interviewed Ally Isom on Facebook Live on June 7, 2022
---
Learn more about Ally's top priorities in Washington and how she will represent Utah in the U.S. Senate.

She’s the kind of person, the kind of woman, I want to represent me in the U.S. Senate.” | | | | | | | == | | Businesswoman Mary Crafts publicly endorses Ally Isom for U.S. Senate. == | "I'm not a Republican, nor am I a Democrat. I'm an Independent. But what is important to me, is the people we send to that big place in Washington D.C. learn to work together and not apart. Ally is a woman who can reach across the aisle and she will hear everyone, all sides, and make the best possible decision. I'm not supporting Ally just because she's a woman, but it is one of the reasons I'm supporting Ally. She will be the first woman Senator from Utah, and that's pretty significant. We need more variety, more uniqueness, not to make us separate, but to bring us together and celebrate our differences. As a woman, I have rarely met someone as powerful and strong, as well-spoken, as empathetic as Ally. She's the kind of person, the kind of woman, I want to represent me in the U.S. Senate." | Ken Verdoia interviewed Ally Isom on Facebook Live on June 7, 2022 Learn more about Ally's top priorities in Washington and how she will represent Utah in the U.S. Senate. == | | Business and community leaders endorse Ally Isom for U.S. Senate: == == == == == == == == | | | == | VOTE ALLY ISOM FOR U.S. SENATE!
