subject: This is going to be neck and neck.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am reaching out because I need to know you are supporting me in my primary on TUESDAY. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/i-am-reaching-out-because-i-need-to-know-you-are-supporting-me-in-my-primary-on-tuesday?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=f02c6ade6d&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | Peter, _I am reaching out because I need to know you are supporting me in my primary on TUESDAY._

Recent polling shows that I am in a virtual TIE with my Democrat opponent for this seat. **[If every grassroots supporter takes action TODAY to support me, we can FLIP my district red and CRUSH the Democrat establishment](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=9ece7341f2&e=af4b86f5c6).**

[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=fd5e26446e&e=af4b86f5c6)

We cannot allow the Democrats to keep a majority this midterm. And my opponent, Elaine Luria, is one of Pelosi and Biden’s favorite tools they use to advance their radical agenda.

**With a Democrat majority, it is GUARANTEED that inflation will continue to boom, gas prices will explode, and our indoctrinating school system will continue to ruin our country’s future.**

**[_I am the _only_ Republican in this race who has what it takes to stand up against the Left and push BACK against their mission to destroy everything that makes this country so great_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=c742778372&e=af4b86f5c6).__**

Don’t forget just how terrible the Democrats have treated you over the past two years.

We need to fire every politician that accepted and supported vaccine mandates, draconian COVID measures, and all other freedom-limiting legislation.

With the Democrat machine currently targeting our right to bear arms and Second Amendment rights, we MUST secure a Republican majority before it’s too late.

[**Are you with me? Donate today to pledge your support for my America-First, pro-God, and pro-family agenda.**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=e8158e5dc5&e=af4b86f5c6)
[**< < DONATE $250 >>**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=5fa763c2f9&e=af4b86f5c6)
[**< < DONATE $100 >>**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=f8ab70460d&e=af4b86f5c6)
[**< < DONATE $75 >>**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=7528990f87&e=af4b86f5c6)
[**< < DONATE $50 >>**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=49800eaa2b&e=af4b86f5c6)
[**< < DONATE $20 >>**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=51a1f1555e&e=af4b86f5c6)
With your donation, I can run media advertisements before election day which will expose everyone in my district to the failures of Democrat Rep. Elaine Luria.

**The 24 hours before the primary is going to be huge.**

With mega super PACs and corrupt donors fundraising for my opponent, I am relying on patriotic grassroots supporters like yourself to get across the finish line. [**Rush a donation to my campaign TODAY so we can win this together.**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=834cef6afe&e=af4b86f5c6)

Thank you in advance for your support.

Respectfully,

**
Jarome Bell
Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd.
Republican Candidate for Congress**

P.S.: My primary election is on TUESDAY. With things coming down to the wire, I need every grassroots Conservative supporter to help me flip this seat. [**Chip in to my campaign today**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=2c3a505ed9&e=af4b86f5c6)**!** Thank you for your generosity!

body:
The political experts know I can win...

---

Friend: I apologize for landing in your inbox again, but this is fantastic news. **Legendary political strategist James Carville says he has "ZERO DOUBT" that I can win this battleground race in Florida and expand Democratic Senate control!**
My race is Democrats' BEST chance to ensure Mitch McConnell remains in the minority, but he and Marco Rubio are already ruthlessly attacking me – and they hauled in more than $100 million last year alone, which they can pour into Florida at any moment. **That's why it's absolutely essential that I hit my grassroots fundraising goals.**

Friend, what is going on in Florida?

After a newly released poll showed a **_virtual tie_** between myself and Gov. Ron DeSantis, I thought people would be fired up to keep up the momentum and defeat DeSantis.

I mean, he won last time by less than one percentage point. And if he wins again in Florida in 2022, he’ll be primed for the Republican nomination for president in 2024.

He represents the **_worst_** of Florida politics, and it’s going to take a huge grassroots movement to take him down. **_But right now, our fundraising is stalling and it seems like nobody even cares that this race could come down to less than one percentage point!_**

What is going on here?

**_[With your help, we can beat Ron DeSantis and bring his backwards agenda to an end.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46758577/351631376/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220621_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2RiMjhiMi1mM2YwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHgPoEPU8kb338QssRESiYAxDwWgq4jsXiSrQhgAlQ8=)_**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: VIDEO: She carried a gun for 27 years and wants to take yours away. . .
body:
Watch her reaction now and help get me to Congress where I will fight against Gun Grabbing Communists and protect the 2nd Amendment every day.
****
| | | **[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ySzOnogP6892pjdYCbCMW0dA/HOvRC90D6FalZ1sV5rS7630A)**
Patriot,

On Friday, I ran into notorious, Florida Democrat Congresswoman Val Demings as she was finishing up a ride on her Harley.

Demings is currently running for a U.S. Senate seat in Florida.

She wasn't thrilled to see me as soon as she recognized who I was, but as soon as my first question was asked . . . **she couldn 't think fast enough to talk her way out.**

She mumbled and smiled and walked to the closest open door to avoid me and my cellphone camera!

[Watch me confront Val here.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ySzOnogP6892pjdYCbCMW0dA/HOvRC90D6FalZ1sV5rS7630A)

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ySzOnogP6892pjdYCbCMW0dA/HOvRC90D6FalZ1sV5rS7630A)

Val Demings is a full-blown Gun Grabbing Communist, and she is pushing hard to use the recent tragedy in Uvalde, TX to further her gun grabbing agenda.

Demings most recent Congressional action was to advocate for unconstitutional, Federal Red Flag legislation that would eliminate all due process and allow activist judges to strip Americans of their 2nd Amendment Rights! She even proudly bragged about supporting Red Flag laws in a press release on her website.

While Val says she wants to "keep guns out of the hands of criminals," she was dumb enough to leave her own service pistol in an unlocked vehicle when she was the Chief of Police in Orlando, and her service weapon was stolen by a CRIMINAL due to her own recklessness!

[Watch her reaction now, and help me get to Congress where I will fight against Gun Grabbing Communists and protect the 2nd Amendment every day](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ySzOnogP6892pjdYCbCMW0dA/HOvRC90D6FalZ1sV5rS7630A)!

**I have just 64 days left until the Florida Republican Primary, and 10 days to go until the end of the fundraising quarter!**

Any amount you can donate TODAY will be greatly appreciated and get me ONE VOTE closer to victory!

[Please donate any amount that you can today.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ySzOnogP6892pjdYCbCMW0dA/HOvRC90D6FalZ1sV5rS7630A)

Thank you for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer ** ** ** ** **** ** ** **** **Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc** **** **Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Team, another day, another shocking revelation.

Just recently, we learned that Ginni Thomas — closely connected to a sitting Supreme Court justice — had conversations with one of Trump’s lawyers preceding the January 6 insurrection. This is not okay. Are we supposed to just accept that someone with direct access to the highest court in the land may have also pressured Pence to overturn a democratic election?

https://secure.ngpvan.com/GirFEx10MEWNef2l61H6Xg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GirFEx10MEWNef2l61H6Xg2]
The Washington Post

No. Absolutely not. And the January 6 Investigation Committee is getting to the bottom of things. We’re putting together a petition demanding that Ginni Thomas immediately testify before the nation . We deserve to know the truth. Anyone who played a role in the leadup to the insurrection must speak up, including people with close connections to Supreme Court justices. Will you sign on and demand that she testifies, team? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GirFEx10MEWNef2l61H6Xg2]

SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GirFEx10MEWNef2l61H6Xg2]

For too long, Americans have been kept in the dark about an event that affects *all* of our elections, democratic processes, and institutions. We need answers, yesterday. No one is above the law. So let’s hear from Ginni Thomas. Will you sign on in support of Thomas testifying, team? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GirFEx10MEWNef2l61H6Xg2]

SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GirFEx10MEWNef2l61H6Xg2]

Thanks, team.

Team Swalwell

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Their attack plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Senator Raphael Warnock knows if the race is about issues -- he will lose. |
---
Fellow American,

Senator Raphael Warnock's new attack ad against us doesn't mention these very important five words:

Inflation.
Gas Prices.
Baby Formula.
**Our opponent is already slinging mud five months before the election because he knows if the race is about issues - he will lose.**

_**With no real accomplishments to brag about, Senator Warnock is going on the offensive to distract voters and change the subject.**_

It's funny because in 2020, he said the campaign should be about the issues. See for yourself:

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10376f0b511542ec839ed4a63126a522&_e=IuUG6d0Sb_0rucfnmcVk5xnqPZiKg-9ryFgf76xLVkxbubaLw8JTE2Q3gGmsPsODqrYEvE7SXZkUwUzymikl3eVYKD5iAY5LJ6Uk44Gj2-R68WkYyrQ4D_6CDHiZouaUWnmOQjDKMguUKyJ1UpVwhAded4pv_gG0a3BaMzXjh6PWM5hVDSjhNoBLQvX6t2kVZh1uxkzpaJtvZAjxRil_eB8s170ImB3l1pYHzMyMX_rMTJJ6dR_xBJagqZRr5dSw4rAXr4gUF1VVx9Pxcp4XIJ_OOXUbf2iJUBCJDi8dLJ0Hmtj8zT7tJVHrhVyk27Dkea2Ra3APyvSUbiVEXrA1zPFoVwerLm3kZ_rI2vUt2d085eo6h_71awycLaW0EGpe0bD80L7f_Mw5x-ZIzAyUcS6fcxFA9G-KmOlnA8zV1M2-gE2ArKzyDQ1waDHapF576MBNsfTfpP0qwzXA9bZjepxzPTVFmOsAP84dd2yImWg%3D)
Warnock's attacks are a lot of talk and no substance.

Our opponent is unable to air an ad that speaks to solving the most critical issues facing Americans. **After all, since he's voted 96% of the time with President Biden in Washington, he's helped CAUSE the very problems we're facing!**

Instead, he used the 30 seconds in his latest tv ad to launch misleading attacks against me. It's all smoke and mirrors.

Fellow American, if we focus on the issues that matter to Georgians right now, we will win. **[That's why I'm asking if you'd kindly contribute $6 to my Senate campaign today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10376f0b511542ec839ed4a63126a522&_e=IuUG6d0Sb_0rucfnmcVk5xnqPZiKg-9ryFgf76xLVkxbubaLw8JTE2Q3gGmsPsODqrYEvE7SXZkUwUzymikl3eVYKD5iAY5LJ6Uk44Gj2-R68WkYyrQ4D_6CDHiZouaUWnmOQjDKMguUKyJ1UpVwhAded4pv_gG0a3BaMzXjh6PWM5hVDSjhNoBLQvX6t2kVZh1uxkzpaJtvZAjxRil_eB8s170ImB3l1pYHzMyMX_rMTJJ6dR_xBJagqZRr5dSw4rAXr4gUF1VVx9Pxcp4XIEulO5ULwuGP_3IbUcR68sLLsex1scCCm4iAhG81yR9IPdcOEzzTwYTh_fYWf3Gb_TLxVSDILDX_z66OShvCTxJGCn51GQ5Pv44o04kpsX3b8hAasV9rwToIN70LO4ibugdoLA1b7UgzQIk9izlkIT03rVHA2rjp9wl0YvGbW1VpY_uzZiveNbbNb9ozttbzmzz_zEIkaffMmMJze9vOPQc%3D)**

Our opponent has raised more money than any Senate candidate this year - Democrat or Republican, and there's no doubt he'll soon report another massive sum of money funneled to his campaign by Hollywood millionaires and Far-Left donors when the next financial reports come out in July.

**We can win this race...but only if we are able to educate Georgia voters that Senator Warnock is failing them in Washington.**

clean_body: Senator Raphael Warnock knows if the race is about issues -- he will lose. | Fellow American, Senator Raphael Warnock's new attack ad against us doesn't mention these very important five words: Inflation. Gas Prices. Baby Formula. Our opponent is already slinging mud five months before the election because he knows if the race is about issues - he will lose. With no real accomplishments to brag about, Senator Warnock is going on the offensive to distract voters and change the subject. It's funny because in 2020, he said the campaign should be about the issues. See for yourself: Warnock's attacks are a lot of talk and no substance. Our opponent is unable to air an ad that speaks to solving the most critical issues facing Americans. After all, since he's voted 96% of the time with President Biden in Washington, he's helped CAUSE the very problems we're facing! Instead, he used the 30 seconds in his latest tv ad to launch misleading attacks against me. It's all smoke and mirrors. Fellow American, if we focus on the issues that matter to Georgians right now, we will win. Our opponent has raised more money than any Senate candidate this year - Democrat or Republican, and there's no doubt he'll soon report another massive sum of money funneled to his campaign by Hollywood millionaires and Far-Left donors when the next financial reports come out in July. We can win this race...but only if we are able to educate Georgia voters that Senator Warnock is failing them in Washington. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Team Griswold
subject: You’re invited: The State of Democracy with U.S. Senator Sherrod Brown & SOS Griswold
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Join Jena for a Virtual Fundraiser on July 11 with U.S. Senator Sherrod Brown
On Monday, July 11, from 5:00 to 6:00 PM MT, Jena will be joined by U.S. Senator from Ohio Sherrod Brown for a virtual fundraiser.
Sen. Sherrod Brown is an ardent supporter of workers’ rights and is fighting to protect everyday Americans. With his committed support to voting rights and ballot box access, he is an ally in the fight to protect elections. Also, he is a former Secretary of State!
Please join us and show your support for Jena in her re-election campaign for Colorado Secretary of State. If you plan to attend, please RSVP below.
RSVP HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jenajuly11?refcode=220620-email]Thank you,
Team Griswold
P.S. If you can’t attend, make a contribution and show your support! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-jg?refcode=220620-email]
My name is Jena Griswold. In 2018, I was elected as the first democratic Secretary of State in Colorado since 1958, the first democratic woman Secretary of State in Colorado’s history, and only the 10th woman in Colorado’s history to hold the statewide constitutional office of governor, attorney general, secretary of state, or treasurer!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-jg?refcode=220620-email&recurring=true]
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Your role in the next election
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=bd0670b19d7845618a4d620dfc7e1675&_e=opa7SCVkDmgzYN8LWGC6r5yNW5_FDqkcupgs3hEYcQspVuHSjS22XZFTG5bpqBOqf3nv0_Coyt5TZ5VA81u_JiAqXq99-VZXizqa6JV-aNrbNIWl_O89WWX9Pe2Z1hLHmYFYWXuIbM5ippTbhSALiIahUJPSmiSkgYP2Ju3BB7kBrhB6rGkGtYKeSGxkFOHxBvMyBpTAlD06gF2D3npOmr8ZPRLAjMyfiDMfpKk6Lu8GIDsMf8gH1D4PHkZQq8vSgFYD6W9Xdyufb9oIA2cijzgsF5Dpdy82Q9Ksfq-mmGD2PiMn8aOlIn9i8p5Y6kTh3cQOXU_vu-IZalWucglnr2y73-XPMy0XU8W_XzPU65inxlhc07gr2YlnKIBbNw0i6DAIqZq9aai6M1H1HEXfGtONSL3KMkeYGHxNRVT5EEUnaVqUsKZTj9y6_fJ2Qgr1)
---
Friend,
---
I’ve run winning campaigns many times throughout my career — three for state legislature and two for governor. With grit and grace, I even managed to defeat a 30-year incumbent. ** ** I know what it takes to win elections, so now I’m focusing my time and energy on helping Republicans across the country win their races. ** ** That's why I’m writing you this personal note. I would love for you to play a part in upcoming elections by joining my team. So I’m humbly asking you to take a stand with me today.** ** **[If you’re able, can I count on you to step up and join our team by 11:59 pm tonight?](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=bd0670b19d7845618a4d620dfc7e1675&_e=opa7SCVkDmgzYN8LWGC6r5yNW5_FDqkcupgs3hEYcQspVuHSjS22XZFTG5bpqBOqf3nv0_Coyt5TZ5VA81u_JiAqXq99-VZXizqa6JV-aNrbNIWl_O89WWX9Pe2Z1hLHmYFYWXuIbM5ippTbhSALiIahUJPSmiSkgYP2Ju3BB7kBrhB6rGkGtYKeSGxkFOHxBvMyBpTAlD06gF2D3npOmr8ZPRLAjMyfiDMfpKk6Lu9ND82ygPpEoT1H2LRtPE-LfHmuWZLcKaUz2t3gAZhsdNVesjZqNzH7tc5REgQDKVtFlzFddFidQmP_Sc4oK7wcljfeLvE_fmhT1FLEmNln0TkGSpKUtjVIDbUuCb7nzU-cCJSAtEdzJNZbHOf3_KQMkLXkorCvDUPiItZgXz2IbC7fhBm3znV1ZvWntVMpzus8aqZprWnKgWHT_DB46unp)**
---
[**Take A Stand Now**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=bd0670b19d7845618a4d620dfc7e1675&_e=opa7SCVkDmgzYN8LWGC6r5yNW5_FDqkcupgs3hEYcQspVuHSjS22XZFTG5bpqBOqf3nv0_Coyt5TZ5VA81u_JiAqXq99-VZXizqa6JV-aNrbNIWl_O89WWX9Pe2Z1hLHmYFYWXuIbM5ippTbhSALiIahUJPSmiSkgYP2Ju3BB7kBrhB6rGkGtYKeSGxkFOHxBvMyBpTAlD06gF2D3npOmr8ZPRLAjMyfiDMfpKk6Lu9BnijbmzqHuxTiHxyNQPsQUf-ofOWw7E6UFZsNytjdIulqXWTEArtHTCbx5UklONGHXlQODqILbOk4-OOTQrVb-o-6jfPeXktiro8bX6Bge7Dye7jzlDtADtNw70c3vve93QdIW5IYwgNYIDyC2p92HTtieWrQVK_uw1_MGR14FmHtjmoCioDqU8CctjRVCfM2LqvVrl-KSSZ4OhU5Q1GE)
---
The only way we can win this November is if all Republicans unite. Democrats would _LOVE_ to see us divided. They know that if we spend our time focused on party infighting instead of electing more Republicans to office, then Democrats will have a better chance of holding onto their razor-thin majority. That’s why we must show Democrats that we freedom-loving Americans are more united than ever. To do that, I’m hoping you’ll join my team as we unite a coalition of grassroots conservatives from across the country to rise up in defense of our conservative values and elect strong leaders who will fight to uphold our Constitution. When __ we join together, we will do far more than flip the five seats needed to take back the House and the one seat needed to take back the Senate. We will create a sweeping wave of Republican victories that will shape the future of our nation for years to come. We can’t do this alone, friend. [**If you are unable to chip in right now, I completely understand. But if you’re able to pitch in even $1 or more, I’m hoping I can count on your support today.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=bd0670b19d7845618a4d620dfc7e1675&_e=opa7SCVkDmgzYN8LWGC6r5yNW5_FDqkcupgs3hEYcQspVuHSjS22XZFTG5bpqBOqf3nv0_Coyt5TZ5VA81u_JiAqXq99-VZXizqa6JV-aNrbNIWl_O89WWX9Pe2Z1hLHmYFYWXuIbM5ippTbhSALiIahUJPSmiSkgYP2Ju3BB7kBrhB6rGkGtYKeSGxkFOHxBvMyBpTAlD06gF2D3npOmr8ZPRLAjMyfiDMfpKk6Lu83qNtENVxWLTbpIrAa7FM3DVLT9RAs_UL1TT9IJGOhJGB7mD6XzLxmTTLVsfe89RSmfVbEtAQNmy2HGzbW-VntaPd4NHywN9tbmW_kdo8PdC9XFk-dAltp9QxmGrC6NfVtTuoY-I0CnPk8uHizGTtVduJ1LA2A16ITzN3oE0r-jlN9voH8mh-Uhruk2U_jbZFOqDRDB3AkkyyGum-cPICw) My very best

Nikki R. Haley

[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=bd0670b19d7845618a4d620dfc7e1675&_e=opa7SCVkDmgzYN8LWGC6r5yNW5_FDqkcupgs3hEYcQvd9OG_7PjZqRW-phBC9hARimrLVj3NI45IfpoZFyoPwkDk4Xxy1sc2tyFJQRhoWpwlkU0GiIkAIFjP7NfZhXtxNu2Tg_zcCgPJxxTlAxmb6LmBP3mN36t8EwmqCBtteSrmGqFB0VlbDZMP1zTB835ASTSdGcMG7AQElgzU4YCCPV7aalL8WThs4eYTCJq7tSHwa_sOnr5YA2DisETVE1gv0oxLZLSPLiEqAMXHYno38MAvXK0oVONldP9Wyxio_51u-bU1zAhQIh-C6aSpB8Q_NA8IhAhn8nAV1tz4f6M7lDeWybCCziriSD7pGLh2ixZ56ZHoUC_CFK6-fgrpNAgG2EfMpHDEZCYmYGpW0i3ugUz72gphvC68nF2g24ZxB4ESKM5jiq5GkZGZCArfOqBDs3W9VDWFRL1Tuq2Wjt-rLA%3D%3D)

** _A Note >From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. clean_body: | | | Friend, I’ve run winning campaigns many times throughout my career — three for state legislature and two for governor. With grit and grace, I even managed to defeat a 30-year incumbent. I know what it takes to win elections, so now I’m focusing my time and energy on helping Republicans across the country win their races. That's why I’m writing you this personal note. I would love for you to play a part in upcoming elections by joining my team. So I’m humbly asking you to take a stand with me today. The only way we can win this November is if all Republicans unite. Democrats would LOVE to see us divided. They know that if we spend our time focused on party infighting instead of electing more Republicans to office, then Democrats will have a better chance of holding onto their razor-thin majority. That’s why we must show Democrats that we freedom-loving Americans are more united than ever. To do that, I’m hoping you’ll join my team as we unite a coalition of grassroots conservatives from across the country to rise up in defense of our conservative values and elect strong leaders who will fight to uphold our Constitution. When we join together, we will do far more than flip the five seats needed to take back the House and the one seat needed to take back the Senate. We will create a sweeping wave of Republican victories that will shape the future of our nation for years to come. We can’t do this alone, friend. My very best Nikki R. subject: Send a letter: Co-sponsor the TREAT Long Covid Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress

| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dppOfkuedm5o3Dq0Eo0eOo4MVpTylYbEqofAZNGp1j3g4WDRuU_ms-tfk1saBwztmYX5pzOXk6FBA_W2rPUHWMuA03Gu-NmWzQmNWTlSsiETOHPERC6UTBqztcXJYbItaBzz3iB8Ba_iraSoIFjvFa4312CFO6p0OXNAPI9iE0pVUbHLSnkWh7QJgyZwIEgmzypdUXr08lwIF8Dqppt0xBA/3n2/Cx3IPP4JT62suCEhxQizcg/h0/ayjGvjpIm-EINXbl78s71uYzi0AoMKNrvRI8a9GTvJ0)

Peter, a just and equitable pandemic recovery must include the millions of people living with Long COVID, a community whose voices and suffering have been ignored for too long. Across the country, millions of people have been living with the physical and mental anguish of Long COVID for months or even years. **Long COVID has had a prolonged impact on many of our most vulnerable individuals and families** — particularly in Black, brown, and historically marginalized communities. It’s past time that these people get the care they deserve and need. **[Will you send a letter to your member of Congress right now asking them to co-sponsor this legislation that will help people who are living with Long Covid?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnaA4tvLNhO7_0FBtpw3bt_wmndFmLxF0ZuWuf6f0wQhXDCCj5kLCH5KwdAz9PZfy4Eh1quvAGYj8hNEddnxEiwmxjGCqp_Ob1T1dYjZcIxFz3UP7lCCNyNsSIYromjW-3ooKVSxX-wciwevJkwAvfSAzo1FIjyzveyv0HCqA05We8Beo23o0oW63h_IKS7l4Os_--qfIMeJrbWBr16zILc_nI0k93VaJsyD_yGh-N5ywuKG5lzNOwX4q_A5TQ5hIpq8JBAo8_h7YKb4wOQYVSo03RVZNHgTjlQN94KPy-F0q1XS9g-g8GqiPD_fbZJQ2n56_ALoHKwUpk1m3Wvf2yp1_SlVPeMyyTK2k05NXIcbLvTIA-1-myrCWGQ_cJ1CjUU35q8F2-8-6rAtmtV9y_pti5SE6ofwVoLL3JQW5ZbojbrzKQ8PFhme466I85pSx53uoVGLbQpIR7D9KRmhzjaQNbFzgfPXurtQmymxFFfuA/3n2/Cx3IPP4JT62suCEhxQizcg/h1/5E_6A_uuoE_Tkp5RP3l_zZBOu0pL0qALc_CFkDTlYJs) ** **[Send your letter](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnaA4tvLNhO7_0FBtpw3bt_wmndFmLxF0ZuWuf6f0wQhXDCCj5kLCH5KwdAz9PZfy4Eh1quvAGYj8hNEddnxEiwmxjGCqp_Ob1T1dYjZcIxFz3UP7lCCNyNsSIYromjW-3ooKVSxX-wciwevJkwAvfSAzo1FIjyzveyv0HCqA05We8Beo23o0oW63h_IKS7l4Os_--qfIMeJrbWBr16zILc_nI0k93VaJsyD_yGh-N5y40lvKBHx_6cb9BcopITg8glsjGCpvJb4ipkAjLPxqqNnfSx02mXakL9POmdlRj8HYrFAsKOX4bs8rigpiBWd_MOlr4ztZYT5AulJCBUSWcDTEmpF_uWjcBGIvvnpLXTXFTKIQf51LBZqC2jWVFF7K8lU39b00brcLwfKFCO287xsHn7dToSHT_iCBEqsJhQufiLWf2n9x3dSKbf23krpOYP2EWaLnz55xkzq8JB7pabFfBzA5kjwPOR8X7rJCRG7A/3n2/Cx3IPP4JT62suCEhxQizcg/h2/O-EOe38nRSwhu44K9WDu7LzUsxMyFHqKlt4VCAT90kM)** By helping folks with Long COVID get critical treatment right in their communities, the _TREAT Long COVID Act_ will save lives and support our long-term recovery from this pandemic. The legislation will fund the expansion of Long COVID Clinics and ensure that health care providers — including community health centers and local public health departments — have the resources to care for Long COVID patients. Our long haulers deserve accessible and affordable medical care and treatment now, and you can help make it a reality. **[Please send a letter to your member of Congress right now, asking them to support this critical legislation.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnaA4tvLNhO7_0FBtpw3bt_wmndFmLxF0ZuWuf6f0wQhXDCCj5kLCH5KwdAz9PZfy4Eh1quvAGYj8hNEddnxEiwmxjGCqp_Ob1T1dYjZcIxFz3UP7lCCNyNsSIYromjW-3ooKVSxX-wciwevJkwAvfSAzo1FIjyzveyv0HCqA05We8Beo23o0oW63h_IKS7l4Os_--qfIMeJrbWBr16zILc_nI0k93VaJsyD_yGh-N5y2sdOkcY0Tnb236eF4dRRlZHZqvX2bx83-FOdeX_K9BRIVozk4dGmOQv1-YYGQH7F3cOsWj7tjSixJONOV6TvAat7qKxHO2x5cx-LhZ63yoZmyC2tgQc_lo6vjjU4hONVfiwgU0M4fRij-aK60SiehyF2e6I0nznF9YCBaep93q9BOq0rJDtmTvSfMTsB3QhkLiqJc_zDn2SkIU7ZgV8MoTg0IwalKJTj4pM1sy-ad_aQrD_0KtqxYjHMCNnquMzJw/3n2/Cx3IPP4JT62suCEhxQizcg/h3/1zFx3tTIbPBBNgtRf7xP9hEg1HF5LgZRDfTfBjgVhkw) ** Thank you for taking action today. clean_body: | | | Peter, a just and equitable pandemic recovery must include the millions of people living with Long COVID, a community whose voices and suffering have been ignored for too long. Across the country, millions of people have been living with the physical and mental anguish of Long COVID for months or even years. Long COVID has had a prolonged impact on many of our most vulnerable individuals and families — particularly in Black, brown, and historically marginalized communities. It’s past time that these people get the care they deserve and need. By helping folks with Long COVID get critical treatment right in their communities, the TREAT Long COVID Act will save lives and support our long-term recovery from this pandemic. The legislation will fund the expansion of Long COVID Clinics and ensure that health care providers — including community health centers and local public health departments — have the resources to care for Long COVID patients. Our long haulers deserve accessible and affordable medical care and treatment now, and you can help make it a reality. Thank you for taking action today. In solidarity, Ayanna Pressley | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Chuck Morse
subject: I hope you’ll read this personal message.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTc3MDM4NDUyMjQ3NTAxODE3JmM9eTJpNCZlPTAmYj05ODQ0MzQ1MTQmZD14MXA5ZjFl.IMvNUVRT96vKSsH3syLh2tz8pYPoJCBuCpyWBr3imKM)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTc3MDM4NDUyMjQ3NTAxODE3JmM9eTJpNCZlPTAmYj05ODQ0MzQ1MjAmZD1hMmoxZTVq.oVn3CAuvrJaXy8-EJ9EFdiKVvXzi5vPsI1KcDuqGquQ)
---
| | | Derek,
__**_
_**In case you don’t know already, I’m currently in the middle of a race for the U.S. Senate in New Hampshire that could be one of the closest political fights in the entire country this year. And according to the polls, we are the ONLY Republican campaign that’s on track to defeat one of Joe Biden’s most trusted lackeys in the upper chamber: Ivy League elitist Maggie Hassan. _Not convinced of the stakes yet?_ Well here’s one more important point - this race could very well be what determines control of the entire Senate. _Our fight_ could be what flips this chamber Red, and stops Democrats like Schumer and Hassan from giving the greenlight to Biden’s Open Borders, Record Gas Prices, and Inflation. A busy schedule on the campaign trail hasn’t given me much time to, but I felt it was important to reach out personally today given how crucial this race is shaping up to be - and the fact that Election Day is _ less than 5 months away._ If you don’t know why defending the values of this state is so important to me, allow me to briefly share my story: I grew up without a lot of money, but through hard work and determination, I was able to live the American Dream right here in New Hampshire. I graduated from college, married my high school sweetheart, and started my own small business that now owns over 13 acres and employs more than 50 Granite Staters. As soon as I could, I wanted to give back to the state that let me live this Dream. So I started volunteering and running for office, eventually becoming President of the State Senate, where I worked with fellow Republicans to _lower taxes, ban late-term abortions, and prohibit discriminatory teaching like Critical Race Theory._ I want to bring that leadership to a place that needs it now more than ever: Maggie Hassan’s Washington, D.C. Because right now, she and the Democrats are holding back all of our progress here in the Granite State. She’s blindly going along with Biden’s agenda, and it has meant reckless spending that creates negative growth, and Open Borders that allow deadly fentanyl to enter our New Hampshire communities. **We have to prove the polls correct and beat her this year - but Hollywood Hassan is raising BIG from her elitist donors in California, so it won’t be easy. Derek, if you want to help WIN this close race in less than 5 months, make our state the priority, flip the Senate RED, and get our nation back on track, ****_[can I count on you to contribute ANY amount to our mission today? →](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTc3MDM4NDUyMjQ3NTAxODE3JmM9eTJpNCZlPTAmYj05ODQ0MzQ1MjYmZD1xMGc4Yjly.Ic--fMLQ06NdFCiaZjIfM-uaUJ8CwqPpHB9Wia2HXJw)_**

---
---
| |
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTc3MDM4NDUyMjQ3NTAxODE3JmM9eTJpNCZlPTAmYj05ODQ0MzQ1MzkmZD11MHM2ajVu.vILPZY9LxNvUOprZDXGpt-g1Lqu4XMTH4gIw8wY2SjI)
---
---
| | | Thank you for the support. This really means a lot to me, and I promise it will make a big difference for our state and country. -_Chuck Morse_ __**_[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTc3MDM4NDUyMjQ3NTAxODE3JmM9eTJpNCZlPTAmYj05ODQ0MzQ1NDYmZD16N2cyYTB1.v4Rj_e7m90KR405j2uXsh2_rE7EW9Wc7geuKt3Cy3I0)_**

subject: Alek Skarlatos to run for U.S. House

body:
Man who stopped Islamic terrorist from blowing up Paris bound train in 2015 to run for the U.S. House. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=deecea558e4b45b7a7ebc42ae54f5ee2&_e=XUxIwbaW0VperpYyHa73B3-fH5PQi57g8zGGRF2PeQSFHOkLuw9pABYmR9AboCoycZWfTrwPx0R48ueqee8RzJaY7YUqZ_8AuC2-CEKghvU1rvKszLK6PAL9R-vgAea4W5ueIpcX13Q8lsB6GDwf0r2mumiqvl0qmAhUXCmn8FrBFTS9ct4-d6omAzAIEeaS2RqKrR0iJv9C6OxuANQnScbNs9QQ-sMnApk_mJ8ebCFqmBn_6QzRcHsFbHTBXxE9qEmxa-zGhXutSCaFioNdKB4vrXZbNxkKIzn4SH0eRWK_E7u27e1SA4bUJE9W9hhu-dWzrMm7IyDZP7vFFvW9wAHR39RgTcOOTFxM9vO0CmepsGToJMlKOfxo63Up0wFXlHI-yBFQdAk8Q4Qbgff2suMHMjhyG02qZVVX8fw-OXoNiq2tch4VttJpUyz1BPF7F-EvXjD5e0gjG0m5gufu2kKRlY8nZdHVRy20U8rt930%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Alek Skarlatos and I'm asking for just a couple moments of your time today as I work to re-introduce myself to conservatives around the nation.

This is my story.

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day.

In 2020 I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality a long ago.**My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism** , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need.

Last May I launched my second campaign for Congress and today I’m asking if you’ll consider supporting me with a financial contribution to my U.S. House campaign.

[** CHIP IN $3 ➞ **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=deecea558e4b45b7a7ebc42ae54f5ee2&_e=XUxIwbaW0VperpYyHa73B3-fH5PQi57g8zGGRF2PeQSFHOkLuw9pABYmR9AboCoycZWfTrwPx0R48ueqee8RzJaY7YUqZ_8AuC2-CEKghvU1rvKszLK6PAL9R-vgAea4W5ueIpcX13Q8lsB6GDwf0r2mumiqvl0qmAhUXCmn8FrBFTS9ct4-d6omAzAIEeaS2RqKrR0iJv9C6OxuANQnScbNs9QQ-sMnApk_mJ8ebCFqmBn_6QzRcHsFbHTBXxE92IB36XOFxNK6vGAUXtCPJGQbOQacdKaqjrmGy2jH8swpceQbawHswQXH0-qnpqS66FWaOmFj33HJNgZ3Z-iWOUA2FuoXaZzZCea1GY8jC6L-VlMp-oSjiefcoPgKp7CsPCUndcJhUJkLpXWBit7ICM6Npi6hk9BHH1Es8fJzKDkoYQRjL_4MtlDbymcNVDhoTg4XZIUJPtPGrFb3RvbXJXA10oErnFNiKNVmz2iALxqEZNMPxZcc-PT1oWKvqEEl)

**[Will you please consider a gift of $5, $10, $25, or even $250 today to help me ensure my campaign is adequately funded? Right now, we simply do not have the cash to compete against Pelosi’s handpicked candidate](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=deecea558e4b45b7a7ebc42ae54f5ee2&_e=XUxIwbaW0VperpYyHa73B3-fH5PQi57g8zGGRF2PeQSFHOkLuw9pABYmR9AboCoycZWfTrwPx0R48ueqee8RzJaY7YUqZ_8AuC2-CEKghvU1rvKszLK6PAL9R-vgAea4W5ueIpcX13Q8lsB6GDwf0r2mumiqvl0qmAhUXCmn8FrBFTS9ct4-d6omAzAIEeaS2RqKrR0iJv9C6OxuANQnScbNs9QQ-sMnApk_mJ8ebCFqmBn_6QzRcHsFbHTBXxE92IB36XOFxNK6vGAUXtCPJPjBdJ538MSQQP6iyY00ATk90CJ0xpA7hePFZ73T4HgslSkWhVDH-dRj5A0Qsz2sZJTXcZVDUAw3zpE6O_JgyIXEYtCUTUDmAxsKL9hZ6OUCSDz1DeCpww080RgfQzTpxCab-hs4WDYZMNmiyVHaoL1zQaceJIu3B_KGoVRCPuCM_owxBiCtKoD3IyOGKX5ZmS66UR1M2Y5X5IzcGUEvy_jL0qx7zmIt-gNxU-klByIz)**.

But it won’t be easy. While my 2020 opponent opted to retire instead of facing a rematch against me, my new Bernie Sanders-style-opponent has already begun to lie about me and what I stand for.

I received an email last week that frankly was just chalked full of claims that my opponent (who has never met me) couldn’t possibly know to be true. She calls me a “**union-buster** ,” a “**climate-change-denier** ,” and a “**Big-Lie-believer**.”

We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day. In 2020 I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality a long ago.My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need. body:
We won’t win without YOU.
Peter,

[**Presidential Task Force Members**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac6151ded710405b86f0d987ab790d36&_e=d37GRwwAXqJb7iOqcyDqBDJjKU1c-HGULlQB-K3fmDnRnD6Bxrzf6nGtMzAWkuRE9JW3vea55PbzKALsLSmrA51JCXcx3zz6uRPuBYQJp85djMvAEybs2DEDzdI31dki-KmAc3aVh_0_KaAVLu84P57DWKqjP7Mt7_VFN7EHzDm__wj53oW-Kqd4vksPZ3PwuNoDz8hNKBbMUPau1nwr8imXyTL4yVZe9OKvlm_UEsnhhSlNlslh2ptAMBFckQZktCA_pXaSGVQ2e0MXeL5TVqxkY5c52MpLjceRIDw31K-oEkDEa5DYLLn08s6e-K3SeLDg_fZ18xjez6nIqNt0pJwJdKYzmA6XBTfX26RLMOIwUBLuz_fbQs9H-cywvSPvC6C2WXcmHHufJMzLXWxlErk2yMc1WYykGPyo843ZQ3xAoGrAxN61CqfV7rw1WXB24uYk-gwr-3gwNZJEe4AeLxdCbl_c6BTyN_RaSGBolUL06GuUTTp0Gz3RdC78bltquEbTTFlbvGpNj9fYrwVkcbBshrk8P_K5DWoJ5-BjjQM%3D) will be the key to winning in November, Peter.

With the support of wealthy Far-Left special interest allies and the biased Liberal mainstream media, Radical Democrats are gearing up for a brutal fight in the midterm elections. We need [**Presidential Task Force Members**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac6151ded710405b86f0d987ab790d36&_e=d37GRwwAXqJb7iOqcyDqBDJjKU1c-HGULlQB-K3fmDnRnD6Bxrzf6nGtMzAWkuRE9JW3vea55PbzKALsLSmrA51JCXcx3zz6uRPuBYQJp85djMvAEybs2DEDzdI31dki-KmAc3aVh_0_KaAVLu84P57DWKqjP7Mt7_VFN7EHzDm__wj53oW-Kqd4vksPZ3PwuNoDz8hNKBbMUPau1nwr8imXyTL4yVZe9OKvlm_UEsnhhSlNlslh2ptAMBFckQZktCA_pXaSGVQ2e0MXeL5TVqxkY5c52MpLjceRIDw31K-oEkDEa5DYLLn08s6e-K3SeLDg_fZ18xjez6nIqNt0pBgzlTwc01Rub8LDdtQEluFT55vDDsxMfYhlKAe45TanU1DKubrsb0569WEf3tBVwyyQD3I4-MRJYRmdBjGZrM9HQmkRrP1VRxC-FkU0AtnaYIE9aAbYE8qitahLhiXdQiW_K3Kq2md1htccQ03I4mldByP2ugBwkmAhFc2uHBAcql1qYxgvm1R6krCC9oT3gYf1AV9S0bWVjj0VBDCuHOY%3D) to help prepare Republicans for the challenge.

[**Please take the RNC’s 2022 Presidential Task Force Survey by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to represent the views of Republicans in 20001 to help your Party better target voters. >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac6151ded710405b86f0d987ab790d36&_e=d37GRwwAXqJb7iOqcyDqBDJjKU1c-HGULlQB-K3fmDnRnD6Bxrzf6nGtMzAWkuRE9JW3vea55PbzKALsLSmrA51JCXcx3zz6uRPuBYQJp85djMvAEybs2DEDzdI31dki-KmAc3aVh_0_KaAVLu84P57DWKqjP7Mt7_VFN7EHzDm__wj53oW-Kqd4vksPZ3PwuNoDz8hNKBbMUPau1nwr8imXyTL4yVZe9OKvlm_UEsnhhSlNlslh2ptAMBFckQZktCA_pXaSGVQ2e0MXeL5TVqxkY5c52MpLjceRIDw31K-oEkDEa5DYLLn08s6e-K3SeLDg_fZ18xjez6nIqNt0pAcEkdg396lAbWE0rMorx9Ad_qjXkCrbG8FswlY7pJiNdZSeo7xzroQ0XHOCa3uMxGaGJBrQCqwIdog9iw5r5YlHNrL5-jy99jQiePVFw6GNEXe-HXspsO6qTWnfPP35Ey0xhX8Dog_OjrjBi8u_8KaXoP5920tQnIKWmO7WG-80Nc__yC8I0TLwLIHqg0J0qQTsvD1hI-Wax91zuHSDPjs%3D)

The American people are feeling the effects of Biden’s partisan agenda, as his administration has spent its first year in power ramming their Liberal Wishlist down our throats.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac6151ded710405b86f0d987ab790d36&_e=d37GRwwAXqJb7iOqcyDqBDJjKU1c-HGULlQB-K3fmDnRnD6Bxrzf6nGtMzAWkuRE9JW3vea55PbzKALsLSmrA51JCXcx3zz6uRPuBYQJp85djMvAEybs2DEDzdI31dki-KmAc3aVh_0_KaAVLu84P57DWKqjP7Mt7_VFN7EHzDm__wj53oW-Kqd4vksPZ3PwuNoDz8hNKBbMUPau1nwr8imXyTL4yVZe9OKvlm_UEsnhhSlNlslh2ptAMBFckQZktCA_pXaSGVQ2e0MXeL5TVqxkY5c52MpLjceRIDw31K-oEkDEa5DYLLn08s6e-K3SeLDg_fZ18xjez6nIqNt0pBWbbaBVbqT3Ow3vrCSRV7UrZqYHWHQrTbW_bRwn0GSmhP26UjQGqf94MsKrR8unlib7p1ZczgSHtRPuOFzJc3mtfqcTydrbK_2-XQqtHRfw_uOLw_hFSQS5P1OMTlHPFEcds1LzWxtKbmQFrMVKr-espebcnQ62kDZbohuvKpdmw7wfVufK1rnnZoq3ekX53uZsd2ghW4mDbOGv02rg9qg%3D)
In only one year of complete control of Washington, Biden has spent trillions on policies that have driven inflation to record highs and caused small businesses to struggle.

By responding to the RNC’s 2022 Presidential Task Force Survey [link] you are helping the RNC to match the huge political machine the Left and the Biden Democrats are building to defeat Republicans.

[**Represent the views of Republicans in 20001.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac6151ded710405b86f0d987ab790d36&_e=d37GRwwAXqJb7iOqcyDqBDJjKU1c-HGULlQB-K3fmDnRnD6Bxrzf6nGtMzAWkuRE9JW3vea55PbzKALsLSmrA51JCXcx3zz6uRPuBYQJp85djMvAEybs2DEDzdI31dki-KmAc3aVh_0_KaAVLu84P57DWKqjP7Mt7_VFN7EHzDm__wj53oW-Kqd4vksPZ3PwuNoDz8hNKBbMUPau1nwr8imXyTL4yVZe9OKvlm_UEsnhhSlNlslh2ptAMBFckQZktCA_pXaSGVQ2e0MXeL5TVqxkY5c52MpLjceRIDw31K-oEkDEa5DYLLn08s6e-K3SeLDg_fZ18xjez6nIqNt0pIfwZIQGiJARanIBj-QzzGqf02myyuOqDMp8n0FQWykEdY4twQZtvv16jxPLf54DLrqDgOo6KF0nEtP7K7r8QD1d-VLK6K3qZYn9yALIDxSEZUVqlyRUrQ878Ej0KzTiU5thalEL12c-EB4-HwsMZ1N6DSWDmdxJT1iTho1OZuvC8KTrhJiGigTio99UdfBDudGE9kTttCuY7N-SmtKfVDU%3D)
The Radical Left spent $3 billion last cycle to elect Joe Biden and a Democrat Congress. With Big Tech, Big Labor, and countless other special interest groups in their pocket, the Democrats will continue their partisan power grab if we don’t stop them.

_We have the momentum, we have the support of the American people, now all we are missing is your guidance, Peter._

[**Please take the RNC’s 2022 Presidential Task Force Survey RIGHT NOW and make sure your party is ready to meet the challenge in November.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac6151ded710405b86f0d987ab790d36&_e=d37GRwwAXqJb7iOqcyDqBDJjKU1c-HGULlQB-K3fmDnRnD6Bxrzf6nGtMzAWkuRE9JW3vea55PbzKALsLSmrA51JCXcx3zz6uRPuBYQJp85djMvAEybs2DEDzdI31dki-KmAc3aVh_0_KaAVLu84P57DWKqjP7Mt7_VFN7EHzDm__wj53oW-Kqd4vksPZ3PwuNoDz8hNKBbMUPau1nwr8imXyTL4yVZe9OKvlm_UEsnhhSlNlslh2ptAMBFckQZktCA_pXaSGVQ2e0MXeL5TVqxkY5c52MpLjceRIDw31K-oEkDEa5DYLLn08s6e-K3SeLDg_fZ18xjez6nIqNt0pLwU0QTXTl_5bSIwdb4fHDoIuU5zRjBZJZNXzy7IZ0C3yK-Bjv9mArJrx0MihtyghocwU0mzGQnV4BWQaPH9t3P3qvuNEMq9zZI28gXHTe9khmwCPYGTirBaVhVGwOUO8LrmpJozfCaIGY5uQgPh0UBaFrVxqjQS0VyCFcef7lt-diN0d9zWHTt-ZjRok2nSKWXtAvrUzlllRlnxfPa6TnA%3D)

Thank you,

| Peter,

name: Yesli Vega
subject: We’ve got support from the House Freedom Caucus!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia
body:
This is great news

| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=332a5175e3474c83af0c4edd2c0d0d69&_e=Cu3_kB3-arfcbmIU8RmWuHZbip1mp6ZDmmVlcWQYbwhdgS1XkI9qan0aMxpqFux3VpjavQTa5ooWgbi5AM1ZfJuDv2g4guvbSpvFvnqO7Kuash5GqhgsvtuslzY1QYIoMnPNC-mlX6dlgEKPRNZJ-ojuH01eHRz30p0DuMD_FSsH_sYuJIohT-BjeN46ObyW576LgXOfCiO-uZBeq88GcxoM1S3E-mhiyEWWhtYuDwFktwfWbQWh1yca7cebCCEcuPSHvUdpngRpJWr2RHobZvhH5kWQs6X5RngaWU9nBvOPvlyUJ_B-YdkxZmlLkjWguIovBCxTlsPot7C9WtFOvNjV3R-hrWnFqhXG1woL48R0IXF9P_eCPNXATN-iKX7673ifMzmkmbi70rE2egMydPSmx7nXinFZ28hSJuLf8_g5MiivJIwz0vJ0i8vf3XPoiw3axiztCQa3b0UrjIcLcz5w25PyodAvuEBlJurs0QeLTuqsqHobhvqBApCh8U7JNl5O4OxM5rmzhxObdJ5e6JIXBytuwYOjoGOA2hDXaAU%3D)
---
Hi Friend,

Earlier this month, **[we received the endorsement of the House Freedom Caucus along with several of their current and past members!](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=332a5175e3474c83af0c4edd2c0d0d69&_e=Cu3_kB3-arfcbmIU8RmWuHZbip1mp6ZDmmVlcWQYbwhdgS1XkI9qan0aMxpqFux3VpjavQTa5ooWgbi5AM1ZfJuDv2g4guvbSpvFvnqO7Kuash5GqhgsvtuslzY1QYIoMnPNC-mlX6dlgEKPRNZJ-ojuH01eHRz30p0DuMD_FSsH_sYuJIohT-BjeN46ObyW576LgXOfCiO-uZBeq88GcxoM1S3E-mhiyEWWhtYuDwFktwfWbQWh1yca7cebCCEcuPSHvUdpngRpJWr2RHobZvhH5kWQs6X5RngaWU9nBvOPvlyUJ_B-YdkxZmlLkjWgCeLXhwOH7IwfQMDaigow6rN9X0rycG_Xh8VDrYZTQ0nRTwrQV6v0x-NpkPNaUbzapc1qfwWWocgOFnRTKHly0cuRTHYYAAFaKVQAoaNgg1smfV4ZdimgeYuQhhC9J9weiRKCNrcQ4qac8G87abHfd8g4f4ayUtuELRYPGH8nq7TPyRi1iSP97b_o1S1ezPq7w6wry1a9SUl1Mox8kkHZ4xQlKIg8R5h5Pa0jig6M3oo%3D)**

**Congressman Bob Good**

I am proud to endorse fellow courageous conservative Yesli Vega in her race for the 7th District Republican nomination. Yesli is a true fighter whom I want serving beside me in Congress, fighting against the establishment and for our true conservative principles. She will put America first, and uphold the Constitution. Please join me in sending Yesli Vega to Washington!” – _**Congressman Good**_

**Congressman Jim Jordan**

“Yesli Vega is the right candidate for the Seventh District. As a strong, principled conservative, she defends the unborn, stands up for our Second Amendment, and will fight for a fully secured southern border. Yesli Vega is just the kind of person we need in Congress to take on Nancy Pelosi and the radical left.” – _**Congressman Jordan**_

**Congressman Louie Gohmert**

“Yesli Vega is an incredible person of faith and a conservative fighter who understands our Republic has drifted perilously close to the edge of the universal precipice and she’s prepared to take the tough stands to prevent the irreparable fall. I am so very encouraged and heartened to support someone with the compassion to care and the steadfastness not to allow our freedom to be traded like a cheap commodity. Yesli Vega will lay it all on the line to defend her Country, her district, her family and her faith, just as she did as a member of law enforcement. I would fervently urge conservatives to rally behind her campaign to hold Washington accountable.” – _**Congressman Gohmert**_

**The House Freedom Caucus knows that we are the most conservative campaign in this race and that we’re the only ones who can defeat Abigail Spanberger and take back the 7th District.**

**We hope to have your support on June 21st and please remember to get out and VOTE!**

Thank you for your continued support,

Yesli Vega

body: New documents exclusively obtained by Fox News Digital reveal that the U.S. Army is teaching West Point cadets critical race theory (CRT), including addressing “whiteness.” [Action] West Point cadets taught critical race theory, including addressing ‘whiteness,’ docs show [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59176&L=27528&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd2VzdC1wb2ludC1jYWRldHMtdGF1Z2h0LWNyaXRpY2FsLXJhY2UtdGhlb3J5LWluY2x1ZGluZy1hZGRyZXNzaW5nLXdoaXRlbmVzcy1kb2NzLXNob3cvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWN0aW9uK2FsZXJ0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] >From Fox News [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59176&L=27529&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3Mvd2VzdC1wb2ludC1jYWRldHMtdGF1Z2h0LWNyaXRpY2FsLXJhY2UtdGhlb3J5LWFkZHJlc3Npbmctd2hpdGVuZXNzLWRvY3Mtc2hvd106P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWN0aW9uK2FsZXJ0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM= New documents exclusively obtained by Fox News Digital reveal that the U.S. Army is teaching West Point cadets critical race theory (CRT), including addressing "whiteness." Fox News Digital exclusively obtained the documents from government watchdog group Judicial Watch, whichhad to sue the military twice under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) to get the information. "Our military is under attack – from within," Judicial Watch president Tom Fitton said in the press release. "These documents show racist, anti-American CRT propaganda is being used to try to radicalize our rising generation of Army leadership at West Point." name: Herschel Walker
subject: Five words you didn’t hear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Senator Raphael Warnock knows if the race is about issues -- he will lose. |
---
Fellow American,

Senator Raphael Warnock's new attack ad against us doesn't mention these very important five words:

Inflation.
Gas Prices.
Baby Formula.
**Our opponent is already slinging mud five months before the election because he knows if the race is about issues - he will lose.**

_**With no real accomplishments to brag about, Senator Warnock is going on the offensive to distract voters and change the subject.**_

It's funny because in 2020, he said the campaign should be about the issues. See for yourself:

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=063a5445b002410f9082226905bd1fd9&_e=Rblxyx5nj7plAVgLSDLdJpDMvPtZSGUoq3tE8vbPbYbAHrDWQgBDL-d3p5sK3d7V8h1cp6P0z2vb7b1srakl9uNNvEhMJCGarRAhYxbHlNuPXdD3Mu6N9H0FrKuHcG80quydVZFfY8STc37HmPByhjtU647_ne4s6I26UKCwlSfiTzAacoyEya0b62pvtDIdhQqP9kPlmNfgvC5YT4BNIUWzSOOLmlXYNdQYS4ofYYQZ0oY4c9au0pCutvSLrKJsr9uRX0fl9T185yXcnX3Gr4HVl-7A2Vru3ajYbPAvT8YxgNdc8M8wRv8G80TTb8sMBqhHxxFSKXyzXmnR5OO-IB-pG4at7RUVi0WF-9e9ah6YXLXTWtDiK6NPLshXpPYoz99l0Kdk43p1Gi4jnHcW1AFFxczIZhzYSuGTg4ZSSPS2P_R5IZBe2gQt-zy87jKrIReLvGD_rqk7D8vGgNg1taIzja7sHMwraEG1jTQp0MJ-_1XR67KzbYMkNMwt1H3Q)
Warnock's attacks are a lot of talk and no substance.

Our opponent is unable to air an ad that speaks to solving the most critical issues facing Americans. **After all, since he's voted 96% of the time with President Biden in Washington, he's helped CAUSE the very problems we're facing!**

Instead, he used the 30 seconds in his latest tv ad to launch misleading attacks against me. It's all smoke and mirrors.

clean_body: Senator Raphael Warnock knows if the race is about issues -- he will lose. | Fellow American, Senator Raphael Warnock's new attack ad against us doesn't mention these very important five words: Inflation. Gas Prices. Baby Formula. Our opponent is already slinging mud five months before the election because he knows if the race is about issues - he will lose. With no real accomplishments to brag about, Senator Warnock is going on the offensive to distract voters and change the subject. It's funny because in 2020, he said the campaign should be about the issues. See for yourself: Warnock's attacks are a lot of talk and no substance. Our opponent is unable to air an ad that speaks to solving the most critical issues facing Americans. After all, since he's voted 96% of the time with President Biden in Washington, he's helped CAUSE the very problems we're facing! Instead, he used the 30 seconds in his latest tv ad to launch misleading attacks against me. It's all smoke and mirrors. Fellow American, if we focus on the issues that matter to Georgians right now, we will win. Our opponent has raised more money than any Senate candidate this year - Democrat or Republican, and there's no doubt he'll soon report another massive sum of money funneled to his campaign by Hollywood millionaires and Far-Left donors when the next financial reports come out in July. We can win this race...but only if we are able to educate Georgia voters that Senator Warnock is failing them in Washington. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Peter -

I've been running as the Community Conservative with a campaign funded by individual supporters like you.

We are powered by Proud Americans that want Congress to further their conservative values and protect our great nation from the ills of the Left.

Rebecca’s weak opponent has become increasingly desperate to derail her frontrunner status in these final weeks before the primary. He wants to distract from the fact that he was never truly around during these last 3 years... his family lives in Connecticut!

He is so desperate, in fact, that his team planted an underage drinking story about Rebecca as _a sophomore in college from the 90s_ to distract voters from the most important story of all...
---
**_...She’s the ONLY conservative in this race with the bona fides to BEAT Tony Evers._**
---
But this petty attack proves just how low our opponent is willing to go. _His attacks will only become more vile and more desperate as Election Day draws closer._

Now more than ever, Rebecca’s counting on her most trusted supporters like YOU to help her continue to FIGHT BACK and get the TRUTH out to voters.

The outlet where our opponent planted this story – the _Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ – is the same publication that has been relentlessly attacking strong Wisconsin conservatives like Senator Ron Johnson.

name: General Mick McGuire
subject: The war we’re fighting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIRE FOR ARIZONA
body:
We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory. | [](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=d91aab5445594ced981ef5c044bdc888&_e=Iz_mCWP-tG9FuR95KxQ7AACphNcERQAaiJXIKLRrBf5UusRyHGL-zjXpRzxrD_ND5W80iu-FG-AeuvRdf6SabNPDm3ul0fAr7-Hgl4rnzgBhQ8Fq3qfh8JY4V06NKoLeK3yd2nIstRQkcpz4dPMMFEZStbbO18oscHhmfbdCQO16Nl4Xd56qvxyRnsHXdtG5SpynwOQGzR9QWYR2ZVVcFDsZOAVVVkYGXOP_uNY1KYdvkJjkSUaWLxFrqYKMT03tDALbs1RWyFZ03plpjKLckwFA5GfT2n7_J1SKslKvoURGyL1qfw-kNwBb8MB0WIU97RU_niovyzEO1z8m_TEzTZutOA2PLITnUuteG9c37btXKp4vfQuIcIrWiLDBPEpJiqXk33Md6I7CHvUyLMUQnw%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race.

Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high.

We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory.

Peter, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border.

When I see a problem, I run towards it, which is exactly why I joined this Senate race. name: Beto HQ
subject: re: new poll released
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This is a single-digit race with the future of Texas at stake.
#
**Quinnipiac University Poll**
**"Texas Governor's Race Tightens"**
_June 15, 2022_
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220620-2.d6KPH6&refcode=ema20220620-194392&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=194392%2E444211%2EpzLcN-)**
This is huge news.
A new poll shows Beto within just five points of Greg Abbott. Beto has cut Abbott's lead by a full 10 points since the last Quinnipiac poll!
**Beto is gaining on Greg Abbott in the polls, and it's clear that we have the momentum to win.** But to defeat Abbott, we'll need the support of this grassroots team right now.
**[Our Texas Ethics Commission deadline is quickly approaching at the end of this month. Please, will you chip in right now to help us keep up this momentum and reach the voters we'll need to win in November?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220620-2.d6KPH6&refcode=ema20220620-194392&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=194392%2E444211%2EpzLcN-)**

While Abbott's net favorables are down, Beto's are up. At the same time, more Texans now disapprove of the job that Abbott is doing as governor. But this momentum could slip away from us unless we maintain our fundraising to keep reaching voters all across the state with our positive, unifying vision for Texas.
**That's why our next Texas Ethics Commission deadline is so crucial.** Every dollar will go directly toward competing against Abbott across Texas and helping us outraise Abbott before our June 30th public filing deadline.
This is a tight, single-digit race with the future of Texas at stake, so we have to ask again: [Can we count on you to chip in before midnight and elect a governor ready to represent ALL Texans?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220620-2.d6KPH6&refcode=ema20220620-194392&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=194392%2E444211%2EpzLcN-)

Beto for Texas

name: Stacey Abrams HQ
subject: We personalized this link for Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

In less than two weeks we have to release all of our public fundraising
numbers since the start of the general election. Brian Kemp, Republican
strategists and the media are going to use these numbers as a measure of
how competitive we can be.

We’re relying on grassroots supporters to show those who doubt us the
strength of this team. Please, support Stacey’s campaign for governor
before June 30. We made a personalized link just for you,
Derek:

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1455?refcode=sa_em_220620_B1_PersonalLink_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=688%2E1862389%2E_IkNb0 ]act.staceyabrams.com/go/June30?supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com

We’ll be honest with you: this fundraising goal isn’t just about numbers
in a list. It’s a measure of how equipped we are to hire staff, train
volunteers, invest in ads on every platform, mobilize voters and
everything else we need to do to win.

And more than that — Brian Kemp has been using a multi-million-dollar
fundraising advantage to try and bury us in early spending and misleading
attacks. This public deadline is our chance to catch up before his attack
ads sink in with voters.

But we can’t accomplish that without you,
Derek.

This is going to be the biggest test of our campaign yet. That’s why we’re
counting on you to make it a success. Whether you give $25
or $5, every bit helps. Here’s your personal link again:

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1455?refcode=sa_em_220620_B1_PersonalLink_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=688%2E1862389%2E_IkNb0 ]act.staceyabrams.com/go/June30?supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Our entire team is so thankful for your support,

clean_body: [1]Stacey Abrams for Governor Derek, In less than two weeks we have to release all of our public fundraising numbers since the start of the general election. Brian Kemp, Republican strategists and the media are going to use these numbers as a measure of how competitive we can be. We’re relying on grassroots supporters to show those who doubt us the strength of this team. Please, support Stacey’s campaign for governor before June 30. We made a personalized link just for you, Derek: [ ]act.staceyabrams.com/go/June30?supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com We’ll be honest with you: this fundraising goal isn’t just about numbers in a list. It’s a measure of how equipped we are to hire staff, train volunteers, invest in ads on every platform, mobilize voters and everything else we need to do to win. And more than that — Brian Kemp has been using a multi-million-dollar fundraising advantage to try and bury us in early spending and misleading attacks. This public deadline is our chance to catch up before his attack ads sink in with voters. But we can’t accomplish that without you, Derek. This is going to be the biggest test of our campaign yet. That’s why we’re counting on you to make it a success. Whether you give $25 or $5, every bit helps. Here’s your personal link again: [ ]act.staceyabrams.com/go/June30?supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com Our entire team is so thankful for your support, Stacey Abrams HQ [ ]DONATE +---------------------------------+ | PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR | +---------------------------------+ Abrams for Governor 931 Monroe Dr NE Ste A102 #363 Atlanta, GA 30308 United States Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

clean_body: He recorded this just for YOU. | Friend, I cannot thank Steve Scalise enough. He’s been working tirelessly this month to ensure we CRUSH our critical 2nd quarter fundraising goal. With the Florida Supreme Court now locking in Gov. DeSantis’ new congressional map and 4 of the 5 seats needed to END Pelosi’s majority, Rep. Scalise knows exactly what’s at stake for my new district in Texas. There’s no other way to say it: we MUST win this 5th and final seat. Which is why generous conservatives from across the country are helping me 500% MATCH all contributions for the next hour. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Hispanic Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

clean_body: A dear friend of mine is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the nation and she needs our help to achieve victory | Fellow patriot, Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked. But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better. Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs. Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Hispanic Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas. Will you please to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for? I encouraged Monica to try again – a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. . Monica has set a personal goal of raising $15,000 before June 20th (TONIGHT!), and I’ve pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Don't believe what I'm saying? subject: Giuliani calling out RINOs!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KASPAR FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I was on the Rudy Giuliani national radio show recently. Rudy called out the RINOs in this race. Take a listen! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kasparforcongress/kaspar-john-anthony-task-force-9257134?e=9931950ab1)
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
# Scott Kaspar special guest on the Rudy Giuliani Show
A couple weeks ago, America's Mayor Rudy Giuliani interviewed me live on his radio show. Rudy's daily talk show, "[The Rudy Giuliani Show](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=d7098a8d4c&e=9931950ab1)," airs daily at 2pm on New York City's WABC. **Mayor Giuliani spoke with me about the threat posed by RINO Republicans (Republicans in Name Only) who claim to stand for you but in reality are working to undermine everything we care about.**

I thought you might like to hear more about this race and how important it is on June 28th to elect the best person to represent Republicans here in the 6th Congressional District.

Listen to the entire interview [here](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=1abbc8b719&e=9931950ab1).

**I'm a constitutionalist who believes our Founding Documents--our Constitution and Bill of Rights--should be the measure by which our politicians are judged.** These documents are the guarantors of our freedom if we will abide by them in law and policy. This is the foundation of the America First Agenda. And when I become your Congressman, I pledge to never stray from my commitment to them and the principles they communicate to us.

Rudy sees this commitment in me, and that's why he has endorsed me in this 6th Congressional District GOP primary. My opponents haven't shown the same resolve to finishing the work President Donald Trump began while he was in office. See where they stand on the America First Agenda in the chart below.

Scott Kaspar ranks well above his opponents as the trun American First candidate

2022 will be a big year for Republicans. We have a chance to get back on the right path and get out of massive inflation and the constant attacks upon our liberties if we just stay in the fight. I'm grateful to Mayor Giuliani for his support and willingness to let others know I'm the candidate willing to take the heat in Washington, DC.
### You can contribute to Kaspar for Congress by clicking [here](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=7e09e8b8dc&e=9931950ab1).

My opponents haven't shown the same resolve to finishing the work President Donald Trump began while he was in office. See where they stand on the America First Agenda in the chart below. Scott Kaspar ranks well above his opponents as the trun American First candidate 2022 will be a big year for Republicans. We have a chance to get back on the right path and get out of massive inflation and the constant attacks upon our liberties if we just stay in the fight. I'm grateful to Mayor Giuliani for his support and willingness to let others know I'm the candidate willing to take the heat in Washington, DC. | Friends, It's been a long journey since my announcement for Congress back in October, but we finally made it. _**_Tomorrow, Republicans in the 7th District will head to the polls to cast their vote to decide who will take on Abigail Spanberger in November and have a chance to take back the House of Representatives._**__ _ _**_The polls are open tomorrow, June 21, from 6AM to 7PM._**_ I suggest you double check your polling location just to make sure you can seamlessly vote tomorrow, as some precincts may have changed with redistricting: [https://www.elections.virginia.gov/casting-a-ballot/polling-place-lookup/](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.elections.virginia.gov%2Fcasting-a-ballot%2Fpolling-place-lookup%2F/1/01000181834cad8e-d0b16969-be95-49dc-9929-9661c3290566-000000/tycK4f5XUjWHyXGpir8wG4Ibh1o=274). In the remaining hours, my team tells me we are in a strong position to win, but we can't take anything for granted. Voter turnout in primaries can be drastically lower than a general election, which means every vote will make the difference. When I beat a 28 year incumbent Democrat back in 2011, I only won by just over 200 votes. My whole life has been about service. Serving God in nations abroad, serving in the military as an Army Ranger, serving as a police officer and narcotics detective in Prince William, and for the past 11 years serving you in Richmond as a state senator. _It's been an honor to serve, and I'd like to continue that service as your next representative in the United State House of Representatives. _
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Being the frontrunner to take on Spanberger in the fall comes with its challenges. Nearly every candidate has violated President Reagan's 11th Commandment - “Thou shalt not speak ill of any fellow Republican.” It's sad to see my opponents smear false attack ads, but it doesn't surprise me. They are desperate to win and I'm in their way. Opposite of their campaigns, I've run on the issues facing the people of the 7th District. Inflation, Immigration, Ukraine. I want to solve problems, not throw arrows at my fellow Republicans. I'd like to thank each and everyone of you. A campaign is only as strong as its supporters like you. Many of you have given financial donations, volunteered your time, or prayed for our campaign. _I'm speechless when I reflect about my amazing supporters like you._ _**_I need one more favor. I need you to text, call, or email 10 friends or family that live in the 7th District and make sure they vote tomorrow. Encourage them to spread the word. All eyes are on this election tomorrow and you can be the difference._**_
---
| Thank you from the bottom of my heart. God bless and let's win this!
---
| | |
---
| Bryce Reeves
---
| |
---
| | [Join The Team](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-congress%2Fdonate-today/1/01000181834cad8e-d0b16969-be95-49dc-9929-9661c3290566-000000/n8Yjz-J-IQYXqyU8PfIerxaSk7o=274)

body:
**[SIGN ON: Demand Supreme Court Ethics](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46757742/351627599/-206220949?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220620_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjllY2I2Zi1lYmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tdmMaTVz05RFn71zP9xrg-17hgxSe6IyBGynyE-Usyc=&emci=9d2d4d98-e6f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=6b9ecb6f-ebf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
The January 6 Committee just revealed more evidence that Clarence Thomas’s wife was a key part of the insurrection.
Ginni Thomas corresponded with John Eastman, the architect of Trump’s plan to steal the election with false slates of electors. She pressured dozens of Arizona state lawmakers to go along with the plan.
Despite a glaring conflict of interest, Clarence Thomas continued to rule on election cases.
**Derek Marshall is running for Congress against a Republican that voted to overturn the 2020 election. In Congress, he’ll fight for democracy and a fair, ethical judiciary.**
**[Stand with Derek’s campaign and sign the petition: demand a code of ethics for SCOTUS justices that stops conflicts of interest. Pass the Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46757743/351627607/-206220949?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220620_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjllY2I2Zi1lYmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tdmMaTVz05RFn71zP9xrg-17hgxSe6IyBGynyE-Usyc=&emci=9d2d4d98-e6f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=6b9ecb6f-ebf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
Right now, Supreme Court justices aren’t bound by any code of ethics. And they don’t have to justify whether or not they have recused themselves from cases to anyone.
The Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act will help restore trust in a tarnished Supreme Court.
It will ban judges from owning individual stocks or accepting gifts from partisan actors.
**[Stand with Derek’s campaign and sign the petition: pass the Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46757744/351627614/-206220949?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220620_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjllY2I2Zi1lYmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tdmMaTVz05RFn71zP9xrg-17hgxSe6IyBGynyE-Usyc=&emci=9d2d4d98-e6f0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=6b9ecb6f-ebf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**

# _**Only a few more events before votes are counted!**_
---
|
---
|
## Juneteenth Celebration Community and Candidate Mixer
---
|
---
| | | | This coming Wednesday, we are joining other candidates on the ballot you can meet and if you like, bring your ballot! We can talk you through the process of voting and finding your nearest drop box.
---
| [Event Details](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=4bcadc94b9&e=e67cbb3f92 "Event Details")
---
|
---
|
## We are holding an event next Monday, the day before the election.
---
|
---
|
---
| Join us and meet Neal for the last chance before election day!
---
|
---
|

|
* Donate - The more money we can raise, the more goes to lit for our volunteers to hand out and convince last minute voters

subject: Listen to Michelle Obama’s message to Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
She said, “we’ve got to...”

|

Fellow Conservative,

We’re now past the midpoint of the month which means that the end of the 2nd quarter fundraising period is going to be here in the blink of an eye.

Yesterday the email we sent raised just $1,500 – **in our budget we made the assumption that it would bring in north of $10,000**. So, suffice to say, we need this email to do perform substantially better.

**[Can I lean on you to donate $1 today](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=bdfb6a8cf8254299917a721fd1409a7f&_e=ml6aGwEUzBb3fEJrafUFDPsxJzGG4Et9GROKHxgKDUIkEuF7f0eVuwfACryBYkCmmNGuscfZEzN7JEah_pG3J7gDUXCwh3cidSg0vL4w3H9CIjbDFsR92TMzD63mfLa07kSy2e2cEo9XJQpBIXEVmYyzhSz7RxIlOnxLPrsnZ_5V6WAwBIkE_NNEYaj0GfOG7vjrweuiTmWHLr0--eC2phB8MJD6hAYokxfrSk_SLcK60VwBypurOU3kZlijDgxp8eUWUXSkLGabV67hlkkQ0WnDf5xiLEuL1psFwHV8PBMWWGY3x3ddN4vIE60443Zh-mavaSp8cJonhhHMuGlNJm3MpnJ0bps4KUoOUkh3ipkumgzD3ZPM7K_kPFQoY7wl)** given the that we’re mere days away from the June fundraising deadline and Republicans need just 5 seats to flip control of the House in November?

[**RUSH $1 OR MORE TODAY -> **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=bdfb6a8cf8254299917a721fd1409a7f&_e=ml6aGwEUzBb3fEJrafUFDPsxJzGG4Et9GROKHxgKDUIkEuF7f0eVuwfACryBYkCmmNGuscfZEzN7JEah_pG3J7gDUXCwh3cidSg0vL4w3H9CIjbDFsR92TMzD63mfLa07kSy2e2cEo9XJQpBIXEVmYyzhSz7RxIlOnxLPrsnZ_5fJJNTSx9IvgQzx2HvdO__-ZKI-gg8QD1_1sw6SYIHYAj8HC8HXCOBOMHKwgBeMuTEs170yxH4e2m3AQOrT35ZmWCwSGRVzWDde2jxZG_yJg_vpDaWR9EThExYAi9jFp6wvLbMLEPWdChbl5CiiMObb34A517VMIdP3IVdIQzDbxeTKUv5XbBlpOJwFotG3yLxMfvfQcpUNrrnZCKYd6Xu)

We've got our work cut out for us:
1. Raise $8,000+ from this email campaign
2. Withstand millions in attack ads against us
3. Keep our voters engaged and interested when many think we’ve already won.

**[Your $1 contribution will certainly go a long way](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=bdfb6a8cf8254299917a721fd1409a7f&_e=ml6aGwEUzBb3fEJrafUFDPsxJzGG4Et9GROKHxgKDUIkEuF7f0eVuwfACryBYkCmmNGuscfZEzN7JEah_pG3J7gDUXCwh3cidSg0vL4w3H9CIjbDFsR92TMzD63mfLa07kSy2e2cEo9XJQpBIXEVmYyzhSz7RxIlOnxLPrsnZ_4Sln_9nlvQLxA_1--3aVtURFW7UPEcRRG5gilqxLp8l4Qfo1PAcmlbDRvR-Jx7kFHHD_urQ2erSoDUN97Iu6P-D1AXm6gMFOeRDTVkXnpafuYhVHogVotf9EqlbvaTbCq5KEtxlz4yZXJA8icqGGqSQ2lLANQGZ4nsncJIkwQyEeScj31im5J6rQOveiBH9UHkiWlPjm2M5ZcwCZZALy8w)** in helping me and my team make sure that after we hit our fundraising goal this quarter, which if accomplished, will help put us into the position of being able to lend other Republicans a helping hand as we work to take back the House.

subject: 8 days until the Primary. VOTE & VOLUNTEER!

body:
It's time to cast your ballot and volunteer to help make it known that Heidi is the ONLY candidate who can beat Polis!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qluhdhy-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter,**Just 8 days until the primary!** If you haven't turned in your ballot, stop RIGHT NOW, fill it out, and head to your mailbox or the nearest ballot box.**We cannot take anything for granted. Democrats are spending $3 million to pick the GOP primary candidate they KNOW they can beat!****We need your help getting ballots turned in.********Grab a friend and help us make calls and knock on doors. We're making it FUN to be a Republican again.** Our team is set up around the state to **GET OUT THE VOTE**. If you are in the Denver South Metro Area, El Paso County, Jefferson County, Adams County, Weld County, or Mesa County, check out the calendars below for the times we need help in your area and the person to reach out to with any questions. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qluhdhy-ttjjilthht-y/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qluhdhy-ttjjilthht-j/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qluhdhy-ttjjilthht-t/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qluhdhy-ttjjilthht-i/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qluhdhy-ttjjilthht-d/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qluhdhy-ttjjilthht-h/) **I'm out there too, knocking on doors with supporters to make sure that no stone is left unturned.****Democratic dollars will NOT drown us out!!!!** [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qluhdhy-ttjjilthht-k/) **I need your help!**** **The momentum is here! That’s why I’m relieved to tell you that a gracious, patriotic supporter offered to help us hit our Primary fundraising goal.
**_They are offering a 400% match for ALL donations made in the next 24 hours._**

**In my times of need, you have always been there. Now I need your support more than ever.**

**You have NEVER let me down before, and with the soul of Illinois at stake, I know you will not let me down now.** ****
I hate to have to ask for your support again so soon, right after you did everything you could to help me get this far, **but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.**

**I humbly ask you to give anything you can, so we can make the most of this incredible matching opportunity in the next 24 hours. **
The only way we’re going to save Illinois is by pushing through these tough times, knowing that victory will mean **EVERYTHING** and more in November.

[**ANYTHING TO BE MATCHED IMMEDIATELY** ](http://links.rabineforgovernor.com/u/click?_t=78abe9dc86324f49b823fc51cf303a82&_m=1b41f7ef4b2d483cace8a6045fedc0fe&_e=llaS8VbTO_blJuV2kdGIW3pitbg-ye3aCzafYbqKMhLXV60D4xTVW5rLb5MLUVbryczdvkdiLMGWAYSArCTINfYqci34heYAK95aor7mqzJRiC6ngukr-URERUCdX3BnkiVfXnsCuVgccf9I6iQETdrjbqL3GUve2EBtYgJd0C07Zkxq9JFt1m8TW0KRZmV01gD958uevk7RfSjHZ1YrFaq3lYMqRVcLne2IoF0xmI2tBp1OaRyor92U9V7sa5Cy2l3ae4RPNDcr5BX_bd5jsfQjtWZNeQ981CNVgahB57yeL6ZQEStV9gQZveLmS-0BlCMtgN5-eQC4i6WmGn2U47xl3XSndFhhibJ2izJFjsONUgYOxJaowY9lHeCGYOjnTucgoN1UsjU3KUrvjtyppnSEHJI8Yb9uE5cShEO-TyRYz4pngxVQmiy0XfzdAudBlx1Vlbp5DZbeEUoSLLY-IrqkgyXGoj0gwkc0semcLdBgVB2KDvL5Ja4c3k7-UTKc7SVWNSwOFYpJrf8w99lrymPadWm7fpbFWDFZh1r2bd8%3D)
---

Please don’t wait until it’s too late.

Thank you,
