name: Adam Schiff
subject: We need to be unified on these issues
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Now that my California jungle primary is in the rearview mirror, it’s full steam ahead to the general election where both the House and Senate majorities will be up for grabs.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=394%2E5257348%2EzKjGu9)
Derek,
Now that my California jungle primary is in the rearview mirror, it’s full steam ahead to the general election where both the House and Senate majorities will be up for grabs.
Defending our Democratic majorities will be no easy task. Historically, the party in power loses seats in a midterm year, and our 4-seat House majority and 50-50 Senate are among the narrowest margins in Congressional history. We can’t afford to falter — there’s simply too much at stake.
I’m laser-focused on building our House majority here in California and across the country by communicating with voters what we plan to do to protect families, combat inflation, address climate change, and more. That’s not to mention the resources we need to invest to combat the Fox News Misinformation Machine and Republicans’ relentless campaign to smear me personally.
In order to make sure we’re unified on these important issues, I want to hear from you:
[**Derek, please take a moment to complete my campaign’s official June Priorities Survey to let me know what you’d like to see me focusing on in Congress and on the campaign trail.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20220620-june-priorities-survey.7UVlmL&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220620_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=394%2E5257348%2EzKjGu9)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20220620-june-priorities-survey.7UVlmL&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220620_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=394%2E5257348%2EzKjGu9)
---
It’ll just take a few minutes, and will be incredibly helpful in creating a winning strategy for November.
Thank you for sharing your thoughts,
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=394%2E5257348%2EzKjGu9) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=394%2E5257348%2EzKjGu9)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=394%2E5257348%2EzKjGu9)

name: General Mick McGuire
subject: Send a two-star general to Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIRE FOR ARIZONA
body:
As a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f51167baced74cb2989bd44b7574ee28&_e=NwGsc_hW9Jq9uOn3kjhWNEND0IL_93xI41GYZdUkhHWDUeNsljE0NOagVK-ely07PEedCPiFdvUzFOCh8AUXugEntF1Kj-RpmdWNeSGmNPSU80xabZkJhe3VauYQqVvAcUg_LKJ76LD_Sk5rKrJlVf_Hd4RBbIaKK3DXO5t2CLNzobYrepXV51qWL2PHkJjMD9smIrEHu1jrLjnO5hDCJfO7Wlldetiu4jirnlkiPlawz5XdWk0UuIA3jNXKry2LRe8HYVSF54acdy_HpK58hywzCZSxVR1L8SvaRDMo6VEq9vOjBW9e3HMmvadCdry2ZkKQYISJUZaPQc7StmL6X9oGuu9tjuGVYm4o_YiJj1axA3-6D5CypTiV9tz4WVpi8c4q7hdgU-CauEXcBK7qGw%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race.

Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high.

We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory.

Fellow Conservative, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border.

When I see a problem, I run towards it, which is exactly why I joined this Senate race. [**Will you join my fight and help send a conservative fighter to Washington to fix the mess the Democrats have made?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f51167baced74cb2989bd44b7574ee28&_e=NwGsc_hW9Jq9uOn3kjhWNEND0IL_93xI41GYZdUkhHWDUeNsljE0NOagVK-ely07PEedCPiFdvUzFOCh8AUXugEntF1Kj-RpmdWNeSGmNPSU80xabZkJhe3VauYQqVvAcUg_LKJ76LD_Sk5rKrJlVf_Hd4RBbIaKK3DXO5t2CLNzobYrepXV51qWL2PHkJjM3y7OjvIVr32orUXOeg5umwa2Q5tC4SSHxq3n3jE8RfVV6IIHWpgKxwFKgev73GJ8y3VW7adp-jVSOe0v4mxDWrXD4DMxep7n-lYSx1l0rkSi_VUrGYf2PWYrPzkqMyJix32VLiqng53orVpEx0UTNU7T2htwX0fOSJGlj40iaMzDXJ7PRcivjv38I4BuafXHRxzGLB4lWkakL9iyeY5Qyw%3D%3D)

[**SEND A TWO-STAR GENERAL TO WASHINGTON ⇒**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f51167baced74cb2989bd44b7574ee28&_e=NwGsc_hW9Jq9uOn3kjhWNEND0IL_93xI41GYZdUkhHWDUeNsljE0NOagVK-ely07PEedCPiFdvUzFOCh8AUXugEntF1Kj-RpmdWNeSGmNPSU80xabZkJhe3VauYQqVvAcUg_LKJ76LD_Sk5rKrJlVf_Hd4RBbIaKK3DXO5t2CLNzobYrepXV51qWL2PHkJjMAVx1EE7g0HZy0kBipBhiOHaxFxKSFPCORRpCVLqWMycXZLuD7l2aNUHqg0OrN9u1wd8SqBgDoiktmf30jMBJ7f4fgNu-YXKEJp9bvH0HHiHNb92tr0YjpbyG35qmtLvLrwQzYR8zxvoPdk7a1CuMk5ChH1Eqs2D0_UQryeDJPLQT4eBZaHtbue5ewngJqEeA5lh6Cf3pH6I8xA8dP1g4pw%3D%3D)
Washington is full of career politicians who put their own ambitions over the people who elected them.

**Mark Kelly** is no different. While he pledged to be YOUR independent voice in the Senate - he has instead chosen to vote strictly along party lines, voting 97.7% of the time with Biden’s agenda and continues to ignore the issues here in Arizona.

**Mark Kelly** voted for Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court - despite her lenient sentences for violent sex offenders.

**Mark Kelly** has ignored the crisis at our border which has allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood our communities and jeopardize our children’s safety.

**Mark Kelly** has refused to act while Americans are suffering from record unemployment and record inflation.

Make no mistake - we are in a battle for our country and in order for me to WIN I need your help today.

Will you please join my team and contribute any amount and help send a two-star general to Washington to clean up the Democrats mess?

[**Your gift today will go towards putting Washington back to work for YOU and eliminating self-serving politicians like Mark Kelly.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f51167baced74cb2989bd44b7574ee28&_e=NwGsc_hW9Jq9uOn3kjhWNEND0IL_93xI41GYZdUkhHWDUeNsljE0NOagVK-ely07PEedCPiFdvUzFOCh8AUXugEntF1Kj-RpmdWNeSGmNPSU80xabZkJhe3VauYQqVvAcUg_LKJ76LD_Sk5rKrJlVf_Hd4RBbIaKK3DXO5t2CLNzobYrepXV51qWL2PHkJjM72ISDpxZ80X8zYO8UxwV78MO09pOicyrYX228gvuFL79Rlo0a-LPWK9hiCv8gmJCWZ1EapugfWxjg4K2Wk-7v6cpH71iOtHKrcP11Ba1-vmjn2N0Quy2EoXp66KJmD0vAyK8YykhmQCb128jtwI52Zw_oYMbc_R9fRUIX0dxkV-6j3ucbJ87vFyKKp-N0v99Q-t_udzOWjyV9SJDVpLEGQ%3D%3D)

Dear Fellow Conservatives and Friends,

**I want you to strongly support Yesli Vega, Supervisor and Deputy Sheriff, to represent Virginia’s 7th District. She shares my commitment to the Judeo-Christian tradition, the Rule of Law and the Free Market system. She is also an outsider who will strongly take on the entrenched establishment forces that have brought our country to the breaking point economically, educationally and spiritually.**

As I surveyed the field running to represent the district I had the honor of representing, I asked myself several questions:

**Will they fight for the Judeo-Christian values our country was founded upon?**

Will they stop the printing presses and out-of-control spending driving our country further and further into debt fueling our inflation crisis? Will they vote against terrible trillion dollar deficits? Will they vote no on debt ceiling increases?

**Which candidate will be the most committed to securing our porous southern border and putting America First?** Will they support a Wall?

Which candidate will stand up to The Swamp and leadership in both parties to do what’s right for the American people and NOT the special interests?

**Yesli Vega will take the right stand on all of these issues because she has said so.**

**[Please join me with your most generous financial contribution to Yesli’s campaign today - and with your vote on Tuesday!](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=100ce68b10114511adc3cbb32b7d8b31&_e=67To5uCuwCTbJaJ29auLuJDNNXpoVLidiJ7EytGdhZZEvWp2wMYl7bT7KH6D8DfWMxtflL_fh19vQ0ctZv662CDZ8SiYtftgCfWSNu5AAcog2fmyMKihUKsFCfA2sOC4iprOQ340TKJAGzk2YPywX_jS3Z_Zfmf-nlzUHlEoVA23bYwn727Nr5Gh3a_wrRZyGOHwSfbyNkZvW-ZSSIMW2l0TzgZ9pzADHpo3BgO3IdeIRMrWpaHq5kbOA_dF-TnjcISuVASbhEnS8cCHh-JoOXPMlEs-dgiCtPV_1YgbEftCbR0o4IXJCHaNkcIXUrIxac2PP_5W4mV6T1KTxkGF0O2IKXFtz8hNyUHZMAj1Swnh772eTKZBcY0YyvNuzr9qmpgeHrvrHlr1cnlxuBYONdsbCgM3r3aLNitjytw_3plwqxfdlR0PAPuallrwp6bREaCbdQXNqf-9gWzwx3_AKFbIKxKFbgf_e-UpQ-yN4n1jM0eAbi2WQiJ0o_JPzCu0)**

**Now is not the time for another career establishment politician.** I can tell you, the UNIPARTY is not going to get the job done against Abigail Spanberger.

We need a STRONG conservative fighter who can go toe to toe with Spanberger, someone who can present a contrast and call her out for her total allegiance to Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the Democrat Party. Moderate soundbites don’t cut it.

**I don’t endorse often. But when I do, there’s a good reason.**

**Yesli Vega** is the candidate running in the 7th that will keep her word and deserve your financial support and your vote.

**[Please click here](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=100ce68b10114511adc3cbb32b7d8b31&_e=67To5uCuwCTbJaJ29auLuJDNNXpoVLidiJ7EytGdhZZEvWp2wMYl7bT7KH6D8DfWMxtflL_fh19vQ0ctZv662CDZ8SiYtftgCfWSNu5AAcog2fmyMKihUKsFCfA2sOC4iprOQ340TKJAGzk2YPywX_jS3Z_Zfmf-nlzUHlEoVA23bYwn727Nr5Gh3a_wrRZyGOHwSfbyNkZvW-ZSSIMW2l0TzgZ9pzADHpo3BgO3IdeIRMrWpaHq5kbOA_dF-TnjcISuVASbhEnS8cCHh-JoOXPMlEs-dgiCtPV_1YgbEfvDPsYse31-xr1IHHP83s1Ysa8_aS6lki73JkUJB8SPxkGYZoWxo8NIkInIWmZyXGnkNgYt8_uITDvnaxZAG9Z8xndMz7VYO-0_WHZpQW4EhlX0l_4LygncOkUwEVxNC-FPJk5eaNSAZqJRBvj_UorIcIOWOTt_vQDGK60W8Df4dfvafOT1hfgHywoDPCZLGvLTvSTcGbu1MrK3SUoZic1y)** to contribute today and **[here](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=100ce68b10114511adc3cbb32b7d8b31&_e=67To5uCuwCTbJaJ29auLuMgEzcqbdYXQokh9NBtd2OVVaCGEyU2SGPn0OUaadeK3IaAClMXMiUGOGaFaTf-OKYI_ZqH48-wIXYgZ_Wt3uqU2-0Mot1TPC2tYjyFrroAIeT1gk6yf-SWpUONvIfc1AG-J4SeALU6OgrWTn3yD_FB-doaiw2wfINPMrDdBO39aC737vMeW59MIyQ8Uiy_mit8MXkrr5S3Y1rBz6GRg0DXr5MplktVmh7da7NZgKLJ-fbvo0SVzBXbBK4raWZCkjQ%3D%3D)** to find your Election Day voting location.

_Stop the Spending!

Secure Our Border!

Stand Up to the Swamp!

Save America!_

**[Join me in voting for and supporting Sheriff Deputy Yesli Vega for Congress today!](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=100ce68b10114511adc3cbb32b7d8b31&_e=67To5uCuwCTbJaJ29auLuJDNNXpoVLidiJ7EytGdhZZEvWp2wMYl7bT7KH6D8DfWMxtflL_fh19vQ0ctZv662CDZ8SiYtftgCfWSNu5AAcog2fmyMKihUKsFCfA2sOC4iprOQ340TKJAGzk2YPywX_jS3Z_Zfmf-nlzUHlEoVA23bYwn727Nr5Gh3a_wrRZyGOHwSfbyNkZvW-ZSSIMW2l0TzgZ9pzADHpo3BgO3IdeIRMrWpaHq5kbOA_dF-TnjcISuVASbhEnS8cCHh-JoOXPMlEs-dgiCtPV_1YgbEfuYYKmXWYUanGCUYfVyyIVMesbFwDp1Anvqw2h2mIaDjF1sCu63ceKf45JQwIFca83Ww6xool81ynNMykqVwiM9KOGNDLeu3sFt43udE4OHf2XIgA52YZriH-PkzVX8P_ja-4WTlKLFRy6L8HtSSHxnnNIg0MD8twZrf83yRPyzswMdYEjcrElDcD18dBakxB7t9uQYgAxlWf-lEmVRlXl1)**

For Liberty,

Dave Brat

subject: The Democrat’s latest attack makes me look good.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
My primary election is TOMORROW. With less than 24 hours left, the Democrats have released a coordinated media attack across my district. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/i-am-reaching-out-because-i-need-to-know-you-are-supporting-me-in-my-primary-on-tuesday-4657461?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=24450c5d11&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | Peter, My primary election is TOMORROW. **With less than 24 hours left, the Democrats have released a coordinated media attack across my district.**

In typical Democrat style, they think I am too similar to Trump so they are attacking me. I have bad news for them:**they are wasting their money with their latest attack.**

**_Americans want pro-Trump fighters like myself in Congress._**

We **_NEED_** passionate Republicans with a spine in Washington so the radical Democrat agenda can actually be **_STOPPED_**.

[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=26b0c19e11&e=af4b86f5c6)

**_Tomorrow we have the opportunity to prove to the Left that Donald Trump’s agenda will not die out this midterm._ **

**[_The Republican party will unify around Donald Trump and his America-First agenda by securing a majority this midterm_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=9cf560e123&e=af4b86f5c6)!__**

It is of **_ENORMOUS_** importance that Republicans regain a majority this election. We are only **FIVE SEATS AWAY** from a majority. This means Biden can be forced to take responsibility for his terrible leadership and Nancy Pelosi will be **_REMOVED_** as speaker of the House.

The last two years of Biden’s presidency have **_proved_** to millions of Americans that the Democrats are not fit to lead this country.

These are the results of a Democrat majority led by Sleepy Joe:
* **Record-high gas prices.**
* **Baby formula shortage.**
* **Tampon shortage.**
* **Record high inflation rates.**
* **Vaccine mandates.**
* **13 dead American service members in Kabul bombing.**
* **Americans left behind in Afghanistan.**
* **Record illegal immigration/open borders**
* **Supply chain crisis**

_It’s time to make a change in Washington_ and that starts by voting out corrupt Democrats like my opponent Rep. Elaine Luria.

**_The only way_** I can win my election is if Trump supporters nationwide rally behind my campaign over these next 24 hours. [**Rush a donation TODAY to pledge your support for Donald Trump and my America-First campaign!**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=48fe7b67d3&e=af4b86f5c6)[****](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=0bce439982&e=af4b86f5c6)
[**_< < RUSH $250 >>_**
**_< < RUSH $100 >>_**
**_< < RUSH $75 >>_**
**_< < RUSH $50 >>_**
**_< < RUSH $20 >>_**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=d91a7098b3&e=af4b86f5c6)
**These next 24 hours are CRUCIAL. I need all hands on deck.**
[**Pledge your support by donating TODAY!**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=b3004aece5&e=af4b86f5c6)[****](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=3072cd778c&e=af4b86f5c6)

Thank you for your generosity.

Respectfully,

**
Jarome Bell
Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd.
Republican Candidate for Congress**

P.S.: The Left is attacking me for being similar to Donald Trump. Prove to them that you still stand with Donald Trump and his pro-America agenda by [**donating**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=f97148b0b4&e=af4b86f5c6) to my campaign before it’s too late! Thank you for your support.

Thank you for your support. | | | | PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS | Copyright © 2022 Jarome Bell, All rights reserved._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Keith=20Swank?=
subject: You're my backup now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Keith Swank (R)
body:
As a police officer I've been shot at, spit on, punched, kicked and stabbed while fulfilling my duty to protect the public. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7b869e80c040/re-thank-you-15757391?e=d32193ab14)
---
|
---
| | | Police Captain and U.S. Army Infantry veteran Keith Swank here.

[](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=de002cb93b&e=d32193ab14)As a police officer I've been shot at, spit on, punched, kicked and stabbed while fulfilling my duty to protect the public.

After facing down and arresting some of the most dangerous criminals in the country as a police officer, I've got no problem saying "no" to lobbyists and special interests in Washington, DC.

As a cop on the street, I could call for backup if I was ever in need of help.

**_Unfortunately, politicians have turned their backs on us and the country. We have to rely on each other._**

**You're my backup now.**
---
| [DONATE](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=edc0ba8a93&e=d32193ab14 "Anedot Donate Link")
---
| Democrat DA's and judges won't prosecute criminals or hold them on bail, and the Biden administration is encouraging it—along with human trafficking and drug cartels that want to control our border.

**China and Mexican cartels are now killing over 100,000 people a year** in the US with illegal drugs like Fentanyl.

_Under Biden and Pelosi crime is at an all-time high, and inflation and the cost of gas are making our country poorer. _

I've had enough. **_We can't stand by anymore and let this happen._**

They're coming after conservatives for political dissent, while at the same time Antifa terrorists get off with light sentences— _or completely free._

This is totally dangerous and wrong. And it's why I'm running.

**As a policeman and U.S. Army Infantry soldier I took an oath, to protect our country and the constitution and lay down my life if I had to--** defending our country against ALL enemies, foreign or domestic.

Those oath's I took never expire. And I'd be honored to take a third one, and **[go to fight for you in DC.](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=8866ae6388&e=d32193ab14 "DONATE LINK")**

Leftist groups funded by the likes of George Soros are going to try and turn voters against me with lies and intimidation tactics. The D.C. establishment isn't helping me either. They'll fight against us to make sure my opponent and her leftist friends stay in power.

It's time to hit back. _But in order to do so, I need the critical resources it takes to take on the DC establishment and win._** That's why I'm asking for your help.** **[Will you help me fight back with a donation of $15 or more today?](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=2fa7ec89bc&e=d32193ab14 "DONATE LINK")**

**In Freedom, **
[](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=65d8ff7b46&e=d32193ab14)
**Keith R. Swank
GOP Candidate for Congress | Police Captain | U.S. Army Infantry Veteran**

**PS:** My opponent, a former lobbyist and freshmen member of Congress votes 100% percent of the time with Nancy Pelosi. She even got Pelosi to our district for the first time to "brag" about their shameful record. It's time we kick both of them out and get some work done saving the country.

**PPS:** I believe you deserve to have your rights and safety protected as much as the "elites" that influence our political system. I swore an oath to protect this country in the U.S. Army and as a cop on the street; I'll do it again for you in Congress. We can't lose this year. The country is on the line. Let's get started.
---
| [DONATE](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=d106fe4b6b&e=d32193ab14 "DONATE")
---
| | **ABOUT: Keith Swank is a U.S. Army Infantry veteran and Seattle Police Captain sought after for his expertise as an instructor in crisis intervention and de-escalation. He served as Night Duty Commander and Commander of the Metro Special Response Section (S.W.A.T. Team, Harbor Patrol, Canine Unit and Arson/Bomb Squad). In the U.S. Army he served in a long range reconnaissance unit and graduated from Ranger School, Airborne School, High Altitude Low Opening (HALO) and Infantry Training. Swank is a graduate of the University of Washington where he attained a degree in psychology. He is endorsed by the Pierce County and Thurston County Republican Party.**
---
| [ ](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=e80c9d17b4&e=d32193ab14 "https://keithswank.com/about.html")
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=2cd437554d&e=d32193ab14)
---
